```
[bash -lc cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/src/shared/runtime/editor-route-service.ts' <<'EOF'
import type { Client } from "chips-sdk";

export interface CardAst {
  metadata: Record<string, unknown>;
  structure: Record<string, unknown>;
  contentFiles: string[];
}

export interface CardValidationResult {
  valid: boolean;
  errors: string[];
}

export interface CardRenderView {
  title: string;
  body: string;
  contentFiles: string[];
  target: string;
  semanticHash: string;
}

export interface BoxInspection {
  path: string;
  type: "full" | "shell" | "mixed";
  cards: Array<{ path: string; type: "internal" | "external" }>;
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
}

export interface RecentWorkspaceTarget {
  path: string;
  kind: "card" | "box";
  title: string;
  openedAt: string;
}

export interface OpenFileDialogOptions {
  title: string;
  allowMultiple?: boolean;
  mustExist?: boolean;
}

export interface EditorRouteService {
  getConfig<T>(key: string): Promise<T | undefined>;
  setConfig<T>(key: string, value: T): Promise<void>;
  openFileDialog(options: OpenFileDialogOptions): Promise<string | null>;
  parseCard(cardFile: string): Promise<CardAst>;
  validateCard(cardFile: string): Promise<CardValidationResult>;
  renderCardPreview(cardFile: string): Promise<CardRenderView>;
  inspectBox(boxFile: string): Promise<BoxInspection>;
}

export function createEditorRouteService(client: Client): EditorRouteService {
  return {
    async getConfig<T>(key: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<{ key: string }, { value?: T }>("config.get", { key });
      return result.value;
    },
    async setConfig<T>(key: string, value: T) {
      await client.invoke("config.set", { key, value });
    },
    async openFileDialog(options: OpenFileDialogOptions) {
      const result = await client.invoke<
        {
          options: {
            title: string;
            mode: "file";
            allowMultiple: boolean;
            mustExist: boolean;
          };
        },
        { filePaths: string[] | null }
      >("platform.dialogOpenFile", {
        options: {
          title: options.title,
          mode: "file",
          allowMultiple: options.allowMultiple === true,
          mustExist: options.mustExist !== false,
        },
      });

      return Array.isArray(result.filePaths) && result.filePaths.length > 0 ? result.filePaths[0] : null;
    },
    async parseCard(cardFile: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<{ cardFile: string }, { ast: CardAst }>("card.parse", { cardFile });
      return result.ast;
    },
    async validateCard(cardFile: string) {
      return client.invoke<{ cardFile: string }, CardValidationResult>("card.validate", { cardFile });
    },
    async renderCardPreview(cardFile: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<
        {
          cardFile: string;
          options: {
            target: "card-iframe";
            mode: "preview";
          };
        },
        { view: CardRenderView }
      >("card.render", {
        cardFile,
        options: {
          target: "card-iframe",
          mode: "preview",
        },
      });
      return result.view;
    },
    async inspectBox(boxFile: string) {
      const result = await client.invoke<{ boxFile: string }, { inspection: BoxInspection }>("box.inspect", { boxFile });
      return result.inspection;
    },
  };
}
EOF

cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/src/domains/workspace/types.ts' <<'EOF'
import type { BoxInspection, CardAst, CardRenderView, CardValidationResult, RecentWorkspaceTarget } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-route-service";

export type WorkspaceDocumentKind = "card" | "box";

export interface WorkspaceDocumentBase {
  id: string;
  path: string;
  kind: WorkspaceDocumentKind;
  title: string;
  openedAt: string;
}

export interface CardWorkspaceDocument extends WorkspaceDocumentBase {
  kind: "card";
  ast: CardAst;
  validation: CardValidationResult;
  preview: CardRenderView;
}

export interface BoxWorkspaceDocument extends WorkspaceDocumentBase {
  kind: "box";
  inspection: BoxInspection;
}

export type WorkspaceDocument = CardWorkspaceDocument | BoxWorkspaceDocument;

export interface WorkspaceSessionState {
  documents: WorkspaceDocument[];
  activeDocumentId: string | null;
  recentTargets: RecentWorkspaceTarget[];
}
EOF

cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/src/domains/workspace/workspace-service.ts' <<'EOF'
import type { BoxInspection, CardAst, CardRenderView, CardValidationResult, RecentWorkspaceTarget } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-route-service";
import type { BoxWorkspaceDocument, CardWorkspaceDocument, WorkspaceDocument, WorkspaceDocumentKind } from "./types";

const RECENT_TARGETS_LIMIT = 8;

export function detectWorkspaceDocumentKind(pathname: string): WorkspaceDocumentKind | null {
  const normalized = pathname.toLowerCase();
  if (normalized.endsWith(".card")) {
    return "card";
  }
  if (normalized.endsWith(".box")) {
    return "box";
  }
  return null;
}

export function createWorkspaceDocumentId(pathname: string): string {
  return pathname;
}

export function getFileName(pathname: string): string {
  const segments = pathname.split(/[\\/]/).filter(Boolean);
  return segments[segments.length - 1] ?? pathname;
}

function readTitleFromCardAst(ast: CardAst, pathname: string): string {
  const metadataName = ast.metadata?.name;
  return typeof metadataName === "string" && metadataName.trim().length > 0 ? metadataName : getFileName(pathname);
}

function readTitleFromBoxInspection(inspection: BoxInspection, pathname: string): string {
  const metadataName = inspection.metadata?.name;
  return typeof metadataName === "string" && metadataName.trim().length > 0 ? metadataName : getFileName(pathname);
}

export function createCardWorkspaceDocument(params: {
  path: string;
  ast: CardAst;
  validation: CardValidationResult;
  preview: CardRenderView;
}): CardWorkspaceDocument {
  return {
    id: createWorkspaceDocumentId(params.path),
    path: params.path,
    kind: "card",
    title: readTitleFromCardAst(params.ast, params.path),
    openedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    ast: params.ast,
    validation: params.validation,
    preview: params.preview,
  };
}

export function createBoxWorkspaceDocument(params: {
  path: string;
  inspection: BoxInspection;
}): BoxWorkspaceDocument {
  return {
    id: createWorkspaceDocumentId(params.path),
    path: params.path,
    kind: "box",
    title: readTitleFromBoxInspection(params.inspection, params.path),
    openedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    inspection: params.inspection,
  };
}

export function upsertWorkspaceDocument(
  documents: WorkspaceDocument[],
  nextDocument: WorkspaceDocument,
): WorkspaceDocument[] {
  const filtered = documents.filter((item) => item.id !== nextDocument.id);
  return [nextDocument, ...filtered];
}

export function buildRecentWorkspaceTargets(
  current: RecentWorkspaceTarget[],
  document: WorkspaceDocument,
): RecentWorkspaceTarget[] {
  const nextRecord: RecentWorkspaceTarget = {
    path: document.path,
    kind: document.kind,
    title: document.title,
    openedAt: document.openedAt,
  };

  const filtered = current.filter((item) => item.path !== document.path);
  return [nextRecord, ...filtered].slice(0, RECENT_TARGETS_LIMIT);
}

export function sanitizeRecentWorkspaceTargets(input: unknown): RecentWorkspaceTarget[] {
  if (!Array.isArray(input)) {
    return [];
  }

  return input
    .filter((item): item is RecentWorkspaceTarget => {
      return (
        !!item &&
        typeof item === "object" &&
        typeof (item as RecentWorkspaceTarget).path === "string" &&
        ((item as RecentWorkspaceTarget).kind === "card" || (item as RecentWorkspaceTarget).kind === "box") &&
        typeof (item as RecentWorkspaceTarget).title === "string" &&
        typeof (item as RecentWorkspaceTarget).openedAt === "string"
      );
    })
    .slice(0, RECENT_TARGETS_LIMIT);
}
EOF

cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/src/app/providers/workspace-session-context.ts' <<'EOF'
import { createContext, useContext } from "react";
import type { WorkspaceDocument, WorkspaceSessionState } from "../../domains/workspace/types";

export interface WorkspaceSessionContextValue extends WorkspaceSessionState {
  loading: boolean;
  busy: boolean;
  error: string | null;
  activeDocument: WorkspaceDocument | null;
  openDocument(path: string): Promise<void>;
  openDocumentFromDialog(): Promise<void>;
  activateDocument(documentId: string): void;
  closeDocument(documentId: string): void;
  refreshActiveDocument(): Promise<void>;
}

export const WorkspaceSessionContext = createContext<WorkspaceSessionContextValue | null>(null);

export function useWorkspaceSession() {
  const context = useContext(WorkspaceSessionContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error("useWorkspaceSession must be used within WorkspaceSessionProvider.");
  }
  return context;
}
EOF

cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/src/app/providers/WorkspaceSessionProvider.tsx' <<'EOF'
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { appConfig } from "../../../config/app-config";
import { useEditorRuntime } from "./editor-runtime-context";
import {
  buildRecentWorkspaceTargets,
  createBoxWorkspaceDocument,
  createCardWorkspaceDocument,
  createWorkspaceDocumentId,
  detectWorkspaceDocumentKind,
  sanitizeRecentWorkspaceTargets,
  upsertWorkspaceDocument,
} from "../../domains/workspace/workspace-service";
import type { WorkspaceDocument, WorkspaceSessionState } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
import { getLaunchTargetPath } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-runtime-service";
import { createEditorRouteService } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-route-service";
import { WorkspaceSessionContext } from "./workspace-session-context";

const RECENT_TARGETS_CONFIG_KEY = "editing-engine.workspace.recent-targets";

interface WorkspaceSessionProviderProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}

function getErrorMessage(error: unknown): string {
  if (error && typeof error === "object" && "message" in error && typeof (error as { message?: unknown }).message === "string") {
    return (error as { message: string }).message;
  }
  return "工作区操作失败";
}

export function WorkspaceSessionProvider({ children }: WorkspaceSessionProviderProps) {
  const { snapshot, loading: runtimeLoading } = useEditorRuntime();
  const [state, setState] = useState<WorkspaceSessionState>({
    documents: [],
    activeDocumentId: null,
    recentTargets: [],
  });
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const routeService = useMemo(
    () => (snapshot ? createEditorRouteService(snapshot.client) : null),
    [snapshot],
  );

  const persistRecentTargets = useCallback(
    async (documents: WorkspaceDocument[], recentTargets = state.recentTargets) => {
      if (!snapshot || !routeService || snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host") {
        return;
      }
      const targetDocument = documents[0];
      if (!targetDocument) {
        await routeService.setConfig(RECENT_TARGETS_CONFIG_KEY, recentTargets);
        return;
      }
      const nextTargets = buildRecentWorkspaceTargets(recentTargets, targetDocument);
      await routeService.setConfig(RECENT_TARGETS_CONFIG_KEY, nextTargets);
      setState((current) => ({
        ...current,
        recentTargets: nextTargets,
      }));
    },
    [routeService, snapshot, state.recentTargets],
  );

  const materializeDocument = useCallback(
    async (path: string): Promise<WorkspaceDocument> => {
      if (!routeService) {
        throw new Error("路由服务尚未初始化");
      }

      const kind = detectWorkspaceDocumentKind(path);
      if (!kind) {
        throw new Error("当前仅支持打开 .card 或 .box 文件");
      }

      if (kind === "card") {
        const [ast, validation, preview] = await Promise.all([
          routeService.parseCard(path),
          routeService.validateCard(path),
          routeService.renderCardPreview(path),
        ]);
        return createCardWorkspaceDocument({
          path,
          ast,
          validation,
          preview,
        });
      }

      const inspection = await routeService.inspectBox(path);
      return createBoxWorkspaceDocument({
        path,
        inspection,
      });
    },
    [routeService],
  );

  const openDocument = useCallback(
    async (path: string) => {
      if (!path || !snapshot) {
        return;
      }
      setBusy(true);
      setError(null);
      try {
        const document = await materializeDocument(path);
        setState((current) => {
          const documents = upsertWorkspaceDocument(current.documents, document);
          return {
            documents,
            activeDocumentId: document.id,
            recentTargets: buildRecentWorkspaceTargets(current.recentTargets, document),
          };
        });
        await persistRecentTargets([document, ...state.documents], state.recentTargets);
      } catch (runtimeError) {
        setError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
      } finally {
        setBusy(false);
      }
    },
    [materializeDocument, persistRecentTargets, snapshot, state.documents, state.recentTargets],
  );

  const openDocumentFromDialog = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!routeService || !snapshot || snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host") {
      return;
    }

    setBusy(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const selectedPath = await routeService.openFileDialog({
        title: "打开卡片或箱子文件",
        allowMultiple: false,
        mustExist: true,
      });
      if (selectedPath) {
        const document = await materializeDocument(selectedPath);
        setState((current) => {
          const documents = upsertWorkspaceDocument(current.documents, document);
          return {
            documents,
            activeDocumentId: document.id,
            recentTargets: buildRecentWorkspaceTargets(current.recentTargets, document),
          };
        });
        await persistRecentTargets([document, ...state.documents], state.recentTargets);
      }
    } catch (runtimeError) {
      setError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
    } finally {
      setBusy(false);
    }
  }, [materializeDocument, persistRecentTargets, routeService, snapshot, state.documents, state.recentTargets]);

  const activateDocument = useCallback((documentId: string) => {
    setState((current) => ({
      ...current,
      activeDocumentId: documentId,
    }));
  }, []);

  const closeDocument = useCallback((documentId: string) => {
    setState((current) => {
      const documents = current.documents.filter((item) => item.id !== documentId);
      const activeDocumentId = current.activeDocumentId === documentId ? documents[0]?.id ?? null : current.activeDocumentId;
      return {
        ...current,
        documents,
        activeDocumentId,
      };
    });
  }, []);

  const refreshActiveDocument = useCallback(async () => {
    const activeDocument = state.documents.find((item) => item.id === state.activeDocumentId);
    if (!activeDocument) {
      return;
    }
    await openDocument(activeDocument.path);
  }, [openDocument, state.activeDocumentId, state.documents]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!snapshot || runtimeLoading) {
      return;
    }

    let cancelled = false;

    const bootstrap = async () => {
      setLoading(true);
      try {
        if (snapshot.runtimeMode === "host" && routeService) {
          const storedTargets = sanitizeRecentWorkspaceTargets(
            await routeService.getConfig<unknown>(RECENT_TARGETS_CONFIG_KEY),
          );
          if (!cancelled) {
            setState((current) => ({
              ...current,
              recentTargets: storedTargets,
            }));
          }
        }

        const launchTargetPath = appConfig.featureFlags.enableLaunchContextRecovery
          ? getLaunchTargetPath(snapshot)
          : null;
        if (launchTargetPath && !cancelled) {
          await openDocument(launchTargetPath);
        }
      } catch (runtimeError) {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
        }
      } finally {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setLoading(false);
        }
      }
    };

    void bootstrap();

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [openDocument, routeService, runtimeLoading, snapshot]);

  const activeDocument = state.documents.find((item) => item.id === state.activeDocumentId) ?? null;

  const value = useMemo(
    () => ({
      ...state,
      loading,
      busy,
      error,
      activeDocument,
      openDocument,
      openDocumentFromDialog,
      activateDocument,
      closeDocument,
      refreshActiveDocument,
    }),
    [state, loading, busy, error, activeDocument, openDocument, openDocumentFromDialog, activateDocument, closeDocument, refreshActiveDocument],
  );

  return <WorkspaceSessionContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</WorkspaceSessionContext.Provider>;
}
EOF
]
```

**Input:**

- command:

```
[bash -lc cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/tests/unit/app.test.tsx' <<'EOF'
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { App } from "../../src/App";
import { createTranslator, normalizeLocale } from "../../src/shared/runtime/editor-i18n";
import {
  createBoxWorkspaceDocument,
  createCardWorkspaceDocument,
  detectWorkspaceDocumentKind,
  sanitizeRecentWorkspaceTargets,
  upsertWorkspaceDocument,
} from "../../src/domains/workspace/workspace-service";
import {
  createFallbackRuntimeSnapshot,
  getLaunchTargetPath,
  getVisibleThemes,
  hasTheme,
} from "../../src/shared/runtime/editor-runtime-service";

describe("App (编辑引擎应用壳层)", () => {
  it("应导出可用的 React 组件", () => {
    expect(App).toBeTypeOf("function");
  });
});

describe("editor-i18n", () => {
  it("应归一化 locale 并读取词典", () => {
    expect(normalizeLocale("en")).toBe("en-US");
    expect(normalizeLocale("zh-Hans-CN")).toBe("zh-CN");
    const t = createTranslator("en-US");
    expect(t("editingEngine.layout.workbench")).toBe("Workbench");
  });
});

describe("workspace-service", () => {
  it("应识别文档类型并更新打开列表", () => {
    expect(detectWorkspaceDocumentKind("/tmp/demo.card")).toBe("card");
    expect(detectWorkspaceDocumentKind("/tmp/demo.box")).toBe("box");
    expect(detectWorkspaceDocumentKind("/tmp/demo.txt")).toBeNull();

    const cardDocument = createCardWorkspaceDocument({
      path: "/tmp/demo.card",
      ast: {
        metadata: { name: "Demo Card" },
        structure: {},
        contentFiles: ["content/a.yaml"],
      },
      validation: {
        valid: true,
        errors: [],
      },
      preview: {
        title: "Demo Card",
        body: "<html></html>",
        contentFiles: [],
        target: "card-iframe",
        semanticHash: "hash-1",
      },
    });

    const boxDocument = createBoxWorkspaceDocument({
      path: "/tmp/demo.box",
      inspection: {
        path: "/tmp/demo.box",
        type: "full",
        cards: [{ path: "a.card", type: "internal" }],
      },
    });

    const documents = upsertWorkspaceDocument([cardDocument], boxDocument);
    expect(documents[0].id).toBe(boxDocument.id);
    expect(sanitizeRecentWorkspaceTargets([{ path: "/tmp/demo.card", kind: "card", title: "Demo", openedAt: "now" }])).toHaveLength(1);
  });
});

describe("editor-runtime-service helpers", () => {
  it("应解析启动目标路径、主题可见性与预览快照", () => {
    expect(
      getLaunchTargetPath({
        launchContext: {
          launchParams: {
            targetPath: "/tmp/demo.card",
          },
        },
      }),
    ).toBe("/tmp/demo.card");

    const themes = getVisibleThemes([
      { id: "theme-b", displayName: "Beta", version: "1.0.0", isDefault: false },
      { id: "theme-a", displayName: "Alpha", version: "1.0.0", isDefault: true },
    ]);

    expect(themes.map((item) => item.id)).toEqual(["theme-a", "theme-b"]);
    expect(
      hasTheme(
        {
          theme: {
            themeId: "theme-a",
            displayName: "Alpha",
            version: "1.0.0",
          },
          availableThemes: themes,
        },
        "theme-a",
      ),
    ).toBe(true);

    const previewSnapshot = createFallbackRuntimeSnapshot({} as never);
    expect(previewSnapshot.runtimeMode).toBe("preview");
    expect(previewSnapshot.plugin.id).toBe("com.chips.editing-engine");
  });
});
EOF]
```

- workdir: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f`

```
[bash -lc python3 <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
readme = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/README.md')
text = readme.read_text()
text = text.replace('当前阶段：已完成脚手架问题闭环，并开始阶段二“应用壳层与运行时适配”开发','当前阶段：已完成阶段二应用壳层，并开始阶段三工作区文件会话与预览链路开发')
text = text.replace('- 已落地编辑引擎阶段二基线：运行时 Provider、主题/多语言/配置接入、布局偏好持久化、Host / 预览双模式壳层。','- 已落地编辑引擎阶段二基线：运行时 Provider、主题/多语言/配置接入、布局偏好持久化、Host / 预览双模式壳层。\n- 已启动阶段三：工作区文档会话、最近目标持久化、`.card` / `.box` 文件打开与预览链路。')
text = text.replace('- `src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx` 已实现可运行的编辑引擎应用壳层；','- `src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx` 已实现可运行的编辑引擎应用壳层与工作区文件预览面板；\n- `src/app/providers/WorkspaceSessionProvider.tsx` 已建立工作区会话与最近目标治理；')
readme.write_text(text)

plan = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/开发计划/03-阶段三-核心编辑域迁移.md')
plan_text = plan.read_text()
if '## 5. 当前进展（2026-03-11）' not in plan_text:
    plan_text += '\n## 5. 当前进展（2026-03-11）\n\n- 已落地工作区文档会话 Provider，支持 `.card` 与 `.box` 两类目标文件的统一打开。\n- 已接入 `card.parse`、`card.validate`、`card.render` 预览链路与 `box.inspect` 检查链路。\n- 已接入最近目标配置持久化与启动上下文目标恢复。\n- 下一步进入：工作区文件树、设置注册中心、编辑域与命令域迁移。\n'
plan.write_text(plan_text)

tech = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/03-数据流与接口适配设计.md')
tech_text = tech.read_text()
if '### 2.3 当前已落地的工作区文件会话基线' not in tech_text:
    insert = '\n### 2.3 当前已落地的工作区文件会话基线\n\n- 当前阶段已建立 `WorkspaceSessionProvider`，负责工作区打开文档、激活文档、关闭文档、最近目标持久化。\n- 文件选择统一通过 `platform.dialogOpenFile`。\n- `.card` 文件通过原始 route 包装服务调用 `card.parse`、`card.validate`、`card.render`，生成正式预览数据。\n- `.box` 文件通过原始 route 包装服务调用 `box.inspect`，生成箱子摘要视图。\n- 最近目标通过 `config.get/config.set` 存储在 `editing-engine.workspace.recent-targets`。\n'
    marker = '### 2.2 自动保存\n'
    tech_text = tech_text.replace(marker, marker + insert)
tech.write_text(tech_text)
PY]
```

**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/domains/workspace/workspace-repository-service.ts`**

```diff
+import type { EditorRouteService } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-route-service";
+import type { WorkspaceDocument, WorkspaceRepositoryNode, WorkspaceRepositoryRoot } from "./types";
+import { detectWorkspaceDocumentKind, getFileName } from "./workspace-service";
+
+const DIRECTORY_COLLATOR = new Intl.Collator("zh-CN", {
+  numeric: true,
+  sensitivity: "base",
+});
+
+export function getParentDirectory(pathname: string): string {
+  const normalized = pathname.replace(/[\\/]+$/, "");
+  const segments = normalized.split(/[\\/]/);
+
+  if (segments.length <= 1) {
+    return normalized;
+  }
+
+  segments.pop();
+  const candidate = segments.join("/");
+  return candidate.length > 0 ? candidate : "/";
+}
+
+export function collectWorkspaceRootPaths(documents: WorkspaceDocument[]): string[] {
+  const uniqueRoots = new Set<string>();
+
+  for (const document of documents) {
+    uniqueRoots.add(getParentDirectory(document.path));
+  }
+
+  return [...uniqueRoots].toSorted((left, right) => DIRECTORY_COLLATOR.compare(left, right));
+}
+
+export function sortWorkspaceRepositoryNodes(nodes: WorkspaceRepositoryNode[]): WorkspaceRepositoryNode[] {
+  return [...nodes].toSorted((left, right) => {
+    if (left.kind === "directory" && right.kind !== "directory") {
+      return -1;
+    }
+    if (left.kind !== "directory" && right.kind === "directory") {
+      return 1;
+    }
+    return DIRECTORY_COLLATOR.compare(left.name, right.name);
+  });
+}
+
+export function findWorkspaceRepositoryNode(
+  roots: WorkspaceRepositoryRoot[],
+  nodeId: string,
+): WorkspaceRepositoryNode | null {
+  for (const root of roots) {
+    const directMatch = root.nodes.find((node) => node.id === nodeId);
+    if (directMatch) {
+      return directMatch;
+    }
+
+    const nestedMatch = findWorkspaceRepositoryNodeById(root.nodes, nodeId);
+    if (nestedMatch) {
+      return nestedMatch;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return null;
+}
+
+async function loadWorkspaceRepositoryNode(
+  routeService: EditorRouteService,
+  path: string,
+): Promise<WorkspaceRepositoryNode | null> {
+  const stat = await routeService.statPath(path);
+
+  if (stat.isDirectory) {
+    const entries = await routeService.listDirectory(path);
+    const children = await Promise.all(entries.map((entry) => loadWorkspaceRepositoryNode(routeService, entry)));
+    const visibleChildren = sortWorkspaceRepositoryNodes(children.filter(isRepositoryNode));
+
+    if (visibleChildren.length === 0) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    return {
+      id: path,
+      path,
+      name: getFileName(path),
+      kind: "directory",
+      children: visibleChildren,
+    };
+  }
+
+  const kind = detectWorkspaceDocumentKind(path);
+  if (!kind) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  return {
+    id: path,
+    path,
+    name: getFileName(path),
+    kind,
+    children: [],
+  };
+}
+
+function findWorkspaceRepositoryNodeById(
+  nodes: WorkspaceRepositoryNode[],
+  nodeId: string,
+): WorkspaceRepositoryNode | null {
+  for (const node of nodes) {
+    if (node.id === nodeId) {
+      return node;
+    }
+
+    if (node.children.length === 0) {
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    const nestedMatch = findWorkspaceRepositoryNodeById(node.children, nodeId);
+    if (nestedMatch) {
+      return nestedMatch;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return null;
+}
+
+function isRepositoryNode(node: WorkspaceRepositoryNode | null): node is WorkspaceRepositoryNode {
+  return node !== null;
+}
+
+export async function loadWorkspaceRepositoryRoots(
+  routeService: EditorRouteService,
+  rootPaths: string[],
+): Promise<WorkspaceRepositoryRoot[]> {
+  const roots = await Promise.all(
+    rootPaths.map(async (rootPath) => {
+      const entries = await routeService.listDirectory(rootPath);
+      const nodes = await Promise.all(entries.map((entry) => loadWorkspaceRepositoryNode(routeService, entry)));
+      const visibleNodes = sortWorkspaceRepositoryNodes(nodes.filter(isRepositoryNode));
+
+      return {
+        id: rootPath,
+        path: rootPath,
+        name: getFileName(rootPath),
+        nodes: visibleNodes,
+      } satisfies WorkspaceRepositoryRoot;
+    }),
+  );
+
+  return roots.filter((root) => root.nodes.length > 0);
+}
```

```diff
+export interface WorkspaceRepositoryNode {
+  id: string;
+  path: string;
+  name: string;
+  kind: WorkspaceRepositoryNodeKind;
+  children: WorkspaceRepositoryNode[];
+}
+
+export interface WorkspaceRepositoryRoot {
+  id: string;
+  path: string;
+  name: string;
+  nodes: WorkspaceRepositoryNode[];
+}

 export interface WorkspaceSessionState {

 }
```

```diff
+import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
+import { ChipsButton, ChipsEmptyState, ChipsLoadingBoundary, ChipsTree, type TreeNode } from "@chips/component-library";
+import type { WorkspaceRepositoryNode, WorkspaceRepositoryRoot } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
+import { findWorkspaceRepositoryNode } from "../../domains/workspace/workspace-repository-service";
+
+interface WorkspaceRepositoryTreeProps {
+  roots: WorkspaceRepositoryRoot[];
+  loading: boolean;
+  error: string | null;
+  activeDocumentPath: string | null;
+  emptyTitle: string;
+  emptyDescription: string;
+  retryLabel: string;
+  openFolderLabel: string;
+  onOpenDocument(path: string): Promise<void>;
+  onOpenDocumentFromDialog(): Promise<void>;
+  onRefresh(): Promise<void>;
+}
+
+function createTreeNodeLabel(root: WorkspaceRepositoryRoot | WorkspaceRepositoryNode): React.ReactNode {
+  return (
+    <span className="editor-shell__tree-label">
+      <strong>{root.name}</strong>
+      <span>{root.path}</span>
+    </span>
+  );
+}
+
+function mapRepositoryNodesToTree(nodes: WorkspaceRepositoryNode[]): TreeNode[] {
+  return nodes.map((node) => ({
+    id: node.id,
+    label: createTreeNodeLabel(node),
+    children: mapRepositoryNodesToTree(node.children),
+  }));
+}
+
+function mapRootsToTree(roots: WorkspaceRepositoryRoot[]): TreeNode[] {
+  return roots.map((root) => ({
+    id: root.id,
+    label: createTreeNodeLabel(root),
+    children: mapRepositoryNodesToTree(root.nodes),
+  }));
+}
+
+export function WorkspaceRepositoryTree({
+  roots,
+  loading,
+  error,
+  activeDocumentPath,
+  emptyTitle,
+  emptyDescription,
+  retryLabel,
+  openFolderLabel,
+  onOpenDocument,
+  onOpenDocumentFromDialog,
+  onRefresh,
+}: WorkspaceRepositoryTreeProps) {
+  const [expandedIds, setExpandedIds] = useState<string[]>(() => roots.map((root) => root.id));
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    setExpandedIds((current) => {
+      const next = new Set(current);
+      for (const root of roots) {
+        next.add(root.id);
+      }
+      return [...next];
+    });
+  }, [roots]);
+
+  const treeNodes = useMemo(() => mapRootsToTree(roots), [roots]);
+  const activeNodeId = activeDocumentPath ?? null;
+
+  const handleSelectedIdChange = (selectedId: string | null) => {
+    if (!selectedId) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const selectedNode = findWorkspaceRepositoryNode(roots, selectedId);
+    if (!selectedNode || selectedNode.kind === "directory") {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    void onOpenDocument(selectedNode.path);
+  };
+
+  if (error) {
+    return (
+      <div className="editor-shell__tree-state">
+        <ChipsEmptyState
+          ariaLabel={emptyTitle}
+          title={emptyTitle}
+          description={error}
+          actionLabel={retryLabel}
+          onAction={() => {
+            void onRefresh();
+          }}
+        />
+      </div>
+    );
+  }
+
+  if (roots.length === 0 && !loading) {
+    return (
+      <div className="editor-shell__tree-state">
+        <ChipsEmptyState
+          ariaLabel={emptyTitle}
+          title={emptyTitle}
+          description={emptyDescription}
+          actionLabel={openFolderLabel}
+          onAction={() => {
+            void onOpenDocumentFromDialog();
+          }}
+        />
+      </div>
+    );
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <div className="editor-shell__tree-panel">
+      <div className="editor-shell__tree-toolbar">
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => void onRefresh()}>
+          {retryLabel}
+        </ChipsButton>
+      </div>
+      <ChipsLoadingBoundary ariaLabel={emptyTitle} loading={loading}>
+        <ChipsTree
+          ariaLabel={emptyTitle}
+          nodes={treeNodes}
+          expandedIds={expandedIds}
+          selectedId={activeNodeId}
+          onExpandedIdsChange={setExpandedIds}
+          onSelectedIdChange={handleSelectedIdChange}
+        />
+      </ChipsLoadingBoundary>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
+import React, { useMemo } from "react";
+import {
+  ChipsButton,
+  ChipsDialog,
+  ChipsRadioGroup,
+  ChipsSelect,
+  ChipsTabs,
+  type ThemeMeta,
+} from "@chips/component-library";
+import type { EditorLayoutMode } from "../../../config/app-config";
+import type { WorkspaceDocument } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
+import type { EditorRuntimeSnapshot } from "../../shared/types/runtime";
+
+interface EditorSettingsDialogProps {
+  open: boolean;
+  onOpenChange(open: boolean): void;
+  translate(key: string): string;
+  snapshot: EditorRuntimeSnapshot;
+  visibleThemes: ThemeMeta[];
+  busyAction: "theme" | "locale" | "layout" | "refresh" | null;
+  activeDocument: WorkspaceDocument | null;
+  recentTargetsCount: number;
+  onSetTheme(themeId: string): Promise<void>;
+  onSetLocale(locale: string): Promise<void>;
+  onSetLayoutMode(layoutMode: EditorLayoutMode): Promise<void>;
+  onClearRecentTargets(): Promise<void>;
+}
+
+function SettingField(props: {
+  label: string;
+  description: string;
+  control: React.ReactNode;
+}) {
+  return (
+    <section className="editor-settings__field">
+      <div className="editor-settings__field-copy">
+        <strong>{props.label}</strong>
+        <p>{props.description}</p>
+      </div>
+      <div className="editor-settings__field-control">{props.control}</div>
+    </section>
+  );
+}
+
+function SettingMetaItem(props: { label: string; value: string }) {
+  return (
+    <div className="editor-settings__meta-item">
+      <span>{props.label}</span>
+      <strong>{props.value}</strong>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
+
+export function EditorSettingsDialog({
+  open,
+  onOpenChange,
+  translate,
+  snapshot,
+  visibleThemes,
+  busyAction,
+  activeDocument,
+  recentTargetsCount,
+  onSetTheme,
+  onSetLocale,
+  onSetLayoutMode,
+  onClearRecentTargets,
+}: EditorSettingsDialogProps) {
+  const themeOptions = useMemo(
+    () =>
+      visibleThemes.map((theme) => ({
+        value: theme.id,
+        label: `${theme.displayName} (${theme.version})`,
+      })),
+    [visibleThemes],
+  );
+
+  const localeOptions = useMemo(
+    () =>
+      snapshot.locales.map((locale) => ({
+        value: locale,
+        label: locale,
+      })),
+    [snapshot.locales],
+  );
+
+  const items = useMemo(
+    () => [
+      {
+        value: "theme",
+        label: translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.theme"),
+        content: (
+          <div className="editor-settings__section">
+            <SettingField
+              label={translate("editingEngine.settings.theme.label")}
+              description={translate("editingEngine.settings.theme.description")}
+              control={
+                <ChipsSelect
+                  value={snapshot.theme.themeId}
+                  disabled={snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host" || busyAction === "theme"}
+                  options={themeOptions}
+                  onValueChange={(nextValue) => {
+                    void onSetTheme(nextValue);
+                  }}
+                />
+              }
+            />
+            <SettingMetaItem
+              label={translate("editingEngine.settings.common.currentValue")}
+              value={snapshot.theme.displayName}
+            />
+          </div>
+        ),
+      },
+      {
+        value: "locale",
+        label: translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.locale"),
+        content: (
+          <div className="editor-settings__section">
+            <SettingField
+              label={translate("editingEngine.settings.locale.label")}
+              description={translate("editingEngine.settings.locale.description")}
+              control={
+                <ChipsSelect
+                  value={snapshot.locale}
+                  disabled={snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host" || busyAction === "locale"}
+                  options={localeOptions}
+                  onValueChange={(nextValue) => {
+                    void onSetLocale(nextValue);
+                  }}
+                />
+              }
+            />
+          </div>
+        ),
+      },
+      {
+        value: "layout",
+        label: translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.layout"),
+        content: (
+          <div className="editor-settings__section">
+            <SettingField
+              label={translate("editingEngine.settings.layout.label")}
+              description={translate("editingEngine.settings.layout.description")}
+              control={
+                <ChipsRadioGroup
+                  value={snapshot.preferredLayout}
+                  disabled={busyAction === "layout"}
+                  options={[
+                    { value: "workbench", label: translate("editingEngine.layout.workbench") },
+                    { value: "infinite-canvas", label: translate("editingEngine.layout.infiniteCanvas") },
+                  ]}
+                  onValueChange={(nextValue) => {
+                    void onSetLayoutMode(nextValue as EditorLayoutMode);
+                  }}
+                />
+              }
+            />
+          </div>
+        ),
+      },
+      {
+        value: "workspace",
+        label: translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.workspace"),
+        content: (
+          <div className="editor-settings__section">
+            <SettingMetaItem
+              label={translate("editingEngine.settings.workspace.activeDocument")}
+              value={activeDocument?.title ?? translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}
+            />
+            <SettingMetaItem
+              label={translate("editingEngine.settings.workspace.recentTargets")}
+              value={String(recentTargetsCount)}
+            />
+            <div className="editor-settings__actions">
+              <ChipsButton
+                variant="secondary"
+                disabled={recentTargetsCount === 0}
+                onPress={() => {
+                  void onClearRecentTargets();
+                }}
+              >
+                {translate("editingEngine.settings.workspace.clearRecentTargets")}
+              </ChipsButton>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+        ),
+      },
+      {
+        value: "about",
+        label: translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.about"),
+        content: (
+          <div className="editor-settings__section">
+            <SettingMetaItem
+              label={translate("editingEngine.fields.pluginId")}
+              value={snapshot.plugin.id}
+            />
+            <SettingMetaItem
+              label={translate("editingEngine.fields.version")}
+              value={snapshot.plugin.version}
+            />
+            <SettingMetaItem
+              label={translate("editingEngine.fields.environment")}
+              value={`${snapshot.platform.os} ${snapshot.platform.version}`}
+            />
+            <SettingMetaItem
+              label={translate("editingEngine.fields.sessionId")}
+              value={snapshot.launchContext.sessionId ?? translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}
+            />
+          </div>
+        ),
+      },
+    ],
+    [
+      activeDocument?.title,
+      busyAction,
+      localeOptions,
+      onClearRecentTargets,
+      onSetLayoutMode,
+      onSetLocale,
+      onSetTheme,
+      recentTargetsCount,
+      snapshot.launchContext.sessionId,
+      snapshot.locale,
+      snapshot.platform.os,
+      snapshot.platform.version,
+      snapshot.plugin.id,
+      snapshot.plugin.version,
+      snapshot.preferredLayout,
+      snapshot.runtimeMode,
+      snapshot.theme.displayName,
+      snapshot.theme.themeId,
+      themeOptions,
+      translate,
+    ],
+  );
+
+  return (
+    <ChipsDialog
+      open={open}
+      onOpenChange={onOpenChange}
+      title={translate("editingEngine.settings.title")}
+      description={translate("editingEngine.settings.description")}
+      closeButtonLabel={translate("editingEngine.settings.close")}
+    >
+      <div className="editor-settings">
+        <ChipsTabs items={items} defaultValue="theme" />
+      </div>
+    </ChipsDialog>
+  );
+}
```

```diff
+import React, { useMemo, useState } from "react";
+import {
+  ChipsButton,
+  ChipsEmptyState,
+  ChipsInspector,
+  ChipsSplitPane,
+  ChipsTabs,
+} from "@chips/component-library";
+import { appConfig } from "../../../config/app-config";
+import { useEditorRuntime } from "../../app/providers/editor-runtime-context";
+import { useWorkspaceSession } from "../../app/providers/workspace-session-context";
+import type { WorkspaceDocument } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
+import { detectWorkspaceDocumentKind } from "../../domains/workspace/workspace-service";
+import { WorkspaceRepositoryTree } from "./WorkspaceRepositoryTree";
+import { EditorSettingsDialog } from "../settings/EditorSettingsDialog";
+import { createTranslator } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-i18n";
+import {
+  getLaunchTargetPath,
+  getVisibleThemes,
+  hasTheme,
+} from "../../shared/runtime/editor-runtime-service";
+import "./editor-shell.css";
+
+function formatCapabilitySummary(capabilities: Record<string, boolean>): string {
+  const enabled = Object.values(capabilities).filter(Boolean).length;
+  const total = Object.keys(capabilities).length;
+  return `${enabled}/${total}`;
+}
+
+function InfoCard(props: { title: string; value: string; description: string }) {
+  return (
+    <article className="editor-shell__info-card">
+      <span className="editor-shell__info-label">{props.title}</span>
+      <strong>{props.value}</strong>
+      <p>{props.description}</p>
+    </article>
+  );
+}
+
+function DocumentPreview(props: {
+  document: WorkspaceDocument;
+  translate(key: string): string;
+  onRefresh(): Promise<void>;
+  onClose(): void;
+}) {
+  if (props.document.kind === "card") {
+    return (
+      <div className="editor-shell__document-stage">
+        <div className="editor-shell__preview-actions">
+          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => void props.onRefresh()}>
+            {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshDocument")}
+          </ChipsButton>
+          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={props.onClose}>
+            {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.closeDocument")}
+          </ChipsButton>
+        </div>
+        {!props.document.validation.valid && props.document.validation.errors.length > 0 ? (
+          <div className="editor-shell__error-banner">
+            <strong>{props.translate("editingEngine.documents.invalid")}</strong>
+            <ul className="editor-shell__error-list">
+              {props.document.validation.errors.map((item) => (
+                <li key={item}>{item}</li>
+              ))}
+            </ul>
+          </div>
+        ) : null}
+        <iframe
+          className="editor-shell__preview-frame"
+          title={props.document.preview.title}
+          sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-forms"
+          srcDoc={props.document.preview.body}
+        />
+      </div>
+    );
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <div className="editor-shell__document-stage">
+      <div className="editor-shell__preview-actions">
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => void props.onRefresh()}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshDocument")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={props.onClose}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.closeDocument")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+      </div>
+      <div className="editor-shell__box-summary">
+        <strong>{props.document.inspection.type}</strong>
+        <p>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.documents.boxContainsPrefix")}
+          {props.document.inspection.cards.length}
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.documents.boxContainsSuffix")}
+        </p>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
+
+export function EditorShell() {
+  const { snapshot, loading, busyAction, error, refresh, setTheme, setLocale, setLayoutMode } = useEditorRuntime();
+  const {
+    activeDocument,
+    activeDocumentId,
+    documents,
+    recentTargets,
+    repositoryRoots,
+    busy: workspaceBusy,
+    error: workspaceError,
+    repositoryLoading,
+    repositoryError,
+    openDocument,
+    openDocumentFromDialog,
+    activateDocument,
+    closeDocument,
+    refreshActiveDocument,
+    refreshRepository,
+    clearRecentTargets,
+  } = useWorkspaceSession();
+  const [settingsOpen, setSettingsOpen] = useState(false);
+  const translate = useMemo(() => createTranslator(snapshot?.locale ?? "zh-CN"), [snapshot?.locale]);
+
+  if (loading || !snapshot) {
+    return (
+      <div className="editor-shell editor-shell--centered">
+        <div className="editor-shell__loading-card">
+          <h1>{translate("editingEngine.shell.loadingTitle")}</h1>
+          <p>{translate("editingEngine.shell.loadingDescription")}</p>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    );
+  }
+
+  const launchTargetPath = appConfig.featureFlags.enableLaunchContextRecovery
+    ? getLaunchTargetPath(snapshot)
+    : null;
+  const visibleThemes = getVisibleThemes(snapshot.availableThemes);
+  const selectedDocumentKind = activeDocument ? detectWorkspaceDocumentKind(activeDocument.path) : null;
+
+  const documentTabs = documents.map((document) => ({
+    value: document.id,
+    label: document.title,
+    content: (
+      <DocumentPreview
+        document={document}
+        translate={translate}
+        onRefresh={refreshActiveDocument}
+        onClose={() => closeDocument(document.id)}
+      />
+    ),
+  }));
+
+  const inspectorSections = useMemo(
+    () => [
+      {
+        id: "document",
+        title: translate("editingEngine.inspector.document"),
+        content: activeDocument ? (
+          <dl className="editor-shell__detail-list editor-shell__detail-list--compact">
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.documentName")}</span>
+              <strong>{activeDocument.title}</strong>
+            </div>
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.documentType")}</span>
+              <strong>{selectedDocumentKind === "box" ? translate("editingEngine.documents.box") : translate("editingEngine.documents.card")}</strong>
+            </div>
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.documentPath")}</span>
+              <strong>{activeDocument.path}</strong>
+            </div>
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.documentStatus")}</span>
+              <strong>
+                {activeDocument.kind === "card"
+                  ? activeDocument.validation.valid
+                    ? translate("editingEngine.documents.valid")
+                    : translate("editingEngine.documents.invalid")
+                  : translate("editingEngine.documents.boxReady")}
+              </strong>
+            </div>
+          </dl>
+        ) : (
+          <p className="editor-shell__empty-state">{translate("editingEngine.workspace.empty")}</p>
+        ),
+      },
+      {
+        id: "session",
+        title: translate("editingEngine.inspector.session"),
+        content: (
+          <dl className="editor-shell__detail-list editor-shell__detail-list--compact">
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.pluginId")}</span>
+              <strong>{snapshot.plugin.id}</strong>
+            </div>
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.sessionId")}</span>
+              <strong>{snapshot.launchContext.sessionId ?? translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}</strong>
+            </div>
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.launchTarget")}</span>
+              <strong>{launchTargetPath ?? translate("editingEngine.values.noLaunchTarget")}</strong>
+            </div>
+          </dl>
+        ),
+      },
+      {
+        id: "runtime",
+        title: translate("editingEngine.inspector.runtime"),
+        content: (
+          <dl className="editor-shell__detail-list editor-shell__detail-list--compact">
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.locale")}</span>
+              <strong>{snapshot.locale}</strong>
+            </div>
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.fields.environment")}</span>
+              <strong>{`${snapshot.platform.os} / ${snapshot.platform.arch}`}</strong>
+            </div>
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.metrics.theme")}</span>
+              <strong>{snapshot.theme.displayName}</strong>
+            </div>
+            <div>
+              <span>{translate("editingEngine.metrics.capabilities")}</span>
+              <strong>{formatCapabilitySummary(snapshot.capabilities)}</strong>
+            </div>
+          </dl>
+        ),
+      },
+    ],
+    [activeDocument, launchTargetPath, selectedDocumentKind, snapshot, translate],
+  );
+
+  return (
+    <div className="editor-shell">
+      <EditorSettingsDialog
+        open={settingsOpen}
+        onOpenChange={setSettingsOpen}
+        translate={translate}
+        snapshot={snapshot}
+        visibleThemes={visibleThemes}
+        busyAction={busyAction}
+        activeDocument={activeDocument}
+        recentTargetsCount={recentTargets.length}
+        onSetTheme={setTheme}
+        onSetLocale={setLocale}
+        onSetLayoutMode={setLayoutMode}
+        onClearRecentTargets={clearRecentTargets}
+      />
+
+      <header className="editor-shell__header">
+        <div className="editor-shell__header-main">
+          <span className="editor-shell__eyebrow">{translate("editingEngine.shell.eyebrow")}</span>
+          <h1>{snapshot.plugin.name}</h1>
+          <p>{translate("editingEngine.shell.subtitle")}</p>
+        </div>
+        <div className="editor-shell__header-actions">
+          <ChipsButton variant="primary" disabled={snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host" || workspaceBusy} onPress={() => void openDocumentFromDialog()}>
+            {translate("editingEngine.actions.openDocument")}
+          </ChipsButton>
+          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" disabled={busyAction === "refresh"} onPress={() => void refresh()}>
+            {translate("editingEngine.actions.refresh")}
+          </ChipsButton>
+          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => setSettingsOpen(true)}>
+            {translate("editingEngine.actions.openSettings")}
+          </ChipsButton>
+        </div>
+      </header>
+
+      {snapshot.runtimeMode === "preview" ? (
+        <p className="editor-shell__preview-banner">{translate("editingEngine.values.previewMode")}</p>
+      ) : null}
+      {error ? <p className="editor-shell__error-banner">{error}</p> : null}
+      {workspaceError ? <p className="editor-shell__error-banner">{workspaceError}</p> : null}
+
+      <section className="editor-shell__hero-metrics">
+        <InfoCard
+          title={translate("editingEngine.metrics.layout")}
+          value={translate(`editingEngine.layout.${snapshot.preferredLayout === "workbench" ? "workbench" : "infiniteCanvas"}`)}
+          description={translate("editingEngine.runtime.layoutDescription")}
+        />
+        <InfoCard
+          title={translate("editingEngine.metrics.theme")}
+          value={snapshot.theme.displayName}
+          description={hasTheme(snapshot, snapshot.theme.themeId)
+            ? translate("editingEngine.metrics.themeReady")
+            : translate("editingEngine.metrics.themeFallback")}
+        />
+        <InfoCard
+          title={translate("editingEngine.metrics.capabilities")}
+          value={formatCapabilitySummary(snapshot.capabilities)}
+          description={translate("editingEngine.metrics.capabilitiesDescription")}
+        />
+        <InfoCard
+          title={translate("editingEngine.fields.openDocumentCount")}
+          value={String(documents.length)}
+          description={translate("editingEngine.runtime.openDocumentCountDescription")}
+        />
+      </section>
+
+      <div className="editor-shell__workbench">
+        <ChipsSplitPane
+          ariaLabel={translate("editingEngine.aria.workspaceSplit")}
+          defaultRatio={0.26}
+          start={(
+            <div className="editor-shell__pane editor-shell__pane--sidebar">
+              <div className="editor-shell__pane-header">
+                <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.workspace")}</h2>
+                <p>{translate("editingEngine.workspace.sidebarDescription")}</p>
+              </div>
+              <ChipsTabs
+                defaultValue="repository"
+                items={[
+                  {
+                    value: "repository",
+                    label: translate("editingEngine.tabs.repository"),
+                    content: (
+                      <WorkspaceRepositoryTree
+                        roots={repositoryRoots}
+                        loading={repositoryLoading}
+                        error={repositoryError}
+                        activeDocumentPath={activeDocument?.path ?? null}
+                        emptyTitle={translate("editingEngine.workspace.repositoryEmptyTitle")}
+                        emptyDescription={translate("editingEngine.workspace.repositoryEmptyDescription")}
+                        retryLabel={translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshWorkspace")}
+                        openFolderLabel={translate("editingEngine.actions.openDocument")}
+                        onOpenDocument={openDocument}
+                        onOpenDocumentFromDialog={openDocumentFromDialog}
+                        onRefresh={refreshRepository}
+                      />
+                    ),
+                  },
+                  {
+                    value: "recent",
+                    label: translate("editingEngine.tabs.recentTargets"),
+                    content: recentTargets.length === 0 ? (
+                      <div className="editor-shell__pane-state">
+                        <ChipsEmptyState
+                          ariaLabel={translate("editingEngine.workspace.noRecentTargets")}
+                          title={translate("editingEngine.workspace.noRecentTargets")}
+                          description={translate("editingEngine.workspace.recentTargetsDescription")}
+                        />
+                      </div>
+                    ) : (
+                      <div className="editor-shell__recent-list">
+                        {recentTargets.map((target) => (
+                          <button
+                            key={target.path}
+                            type="button"
+                            className="editor-shell__recent-item"
+                            onClick={() => void openDocument(target.path)}
+                            disabled={workspaceBusy}
+                          >
+                            <strong>{target.title}</strong>
+                            <span>{target.path}</span>
+                            <em>{target.kind === "box" ? translate("editingEngine.documents.box") : translate("editingEngine.documents.card")}</em>
+                          </button>
+                        ))}
+                      </div>
+                    ),
+                  },
+                ]}
+              />
+            </div>
+          )}
+          end={(
+            <ChipsSplitPane
+              ariaLabel={translate("editingEngine.aria.previewSplit")}
+              defaultRatio={0.68}
+              start={(
+                <div className="editor-shell__pane editor-shell__pane--preview">
+                  <div className="editor-shell__pane-header">
+                    <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.preview")}</h2>
+                    <p>{translate("editingEngine.workspace.previewDescription")}</p>
+                  </div>
+                  {documents.length === 0 ? (
+                    <div className="editor-shell__pane-state">
+                      <ChipsEmptyState
+                        ariaLabel={translate("editingEngine.workspace.noOpenDocuments")}
+                        title={translate("editingEngine.workspace.noOpenDocuments")}
+                        description={translate("editingEngine.workspace.previewEmptyDescription")}
+                        actionLabel={translate("editingEngine.actions.openDocument")}
+                        onAction={() => {
+                          void openDocumentFromDialog();
+                        }}
+                      />
+                    </div>
+                  ) : (
+                    <ChipsTabs
+                      value={activeDocumentId ?? documents[0].id}
+                      items={documentTabs}
+                      onValueChange={activateDocument}
+                    />
+                  )}
+                </div>
+              )}
+              end={(
+                <div className="editor-shell__pane editor-shell__pane--inspector">
+                  <div className="editor-shell__pane-header">
+                    <h2>{translate("editingEngine.sections.inspector")}</h2>
+                    <p>{translate("editingEngine.inspector.description")}</p>
+                  </div>
+                  <ChipsInspector
+                    ariaLabel={translate("editingEngine.sections.inspector")}
+                    defaultOpenSectionIds={["document", "session", "runtime"]}
+                    sections={inspectorSections}
+                  />
+                </div>
+              )}
+            />
+          )}
+        />
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
+body {
+  margin: 0;
+  min-height: 100vh;
+  background:
+    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(93, 135, 185, 0.18), transparent 30%),
+    linear-gradient(180deg, var(--chips-sys-color-canvas, #f4f0e8) 0%, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #fcfaf6) 100%);
+  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #1b1b18);
+}
+
+* {
+  box-sizing: border-box;
+}
+
+#root {
+  min-height: 100vh;
+}
+
+.editor-shell {
+  min-height: 100vh;
+  padding: 24px;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 20px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell--centered {
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: center;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__loading-card,
+.editor-shell__pane,
+.editor-shell__info-card,
+.editor-shell__tree-panel,
+.editor-settings {
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08));
+  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #fff) 92%, transparent);
+  box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
+}
+
+.editor-shell__loading-card {
+  max-width: 520px;
+  padding: 32px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__header {
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  align-items: flex-end;
+  gap: 20px;
+  -webkit-app-region: drag;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__header-actions,
+.editor-shell__header-actions * {
+  -webkit-app-region: no-drag;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__header-main h1,
+.editor-shell__pane-header h2 {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__header-main p,
+.editor-shell__pane-header p,
+.editor-shell__info-card p,
+.editor-settings__field-copy p {
+  margin: 0;
+  line-height: 1.6;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__header-actions {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__eyebrow {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  margin-bottom: 8px;
+  padding: 6px 10px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  background: rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.05);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__preview-banner,
+.editor-shell__error-banner {
+  padding: 12px 14px;
+  border-radius: 14px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__preview-banner {
+  background: rgba(58, 98, 144, 0.12);
+  color: #224c76;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__error-banner {
+  background: rgba(180, 48, 48, 0.12);
+  color: #8f1d1d;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__error-list {
+  margin: 8px 0 0;
+  padding-left: 18px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__hero-metrics {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
+  gap: 12px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__info-card {
+  padding: 18px;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__info-label {
+  font-size: 12px;
+  opacity: 0.72;
+  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__workbench {
+  min-height: 720px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__pane {
+  height: 100%;
+  padding: 18px;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 16px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__pane-header {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 6px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__pane-state,
+.editor-shell__tree-state {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-height: 320px;
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__tree-panel {
+  min-height: 480px;
+  padding: 12px;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 12px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__tree-toolbar,
+.editor-shell__preview-actions,
+.editor-settings__actions {
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__tree-label {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 3px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__tree-label span {
+  font-size: 12px;
+  opacity: 0.7;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__recent-list {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__recent-item {
+  border: 1px solid var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08));
+  border-radius: 14px;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
+  padding: 14px;
+  text-align: left;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 4px;
+  color: inherit;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__recent-item span,
+.editor-shell__recent-item em {
+  font-size: 12px;
+  opacity: 0.72;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__document-stage {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 14px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__preview-frame {
+  width: 100%;
+  min-height: 560px;
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08));
+  background: white;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__box-summary,
+.editor-shell__empty-state {
+  padding: 18px;
+  border-radius: 14px;
+  border: 1px dashed var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.16));
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
+}
+
+.editor-shell__detail-list {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 12px;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__detail-list div {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 4px;
+  padding-bottom: 10px;
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08));
+}
+
+.editor-shell__detail-list--compact div:last-child {
+  border-bottom: 0;
+  padding-bottom: 0;
+}
+
+.editor-shell__detail-list span,
+.editor-settings__meta-item span {
+  font-size: 12px;
+  opacity: 0.72;
+}
+
+.editor-settings {
+  min-width: min(920px, 100%);
+  padding: 18px;
+}
+
+.editor-settings__section {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 18px;
+  min-width: min(760px, 100%);
+}
+
+.editor-settings__field {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px;
+  gap: 16px;
+  align-items: start;
+}
+
+.editor-settings__field-copy {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 6px;
+}
+
+.editor-settings__field-control {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+}
+
+.editor-settings__meta-item {
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 16px;
+  padding: 12px 14px;
+  border-radius: 14px;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45);
+  border: 1px solid var(--chips-border-subtle, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08));
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 1080px) {
+  .editor-shell {
+    padding: 18px;
+  }
+
+  .editor-shell__header {
+    flex-direction: column;
+    align-items: stretch;
+  }
+
+  .editor-shell__hero-metrics {
+    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
+  }
+
+  .editor-settings {
+    min-width: 100%;
+  }
+
+  .editor-settings__section {
+    min-width: 100%;
+  }
+
+  .editor-settings__field {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 720px) {
+  .editor-shell__hero-metrics {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .editor-shell__workbench {
+    min-height: auto;
+  }
+
+  .editor-shell__preview-frame {
+    min-height: 420px;
+  }
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
+import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
+import type { EditorRouteService } from "../../src/shared/runtime/editor-route-service";
+import {
+  collectWorkspaceRootPaths,
+  findWorkspaceRepositoryNode,
+  loadWorkspaceRepositoryRoots,
+  sortWorkspaceRepositoryNodes,
+} from "../../src/domains/workspace/workspace-repository-service";
+import { createCardWorkspaceDocument } from "../../src/domains/workspace/workspace-service";
+
+function createRouteServiceFixture(): EditorRouteService {
+  const entriesByDir: Record<string, string[]> = {
+    "/workspace": ["/workspace/notes", "/workspace/cover.png", "/workspace/demo.card"],
+    "/workspace/notes": ["/workspace/notes/sub.box", "/workspace/notes/readme.md"],
+  };
+
+  const statsByPath: Record<
+    string,
+    {
+      isFile: boolean;
+      isDirectory: boolean;
+      size: number;
+      mtimeMs: number;
+    }
+  > = {
+    "/workspace/notes": { isFile: false, isDirectory: true, size: 0, mtimeMs: 1 },
+    "/workspace/cover.png": { isFile: true, isDirectory: false, size: 120, mtimeMs: 1 },
+    "/workspace/demo.card": { isFile: true, isDirectory: false, size: 320, mtimeMs: 1 },
+    "/workspace/notes/sub.box": { isFile: true, isDirectory: false, size: 640, mtimeMs: 1 },
+    "/workspace/notes/readme.md": { isFile: true, isDirectory: false, size: 48, mtimeMs: 1 },
+  };
+
+  return {
+    getConfig: async () => undefined,
+    setConfig: async () => undefined,
+    openFileDialog: async () => null,
+    listDirectory: async (dir) => entriesByDir[dir] ?? [],
+    statPath: async (path) => statsByPath[path],
+    parseCard: async () => {
+      throw new Error("not implemented");
+    },
+    validateCard: async () => {
+      throw new Error("not implemented");
+    },
+    renderCardPreview: async () => {
+      throw new Error("not implemented");
+    },
+    inspectBox: async () => {
+      throw new Error("not implemented");
+    },
+  };
+}
+
+describe("workspace-repository-service", () => {
+  it("应根据已打开文档收集唯一根目录", () => {
+    const documents = [
+      createCardWorkspaceDocument({
+        path: "/workspace/demo.card",
+        ast: {
+          metadata: { name: "Demo Card" },
+          structure: {},
+          contentFiles: [],
+        },
+        validation: {
+          valid: true,
+          errors: [],
+        },
+        preview: {
+          title: "Demo Card",
+          body: "<html></html>",
+          contentFiles: [],
+          target: "card-iframe",
+          semanticHash: "hash-demo",
+        },
+      }),
+      createCardWorkspaceDocument({
+        path: "/workspace/demo.card",
+        ast: {
+          metadata: { name: "Demo Card" },
+          structure: {},
+          contentFiles: [],
+        },
+        validation: {
+          valid: true,
+          errors: [],
+        },
+        preview: {
+          title: "Demo Card",
+          body: "<html></html>",
+          contentFiles: [],
+          target: "card-iframe",
+          semanticHash: "hash-demo",
+        },
+      }),
+    ];
+
+    expect(collectWorkspaceRootPaths(documents)).toEqual(["/workspace"]);
+  });
+
+  it("应优先目录并过滤非卡片/箱子文件", async () => {
+    const roots = await loadWorkspaceRepositoryRoots(createRouteServiceFixture(), ["/workspace"]);
+    expect(roots).toHaveLength(1);
+    expect(roots[0].nodes.map((node) => node.path)).toEqual([
+      "/workspace/notes",
+      "/workspace/demo.card",
+    ]);
+
+    const nestedNode = findWorkspaceRepositoryNode(roots, "/workspace/notes/sub.box");
+    expect(nestedNode?.kind).toBe("box");
+  });
+
+  it("应保持目录优先的稳定排序", () => {
+    const sorted = sortWorkspaceRepositoryNodes([
+      { id: "b.card", path: "b.card", name: "b.card", kind: "card", children: [] },
+      { id: "a", path: "a", name: "a", kind: "directory", children: [] },
+      { id: "a.card", path: "a.card", name: "a.card", kind: "card", children: [] },
+    ]);
+
+    expect(sorted.map((node) => node.id)).toEqual(["a", "a.card", "b.card"]);
+  });
+});
```

**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/settings/editor-settings-registry.tsx`**

```diff
+import React from "react";
+import { ChipsButton, ChipsRadioGroup, ChipsSelect, type TabsItem } from "@chips/component-library";
+import type { EditorLayoutMode } from "../../../config/app-config";
+import type { WorkspaceDocument } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
+import type { EditorRuntimeSnapshot } from "../../shared/types/runtime";
+
+interface SettingFieldProps {
+  label: string;
+  description: string;
+  control: React.ReactNode;
+}
+
+function SettingField({ label, description, control }: SettingFieldProps) {
+  return (
+    <section className="editor-settings__field">
+      <div className="editor-settings__field-copy">
+        <strong>{label}</strong>
+        <p>{description}</p>
+      </div>
+      <div className="editor-settings__field-control">{control}</div>
+    </section>
+  );
+}
+
+function SettingMetaItem(props: { label: string; value: string }) {
+  return (
+    <div className="editor-settings__meta-item">
+      <span>{props.label}</span>
+      <strong>{props.value}</strong>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
+
+export interface EditorSettingsRegistryContext {
+  translate(key: string): string;
+  snapshot: EditorRuntimeSnapshot;
+  visibleThemes: EditorRuntimeSnapshot["availableThemes"];
+  busyAction: "theme" | "locale" | "layout" | "refresh" | null;
+  activeDocument: WorkspaceDocument | null;
+  recentTargetsCount: number;
+  onSetTheme(themeId: string): Promise<void>;
+  onSetLocale(locale: string): Promise<void>;
+  onSetLayoutMode(layoutMode: EditorLayoutMode): Promise<void>;
+  onClearRecentTargets(): Promise<void>;
+}
+
+export function createEditorSettingsTabs(context: EditorSettingsRegistryContext): TabsItem[] {
+  const themeOptions = context.visibleThemes.map((theme) => ({
+    value: theme.id,
+    label: `${theme.displayName} (${theme.version})`,
+  }));
+  const localeOptions = context.snapshot.locales.map((locale) => ({
+    value: locale,
+    label: locale,
+  }));
+
+  return [
+    {
+      value: "theme",
+      label: context.translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.theme"),
+      content: (
+        <div className="editor-settings__section">
+          <SettingField
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.settings.theme.label")}
+            description={context.translate("editingEngine.settings.theme.description")}
+            control={
+              <ChipsSelect
+                value={context.snapshot.theme.themeId}
+                disabled={context.snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host" || context.busyAction === "theme"}
+                options={themeOptions}
+                onValueChange={(nextValue) => {
+                  void context.onSetTheme(nextValue);
+                }}
+              />
+            }
+          />
+          <SettingMetaItem
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.settings.common.currentValue")}
+            value={context.snapshot.theme.displayName}
+          />
+        </div>
+      ),
+    },
+    {
+      value: "locale",
+      label: context.translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.locale"),
+      content: (
+        <div className="editor-settings__section">
+          <SettingField
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.settings.locale.label")}
+            description={context.translate("editingEngine.settings.locale.description")}
+            control={
+              <ChipsSelect
+                value={context.snapshot.locale}
+                disabled={context.snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host" || context.busyAction === "locale"}
+                options={localeOptions}
+                onValueChange={(nextValue) => {
+                  void context.onSetLocale(nextValue);
+                }}
+              />
+            }
+          />
+        </div>
+      ),
+    },
+    {
+      value: "layout",
+      label: context.translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.layout"),
+      content: (
+        <div className="editor-settings__section">
+          <SettingField
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.settings.layout.label")}
+            description={context.translate("editingEngine.settings.layout.description")}
+            control={
+              <ChipsRadioGroup
+                value={context.snapshot.preferredLayout}
+                disabled={context.busyAction === "layout"}
+                options={[
+                  { value: "workbench", label: context.translate("editingEngine.layout.workbench") },
+                  { value: "infinite-canvas", label: context.translate("editingEngine.layout.infiniteCanvas") },
+                ]}
+                onValueChange={(nextValue) => {
+                  void context.onSetLayoutMode(nextValue as EditorLayoutMode);
+                }}
+              />
+            }
+          />
+        </div>
+      ),
+    },
+    {
+      value: "workspace",
+      label: context.translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.workspace"),
+      content: (
+        <div className="editor-settings__section">
+          <SettingMetaItem
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.settings.workspace.activeDocument")}
+            value={context.activeDocument?.title ?? context.translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}
+          />
+          <SettingMetaItem
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.settings.workspace.recentTargets")}
+            value={String(context.recentTargetsCount)}
+          />
+          <div className="editor-settings__actions">
+            <ChipsButton
+              variant="secondary"
+              disabled={context.recentTargetsCount === 0}
+              onPress={() => {
+                void context.onClearRecentTargets();
+              }}
+            >
+              {context.translate("editingEngine.settings.workspace.clearRecentTargets")}
+            </ChipsButton>
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      ),
+    },
+    {
+      value: "about",
+      label: context.translate("editingEngine.settings.tabs.about"),
+      content: (
+        <div className="editor-settings__section">
+          <SettingMetaItem
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.fields.pluginId")}
+            value={context.snapshot.plugin.id}
+          />
+          <SettingMetaItem
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.fields.version")}
+            value={context.snapshot.plugin.version}
+          />
+          <SettingMetaItem
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.fields.environment")}
+            value={`${context.snapshot.platform.os} ${context.snapshot.platform.version}`}
+          />
+          <SettingMetaItem
+            label={context.translate("editingEngine.fields.sessionId")}
+            value={context.snapshot.launchContext.sessionId ?? context.translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}
+          />
+        </div>
+      ),
+    },
+  ];
+}
```

```diff
 export type EditorLocale = "zh-CN" | "en-US";
+export type TranslationParams = Record<string, string | number>;
@@
 export function normalizeLocale(locale: string | null | undefined): EditorLocale {
@@
 }
 
+function interpolateMessage(template: string, params?: TranslationParams): string {
+  if (!params) {
+    return template;
+  }
+
+  return template.replace(/\{(\w+)\}/g, (match, key) => {
+    const value = params[key];
+    return value === undefined ? match : String(value);
+  });
+}
+
 export function createTranslator(locale: string) {
   const normalizedLocale = normalizeLocale(locale);
 
-  return (key: string): string => {

     const localized = readByPath(dictionaries[normalizedLocale], key);
     if (localized !== null) {
-      return localized;
+      return interpolateMessage(localized, params);
     }
 
     const fallback = readByPath(dictionaries["zh-CN"], key);
-    return fallback ?? key;
+    return interpolateMessage(fallback ?? key, params);
   };
 }
```

```
}

export function createTranslator(locale: string) {
  const normalizedLocale = normalizeLocale(locale);

  return (key: string): string => {
    const localized = readByPath(dictionaries[normalizedLocale], key);
    if (localized !== null) {
      return localized;
    }

    const fallback = readByPath(dictionaries["zh-CN"], key);
    return fallback ?? key;
  };
}
```

```diff
+# 工作区目录浏览与设置中心设计
+
+> 文档目标：冻结编辑引擎当前阶段的工作区目录浏览与运行时治理入口实现方式，避免后续编辑域迁移时再次把能力打散回壳层页面。
+
+---
+
+## 1. 设计背景
+
+阶段二完成运行时 Provider 与文档会话后，编辑引擎已经能打开 `.card` / `.box` 文件，但仍缺少两个正式能力：
+
+1. 用户需要从当前工作目录继续浏览可操作的卡片与箱子文件，而不是只能通过“打开文件”对话框单点进入；
+2. 主题、语言、布局等治理入口需要聚合到正式设置中心，而不是继续散落成壳层上的临时按钮。
+
+本设计用于冻结这两类能力的职责边界与模块位置。
+
+## 2. 工作区目录浏览
+
+### 2.1 模块边界
+
+- `src/app/providers/WorkspaceSessionProvider.tsx`
+  - 继续作为工作区会话唯一状态入口；
+  - 负责文档打开、激活、关闭、最近目标持久化；
+  - 额外负责驱动目录根路径推导与目录浏览数据刷新。
+- `src/domains/workspace/workspace-repository-service.ts`
+  - 负责根据已打开文档推导根目录；
+  - 负责调用正式文件路由生成目录树；
+  - 负责目录优先排序、过滤非 `.card/.box` 文件、节点索引查询。
+- `src/features/shell/WorkspaceRepositoryTree.tsx`
+  - 负责把目录树投影到 `ChipsTree`；
+  - 负责目录展开态、空态、错误态与点击打开行为。
+
+### 2.2 正式接口
+
+目录浏览只允许使用以下 Host 正式接口：
+
+- `file.list`
+- `file.stat`
+- `platform.dialogOpenFile`
+
+约束：
+
+- 不允许直接访问 Node / Electron 文件 API；
+- 不允许在壳层组件中散落 `client.invoke('file.*')`；
+- 点击目录树文档节点后，必须复用 `WorkspaceSessionProvider.openDocument()`，保持会话链路单一。
+
+### 2.3 根目录策略
+
+- 当前版本以“已打开文档所在目录”作为工作区根目录；
+- 多个已打开文档位于不同目录时，允许同时展示多个根；
+- 根目录下只保留：
+  - 包含 `.card/.box` 文件的目录；
+  - `.card` 文件；
+  - `.box` 文件。
+
+这样可以避免把无关文件噪音直接暴露给编辑主流程，同时维持正式目录层级关系。
+
+## 3. 设置中心注册模型
+
+### 3.1 模块边界
+
+- `src/features/settings/EditorSettingsDialog.tsx`
+  - 负责承载设置中心对话框外壳；
+  - 负责把注册表投影到 `ChipsTabs`。
+- `src/features/settings/editor-settings-registry.tsx`
+  - 作为设置面板注册表；
+  - 集中维护面板顺序、标题、描述与对应内容；
+  - 当前内置 `theme/locale/layout/workspace/about` 五类面板。
+
+### 3.2 治理动作约束
+
+设置中心中的可变治理动作必须直接走正式运行时 Provider：
+
+- 主题切换 → `theme.apply`
+- 语言切换 → `i18n.setCurrent`
+- 默认布局切换 → `config.set(editing-engine.shell.layout-mode, ...)`
+- 最近目标清空 → `config.set(editing-engine.workspace.recent-targets, [])`
+
+禁止事项：
+
+- 不允许把主题、语言、布局再复制一份本地状态作为真实来源；
+- 不允许在设置中心中直接持有 Host route 字符串；
+- 不允许把设置项硬编码在壳层页面 JSX 中。
+
+## 4. 组件库使用原则
+
+本阶段目录浏览与设置中心统一复用薯片组件库正式组件：
+
+- `ChipsSplitPane`
+- `ChipsTabs`
+- `ChipsTree`
+- `ChipsInspector`
+- `ChipsDialog`
+- `ChipsSelect`
+- `ChipsRadioGroup`
+- `ChipsButton`
+
+要求：
+
+- 优先使用组件库交互语义与状态模型；
+- 页面自身 CSS 只负责布局与视觉编排，不重新实现组件交互逻辑；
+- 主题表现始终依赖主题 token，不允许写死白底或固定亮色方案。
+
+## 5. 后续衔接点
+
+该设计完成后，后续编辑核心域可直接接入以下位置：
+
+1. 目录树选中文档 → 进入编辑上下文；
+2. 预览区标签页 → 接入编辑面板挂载点；
+3. 检查器 → 承接命令域、选中态、校验错误、保存状态；
+4. 设置中心 → 扩展编辑域与布局域治理项。
```


```

- `.card` 文件通过原始 route 包装服务调用 `card.parse`、`card.validate`、`card.render`，生成正式预览数据。
- `.box` 文件通过原始 route 包装服务调用 `box.inspect`，生成箱子摘要视图。
- 最近目标通过 `config.get/config.set` 存储在 `editing-engine.workspace.recent-targets`。

## 2.4 当前已落地的设置注册中心基线

- 设置中心采用注册中心模型，当前内置 `workspace/layout/theme/locale/runtime` 五类面板。
- 布局、主题、语言三个治理入口全部通过正式运行时 Provider 转发到 `config.*`、`theme.*`、`i18n.*`。
- 设置面板定义与展示顺序集中维护在 `settings-registry.ts`，避免壳层页面堆叠硬编码按钮。
```
