```diff
+import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
+import type { Client, CompositeNodeSelection } from "chips-sdk";
+import { ChipsButton, ChipsEmptyState } from "@chips/component-library";
+import {
+  applyConfigChange,
+  canRedo,
+  canUndo,
+  createBaseCardEditSession,
+  currentEditorConfig,
+  markSaveFailed,
+  markSaveInFlight,
+  markSavePending,
+  markSaveSucceeded,
+  redoConfigChange,
+  undoConfigChange,
+} from "../../domains/editor/editor-command-service";
+import type { BaseCardEditSession } from "../../domains/editor/types";
+import type { CardWorkspaceDocument } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
+
+interface BaseCardWorkbenchProps {
+  client: Client;
+  document: CardWorkspaceDocument;
+  translate(key: string): string;
+  onRefresh(): Promise<void>;
+  onClose(): void;
+}
+
+function getErrorMessage(error: unknown): string {
+  if (error && typeof error === "object" && "message" in error && typeof (error as { message?: unknown }).message === "string") {
+    return (error as { message: string }).message;
+  }
+  return "编辑操作失败";
+}
+
+function isUndoShortcut(event: KeyboardEvent): boolean {
+  return (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey) && !event.shiftKey && event.key.toLowerCase() === "z";
+}
+
+function isRedoShortcut(event: KeyboardEvent): boolean {
+  const key = event.key.toLowerCase();
+  if (!(event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+  return (event.shiftKey && key === "z") || key === "y";
+}
+
+export function BaseCardWorkbench(props: BaseCardWorkbenchProps) {
+  const previewFrameRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement | null>(null);
+  const editorHostRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
+  const editorFrameRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement | null>(null);
+  const saveTimerRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
+  const saveSequenceRef = useRef(0);
+  const shortcutCleanupRef = useRef<(() => void) | null>(null);
+  const sessionRef = useRef<BaseCardEditSession | null>(null);
+  const [selectedNode, setSelectedNode] = useState<CompositeNodeSelection | null>(null);
+  const [session, setSession] = useState<BaseCardEditSession | null>(null);
+  const [editorLoading, setEditorLoading] = useState(false);
+  const [editorError, setEditorError] = useState<string | null>(null);
+
+  const commitSession = useCallback((nextSession: BaseCardEditSession | null) => {
+    sessionRef.current = nextSession;
+    setSession(nextSession);
+  }, []);
+
+  const clearPendingSave = useCallback(() => {
+    if (saveTimerRef.current !== null) {
+      window.clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current);
+      saveTimerRef.current = null;
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  const selectedNodeLabel = useMemo(() => {
+    if (!selectedNode) {
+      return null;
+    }
+    return selectedNode.title && selectedNode.title.trim().length > 0 ? selectedNode.title : selectedNode.nodeId;
+  }, [selectedNode]);
+
+  const statusLabel = useMemo(() => {
+    const saveState = session?.saveState ?? "idle";
+    if (saveState === "saving") {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.saving");
+    }
+    if (saveState === "pending") {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.pendingSave");
+    }
+    if (saveState === "saved") {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.saveSucceeded");
+    }
+    if (saveState === "error") {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.saveFailed");
+    }
+    return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.idle");
+  }, [props, session?.saveState]);
+
+  const historySummary = useMemo(() => {
+    if (!session) {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.historyEmpty");
+    }
+    return `${props.translate("editingEngine.editor.undoCountPrefix")}${session.history.past.length} / ${props.translate("editingEngine.editor.redoCountPrefix")}${session.history.future.length}`;
+  }, [props, session]);
+
+  const scheduleSave = useCallback(
+    (nodeId: string, config: Record<string, unknown>) => {
+      clearPendingSave();
+      const currentSequence = ++saveSequenceRef.current;
+
+      const frame = editorFrameRef.current;
+      if (!frame) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+      if (currentSession) {
+        commitSession(markSavePending(currentSession));
+      }
+
+      saveTimerRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => {
+        const inFlightSession = sessionRef.current;
+        if (!inFlightSession) {
+          return;
+        }
+
+        commitSession(markSaveInFlight(inFlightSession));
+
+        void (async () => {
+          try {
+            const baseCard = await props.client.card.updateBaseCard(
+              props.document.path,
+              nodeId,
+              config,
+            );
+            if (currentSequence !== saveSequenceRef.current) {
+              return;
+            }
+            const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
+            if (!latestSession) {
+              return;
+            }
+
+            props.client.card.baseCardEditor.syncConfig(frame, baseCard.config);
+            commitSession(markSaveSucceeded(latestSession, baseCard));
+            setEditorError(null);
+            setSelectedNode((current) =>
+              current && current.nodeId === nodeId
+                ? {
+                    ...current,
+                    title: baseCard.title,
+                    cardType: baseCard.cardType,
+                    pluginId: baseCard.pluginId,
+                  }
+                : current,
+            );
+            await props.onRefresh();
+          } catch (runtimeError) {
+            if (currentSequence !== saveSequenceRef.current) {
+              return;
+            }
+            const message = getErrorMessage(runtimeError);
+            const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
+            if (latestSession) {
+              commitSession(markSaveFailed(latestSession, message));
+            }
+            setEditorError(message);
+          }
+        })();
+      }, 420);
+    },
+    [clearPendingSave, commitSession, props.client.card, props.document.path, props.onRefresh],
+  );
+
+  const syncEditorWithHistory = useCallback(
+    (nextSession: BaseCardEditSession) => {
+      const frame = editorFrameRef.current;
+      const config = currentEditorConfig(nextSession);
+      if (!frame || !config) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      props.client.card.baseCardEditor.syncConfig(frame, config);
+      scheduleSave(nextSession.selectedNode.nodeId, config);
+    },
+    [props.client.card.baseCardEditor, scheduleSave],
+  );
+
+  const handleUndo = useCallback(() => {
+    const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+    if (!currentSession) {
+      return;
+    }
+    const nextSession = undoConfigChange(currentSession);
+    if (nextSession === currentSession) {
+      return;
+    }
+    commitSession(nextSession);
+    syncEditorWithHistory(nextSession);
+  }, [commitSession, syncEditorWithHistory]);
+
+  const handleRedo = useCallback(() => {
+    const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+    if (!currentSession) {
+      return;
+    }
+    const nextSession = redoConfigChange(currentSession);
+    if (nextSession === currentSession) {
+      return;
+    }
+    commitSession(nextSession);
+    syncEditorWithHistory(nextSession);
+  }, [commitSession, syncEditorWithHistory]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const frame = previewFrameRef.current;
+    if (!frame) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    return props.client.card.compositeWindow.onNodeSelect(frame, (payload) => {
+      const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+      if (currentSession && currentSession.selectedNode.nodeId === payload.nodeId) {
+        setSelectedNode((current) =>
+          current
+            ? {
+                ...current,
+                ...payload,
+              }
+            : payload,
+        );
+        return;
+      }
+
+      clearPendingSave();
+      setSelectedNode(payload);
+      setEditorLoading(true);
+      setEditorError(null);
+
+      void (async () => {
+        try {
+          const baseCard = await props.client.card.getBaseCard(props.document.path, payload.nodeId);
+          const sessionState = createBaseCardEditSession(
+            {
+              ...payload,
+              title: baseCard.title,
+              cardType: baseCard.cardType,
+              pluginId: baseCard.pluginId,
+            },
+            baseCard,
+          );
+          commitSession(sessionState);
+        } catch (runtimeError) {
+          commitSession(null);
+          setEditorLoading(false);
+          setEditorError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
+        }
+      })();
+    });
+  }, [clearPendingSave, commitSession, props.client.card, props.document.path]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    shortcutCleanupRef.current?.();
+    shortcutCleanupRef.current = null;
+
+    const frame = editorFrameRef.current;
+    if (!frame) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const handleShortcut = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
+      if (isUndoShortcut(event) && canUndo(sessionRef.current)) {
+        event.preventDefault();
+        handleUndo();
+        return;
+      }
+      if (isRedoShortcut(event) && canRedo(sessionRef.current)) {
+        event.preventDefault();
+        handleRedo();
+      }
+    };
+
+    window.addEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
+
+    const bindFrameShortcuts = () => {
+      const frameWindow = frame.contentWindow;
+      if (!frameWindow) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const frameDocument = frameWindow.document;
+      frameDocument.addEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current = () => {
+        window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
+        frameDocument.removeEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
+      };
+    };
+
+    frame.addEventListener("load", bindFrameShortcuts, { once: true });
+    try {
+      if (frame.contentDocument?.readyState === "complete") {
+        bindFrameShortcuts();
+      }
+    } catch {
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current = () => {
+        window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
+      };
+    }
+
+    return () => {
+      frame.removeEventListener("load", bindFrameShortcuts);
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current?.();
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current = null;
+    };
+  }, [handleRedo, handleUndo, session?.selectedNode.nodeId]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    return () => {
+      clearPendingSave();
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current?.();
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current = null;
+    };
+  }, [clearPendingSave]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    commitSession(null);
+    setSelectedNode(null);
+    setEditorLoading(false);
+    setEditorError(null);
+    clearPendingSave();
+  }, [clearPendingSave, commitSession, props.document.id]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    let cancelled = false;
+
+    const mountEditor = async () => {
+      const host = editorHostRef.current;
+      if (!host) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      host.replaceChildren();
+      editorFrameRef.current = null;
+
+      if (!selectedNode) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+      if (!currentSession || currentSession.selectedNode.nodeId !== selectedNode.nodeId) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      setEditorLoading(true);
+      try {
+        const rendered = await props.client.card.baseCardEditor.render({
+          cardFile: props.document.path,
+          nodeId: selectedNode.nodeId,
+        });
+        if (cancelled) {
+          return;
+        }
+
+        rendered.frame.className = "editor-shell__editor-frame";
+        host.appendChild(rendered.frame);
+        editorFrameRef.current = rendered.frame;
+
+        const disposeReady = props.client.card.baseCardEditor.onReady(rendered.frame, () => {
+          if (!cancelled) {
+            setEditorLoading(false);
+          }
+        });
+
+        const disposeFatal = props.client.card.baseCardEditor.onFatalError(rendered.frame, (error) => {
+          if (cancelled) {
+            return;
+          }
+          const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
+          if (latestSession) {
+            commitSession(markSaveFailed(latestSession, error.message));
+          }
+          setEditorLoading(false);
+          setEditorError(error.message);
+        });
+
+        const disposeSynced = props.client.card.baseCardEditor.onConfigSynced(rendered.frame, () => {
+          if (!cancelled) {
+            setEditorLoading(false);
+          }
+        });
+
+        const disposeChange = props.client.card.baseCardEditor.onConfigChange(rendered.frame, (payload) => {
+          const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
+          if (!latestSession || latestSession.selectedNode.nodeId !== payload.nodeId) {
+            return;
+          }
+          const nextSession = applyConfigChange(latestSession, payload.config);
+          commitSession(nextSession);
+          scheduleSave(payload.nodeId, payload.config);
+        });
+
+        return () => {
+          disposeReady();
+          disposeFatal();
+          disposeSynced();
+          disposeChange();
+        };
+      } catch (runtimeError) {
+        if (!cancelled) {
+          setEditorLoading(false);
+          setEditorError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
+        }
+      }
+      return undefined;
+    };
+
+    let disposeEditorSession: (() => void) | undefined;
+    void mountEditor().then((dispose) => {
+      disposeEditorSession = dispose;
+    });
+
+    return () => {
+      cancelled = true;
+      disposeEditorSession?.();
+      const host = editorHostRef.current;
+      if (host) {
+        host.replaceChildren();
+      }
+      editorFrameRef.current = null;
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current?.();
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current = null;
+    };
+  }, [commitSession, props.client.card, props.document.path, scheduleSave, selectedNode]);
+
+  return (
+    <div className="editor-shell__document-stage editor-shell__document-stage--editing">
+      <div className="editor-shell__preview-actions">
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={handleUndo} disabled={!canUndo(session)}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.undo")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={handleRedo} disabled={!canRedo(session)}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.redo")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => void props.onRefresh()}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshDocument")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={props.onClose}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.closeDocument")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+      </div>
+
+      {!props.document.validation.valid && props.document.validation.errors.length > 0 ? (
+        <div className="editor-shell__error-banner">
+          <strong>{props.translate("editingEngine.documents.invalid")}</strong>
+          <ul className="editor-shell__error-list">
+            {props.document.validation.errors.map((item) => (
+              <li key={item}>{item}</li>
+            ))}
+          </ul>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+
+      <div className="editor-shell__editor-layout">
+        <div className="editor-shell__editor-column">
+          <div className="editor-shell__subpane-header">
+            <h3>{props.translate("editingEngine.sections.preview")}</h3>
+            <p>{props.translate("editingEngine.editor.previewHint")}</p>
+          </div>
+          <iframe
+            ref={previewFrameRef}
+            className="editor-shell__preview-frame"
+            title={props.document.preview.title}
+            sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-forms"
+            srcDoc={props.document.preview.body}
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div className="editor-shell__editor-column editor-shell__editor-column--panel">
+          <div className="editor-shell__subpane-header">
+            <h3>{props.translate("editingEngine.editor.panelTitle")}</h3>
+            <p>
+              {selectedNodeLabel
+                ? `${props.translate("editingEngine.editor.selectedPrefix")}${selectedNodeLabel}`
+                : props.translate("editingEngine.editor.emptyDescription")}
+            </p>
+          </div>
+
+          <div className="editor-shell__editor-status">
+            <span>{session?.baseCard.title ?? props.translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}</span>
+            <strong>{statusLabel}</strong>
+          </div>
+          <div className="editor-shell__editor-status editor-shell__editor-status--secondary">
+            <span>{historySummary}</span>
+            <strong>
+              {session?.dirty
+                ? props.translate("editingEngine.editor.dirty")
+                : props.translate("editingEngine.editor.clean")}
+            </strong>
+          </div>
+
+          {editorError || session?.error ? <div className="editor-shell__error-banner">{editorError ?? session?.error}</div> : null}
+
+          {!selectedNode ? (
+            <div className="editor-shell__pane-state">
+              <ChipsEmptyState
+                ariaLabel={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.emptyTitle")}
+                title={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.emptyTitle")}
+                description={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.emptyDescription")}
+              />
+            </div>
+          ) : (
+            <div className="editor-shell__editor-panel">
+              {editorLoading ? (
+                <div className="editor-shell__pane-state">
+                  <ChipsEmptyState
+                    ariaLabel={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.loadingTitle")}
+                    title={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.loadingTitle")}
+                    description={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.loadingDescription")}
+                  />
+                </div>
+              ) : null}
+              <div ref={editorHostRef} className="editor-shell__editor-host" />
+            </div>
+          )}
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
+import type {
+  BaseCardEditorConfigChange,
+  BaseCardEditorConfigSyncedPayload,
+  BaseCardEditorReadyPayload,
+  BaseCardEditorRenderResult,
+  BaseCardRecord,
+  Client,
+  CompositeNodeSelection,
+} from "chips-sdk";
+import type { StandardError } from "chips-sdk/src/types/errors";
+
+export interface BaseCardEditorRuntimeService {
+  getBaseCard(cardFile: string, nodeId: string): Promise<BaseCardRecord>;
+  updateBaseCard(cardFile: string, nodeId: string, config: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<BaseCardRecord>;
+  renderEditor(options: { cardFile: string; nodeId: string }): Promise<BaseCardEditorRenderResult>;
+  syncEditorConfig(frame: HTMLIFrameElement, config: Record<string, unknown>): void;
+  onEditorReady(frame: HTMLIFrameElement, handler: (payload: BaseCardEditorReadyPayload) => void): () => void;
+  onEditorConfigChange(frame: HTMLIFrameElement, handler: (payload: BaseCardEditorConfigChange) => void): () => void;
+  onEditorConfigSynced(frame: HTMLIFrameElement, handler: (payload: BaseCardEditorConfigSyncedPayload) => void): () => void;
+  onEditorFatalError(frame: HTMLIFrameElement, handler: (error: StandardError) => void): () => void;
+  onCompositeNodeSelect(frame: HTMLIFrameElement, handler: (payload: CompositeNodeSelection) => void): () => void;
+}
+
+export function createBaseCardEditorRuntimeService(client: Client): BaseCardEditorRuntimeService {
+  return {
+    getBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId) {
+      return client.card.getBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId);
+    },
+    updateBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId, config) {
+      return client.card.updateBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId, config);
+    },
+    renderEditor(options) {
+      return client.card.baseCardEditor.render(options);
+    },
+    syncEditorConfig(frame, config) {
+      client.card.baseCardEditor.syncConfig(frame, config);
+    },
+    onEditorReady(frame, handler) {
+      return client.card.baseCardEditor.onReady(frame, handler);
+    },
+    onEditorConfigChange(frame, handler) {
+      return client.card.baseCardEditor.onConfigChange(frame, handler);
+    },
+    onEditorConfigSynced(frame, handler) {
+      return client.card.baseCardEditor.onConfigSynced(frame, handler);
+    },
+    onEditorFatalError(frame, handler) {
+      return client.card.baseCardEditor.onFatalError(frame, handler);
+    },
+    onCompositeNodeSelect(frame, handler) {
+      return client.card.compositeWindow.onNodeSelect(frame, handler);
+    },
+  };
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/domains/editor/editor-save-scheduler.ts`**

```diff
+export interface EditorSaveRequest {
+  nodeId: string;
+  config: Record<string, unknown>;
+}
+
+interface EditorSaveSchedulerOptions<T> {
+  delayMs: number;
+  save(request: EditorSaveRequest): Promise<T>;
+  onScheduled?(request: EditorSaveRequest): void;
+  onBeforeSave?(request: EditorSaveRequest): void;
+  onSaved?(request: EditorSaveRequest, result: T): Promise<void> | void;
+  onSaveFailed?(request: EditorSaveRequest, error: unknown): Promise<void> | void;
+}
+
+export interface EditorSaveScheduler<T> {
+  schedule(request: EditorSaveRequest): void;
+  flush(): Promise<void>;
+  cancel(): void;
+  dispose(): Promise<void>;
+  hasPendingRequest(): boolean;
+  isSaving(): boolean;
+}
+
+function cloneConfig(config: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
+  return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(config)) as Record<string, unknown>;
+}
+
+function cloneRequest(request: EditorSaveRequest): EditorSaveRequest {
+  return {
+    nodeId: request.nodeId,
+    config: cloneConfig(request.config),
+  };
+}
+
+export function createEditorSaveScheduler<T>(
+  options: EditorSaveSchedulerOptions<T>,
+): EditorSaveScheduler<T> {
+  let timerId: number | null = null;
+  let queuedRequest: EditorSaveRequest | null = null;
+  let activeRequest: Promise<void> | null = null;
+  let disposed = false;
+
+  const clearTimer = () => {
+    if (timerId !== null) {
+      window.clearTimeout(timerId);
+      timerId = null;
+    }
+  };
+
+  const runSave = async (request: EditorSaveRequest) => {
+    options.onBeforeSave?.(request);
+    try {
+      const result = await options.save(request);
+      await options.onSaved?.(request, result);
+    } catch (error) {
+      await options.onSaveFailed?.(request, error);
+    } finally {
+      if (activeRequest) {
+        activeRequest = null;
+      }
+      if (disposed) {
+        queuedRequest = null;
+        clearTimer();
+        return;
+      }
+      if (queuedRequest) {
+        const nextRequest = cloneRequest(queuedRequest);
+        queuedRequest = null;
+        timerId = window.setTimeout(() => {
+          timerId = null;
+          activeRequest = runSave(nextRequest);
+        }, options.delayMs);
+      }
+    }
+  };
+
+  const schedule = (request: EditorSaveRequest) => {
+    if (disposed) {
+      return;
+    }
+    queuedRequest = cloneRequest(request);
+    options.onScheduled?.(queuedRequest);
+    clearTimer();
+    if (activeRequest) {
+      return;
+    }
+    timerId = window.setTimeout(() => {
+      timerId = null;
+      const nextRequest = queuedRequest ? cloneRequest(queuedRequest) : null;
+      queuedRequest = null;
+      if (!nextRequest) {
+        return;
+      }
+      activeRequest = runSave(nextRequest);
+    }, options.delayMs);
+  };
+
+  const flush = async () => {
+    clearTimer();
+    if (activeRequest) {
+      await activeRequest;
+      if (!queuedRequest) {
+        return;
+      }
+    }
+    const nextRequest = queuedRequest ? cloneRequest(queuedRequest) : null;
+    queuedRequest = null;
+    if (!nextRequest || disposed) {
+      return;
+    }
+    activeRequest = runSave(nextRequest);
+    await activeRequest;
+  };
+
+  const cancel = () => {
+    clearTimer();
+    queuedRequest = null;
+  };
+
+  const dispose = async () => {
+    disposed = true;
+    await flush();
+    cancel();
+  };
+
+  return {
+    schedule,
+    flush,
+    cancel,
+    dispose,
+    hasPendingRequest() {
+      return queuedRequest !== null || timerId !== null;
+    },
+    isSaving() {
+      return activeRequest !== null;
+    },
+  };
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
+import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
+import type { Client, CompositeNodeSelection } from "chips-sdk";
+import {
+  applyConfigChange,
+  canRedo,
+  canUndo,
+  createBaseCardEditSession,
+  markSaveFailed,
+  markSaveInFlight,
+  markSavePending,
+  markSaveSucceeded,
+  redoConfigChange,
+  undoConfigChange,
+} from "../../domains/editor/editor-command-service";
+import { createEditorSaveScheduler } from "../../domains/editor/editor-save-scheduler";
+import type { BaseCardEditSession, BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot } from "../../domains/editor/types";
+import type { CardWorkspaceDocument } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
+import {
+  createBaseCardEditorRuntimeService,
+  type BaseCardEditorRuntimeService,
+} from "../../shared/runtime/base-card-editor-runtime-service";
+
+interface UseBaseCardEditingSessionOptions {
+  client: Client;
+  document: CardWorkspaceDocument;
+  onRefresh(): Promise<void>;
+  onSessionStateChange?(snapshot: BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot): void;
+}
+
+interface UseBaseCardEditingSessionResult {
+  previewFrameRef: React.MutableRefObject<HTMLIFrameElement | null>;
+  editorHostRef: React.MutableRefObject<HTMLDivElement | null>;
+  session: BaseCardEditSession | null;
+  selectedNode: CompositeNodeSelection | null;
+  editorLoading: boolean;
+  editorError: string | null;
+  canUndo: boolean;
+  canRedo: boolean;
+  undo(): void;
+  redo(): void;
+  close(): Promise<void>;
+}
+
+function getErrorMessage(error: unknown): string {
+  if (error && typeof error === "object" && "message" in error && typeof (error as { message?: unknown }).message === "string") {
+    return (error as { message: string }).message;
+  }
+  return "编辑操作失败";
+}
+
+function isUndoShortcut(event: KeyboardEvent): boolean {
+  return (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey) && !event.shiftKey && event.key.toLowerCase() === "z";
+}
+
+function isRedoShortcut(event: KeyboardEvent): boolean {
+  const key = event.key.toLowerCase();
+  if (!(event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) {
+    return false;
+  }
+  return (event.shiftKey && key === "z") || key === "y";
+}
+
+function createSnapshot(
+  session: BaseCardEditSession | null,
+  selectedNode: CompositeNodeSelection | null,
+  editorLoading: boolean,
+  editorError: string | null,
+): BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot {
+  return {
+    selectedNode,
+    baseCardTitle: session?.baseCard.title ?? null,
+    saveState: session?.saveState ?? "idle",
+    dirty: session?.dirty ?? false,
+    undoDepth: session?.history.past.length ?? 0,
+    redoDepth: session?.history.future.length ?? 0,
+    editorLoading,
+    editorError: editorError ?? session?.error ?? null,
+    lastCommandKind: session?.lastCommand.kind ?? null,
+    lastCommandAt: session?.lastCommand.timestamp ?? null,
+  };
+}
+
+function bindEditorShortcuts(
+  frame: HTMLIFrameElement,
+  handlers: { undo(): void; redo(): void; canUndo(): boolean; canRedo(): boolean },
+): () => void {
+  const handleShortcut = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
+    if (isUndoShortcut(event) && handlers.canUndo()) {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      handlers.undo();
+      return;
+    }
+    if (isRedoShortcut(event) && handlers.canRedo()) {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      handlers.redo();
+    }
+  };
+
+  window.addEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
+
+  const bindFrameDocument = () => {
+    const frameWindow = frame.contentWindow;
+    if (!frameWindow) {
+      return;
+    }
+    const frameDocument = frameWindow.document;
+    frameDocument.addEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
+    return () => {
+      frameDocument.removeEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
+    };
+  };
+
+  let unbindFrameDocument = bindFrameDocument();
+  const handleLoad = () => {
+    unbindFrameDocument?.();
+    unbindFrameDocument = bindFrameDocument();
+  };
+
+  frame.addEventListener("load", handleLoad);
+
+  return () => {
+    frame.removeEventListener("load", handleLoad);
+    window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
+    unbindFrameDocument?.();
+  };
+}
+
+export function useBaseCardEditingSession(
+  options: UseBaseCardEditingSessionOptions,
+): UseBaseCardEditingSessionResult {
+  const runtimeService = useMemo(
+    () => createBaseCardEditorRuntimeService(options.client),
+    [options.client],
+  );
+  const previewFrameRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement | null>(null);
+  const editorHostRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
+  const editorFrameRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement | null>(null);
+  const shortcutCleanupRef = useRef<(() => void) | null>(null);
+  const sessionRef = useRef<BaseCardEditSession | null>(null);
+  const saveSchedulerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof createEditorSaveScheduler> | null>(null);
+  const disposedRef = useRef(false);
+  const selectionSequenceRef = useRef(0);
+  const [selectedNode, setSelectedNode] = useState<CompositeNodeSelection | null>(null);
+  const [session, setSession] = useState<BaseCardEditSession | null>(null);
+  const [editorLoading, setEditorLoading] = useState(false);
+  const [editorError, setEditorError] = useState<string | null>(null);
+
+  const commitSession = useCallback((nextSession: BaseCardEditSession | null) => {
+    sessionRef.current = nextSession;
+    setSession(nextSession);
+  }, []);
+
+  const flushPendingSave = useCallback(async () => {
+    await saveSchedulerRef.current?.flush();
+  }, []);
+
+  const loadSelection = useCallback(
+    async (service: BaseCardEditorRuntimeService, payload: CompositeNodeSelection) => {
+      const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+      if (currentSession && currentSession.selectedNode.nodeId === payload.nodeId) {
+        setSelectedNode((current) => (current ? { ...current, ...payload } : payload));
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const currentSequence = ++selectionSequenceRef.current;
+      await flushPendingSave();
+      if (disposedRef.current || currentSequence !== selectionSequenceRef.current) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      setSelectedNode(payload);
+      setEditorLoading(true);
+      setEditorError(null);
+
+      try {
+        const baseCard = await service.getBaseCard(options.document.path, payload.nodeId);
+        if (disposedRef.current || currentSequence !== selectionSequenceRef.current) {
+          return;
+        }
+        const nextSelection = {
+          ...payload,
+          title: baseCard.title,
+          cardType: baseCard.cardType,
+          pluginId: baseCard.pluginId,
+        };
+        setSelectedNode(nextSelection);
+        commitSession(createBaseCardEditSession(nextSelection, baseCard));
+      } catch (error) {
+        if (disposedRef.current || currentSequence !== selectionSequenceRef.current) {
+          return;
+        }
+        commitSession(null);
+        setEditorLoading(false);
+        setEditorError(getErrorMessage(error));
+      }
+    },
+    [commitSession, flushPendingSave, options.document.path],
+  );
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    disposedRef.current = false;
+
+    const scheduler = createEditorSaveScheduler({
+      delayMs: 420,
+      save: (request) => runtimeService.updateBaseCard(options.document.path, request.nodeId, request.config),
+      onScheduled: () => {
+        const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+        if (currentSession) {
+          commitSession(markSavePending(currentSession));
+        }
+      },
+      onBeforeSave: () => {
+        const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+        if (currentSession) {
+          commitSession(markSaveInFlight(currentSession));
+        }
+      },
+      onSaved: async (request, baseCard) => {
+        if (disposedRef.current) {
+          return;
+        }
+        const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
+        if (!latestSession || latestSession.selectedNode.nodeId !== request.nodeId) {
+          return;
+        }
+        const frame = editorFrameRef.current;
+        if (frame) {
+          runtimeService.syncEditorConfig(frame, baseCard.config);
+        }
+        commitSession(markSaveSucceeded(latestSession, baseCard));
+        setEditorError(null);
+        setSelectedNode((current) =>
+          current && current.nodeId === request.nodeId
+            ? {
+                ...current,
+                title: baseCard.title,
+                cardType: baseCard.cardType,
+                pluginId: baseCard.pluginId,
+              }
+            : current,
+        );
+        await options.onRefresh();
+      },
+      onSaveFailed: async (request, error) => {
+        if (disposedRef.current) {
+          return;
+        }
+        const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
+        const message = getErrorMessage(error);
+        if (latestSession && latestSession.selectedNode.nodeId === request.nodeId) {
+          commitSession(markSaveFailed(latestSession, message));
+        }
+        setEditorError(message);
+      },
+    });
+
+    saveSchedulerRef.current = scheduler;
+
+    return () => {
+      disposedRef.current = true;
+      void scheduler.dispose();
+      if (saveSchedulerRef.current === scheduler) {
+        saveSchedulerRef.current = null;
+      }
+    };
+  }, [commitSession, options.document.path, options.onRefresh, runtimeService]);
+
+  const syncEditorFromHistory = useCallback(
+    (nextSession: BaseCardEditSession) => {
+      const frame = editorFrameRef.current;
+      const config = nextSession.history.present;
+      if (!frame || !config) {
+        return;
+      }
+      runtimeService.syncEditorConfig(frame, config);
+      saveSchedulerRef.current?.schedule({
+        nodeId: nextSession.selectedNode.nodeId,
+        config,
+      });
+    },
+    [runtimeService],
+  );
+
+  const undo = useCallback(() => {
+    const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+    if (!currentSession) {
+      return;
+    }
+    const nextSession = undoConfigChange(currentSession);
+    if (nextSession === currentSession) {
+      return;
+    }
+    commitSession(nextSession);
+    syncEditorFromHistory(nextSession);
+  }, [commitSession, syncEditorFromHistory]);
+
+  const redo = useCallback(() => {
+    const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+    if (!currentSession) {
+      return;
+    }
+    const nextSession = redoConfigChange(currentSession);
+    if (nextSession === currentSession) {
+      return;
+    }
+    commitSession(nextSession);
+    syncEditorFromHistory(nextSession);
+  }, [commitSession, syncEditorFromHistory]);
+
+  const close = useCallback(async () => {
+    await flushPendingSave();
+    options.onClose?.();
+  }, [flushPendingSave]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const frame = previewFrameRef.current;
+    if (!frame) {
+      return;
+    }
+    return runtimeService.onCompositeNodeSelect(frame, (payload) => {
+      void loadSelection(runtimeService, payload);
+    });
+  }, [loadSelection, runtimeService]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    let cancelled = false;
+
+    const mountEditor = async () => {
+      const host = editorHostRef.current;
+      if (!host) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      host.replaceChildren();
+      editorFrameRef.current = null;
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current?.();
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current = null;
+
+      const currentSelection = selectedNode;
+      const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
+      if (!currentSelection || !currentSession || currentSession.selectedNode.nodeId !== currentSelection.nodeId) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      setEditorLoading(true);
+
+      try {
+        const rendered = await runtimeService.renderEditor({
+          cardFile: options.document.path,
+          nodeId: currentSelection.nodeId,
+        });
+        if (cancelled || disposedRef.current) {
+          return;
+        }
+
+        rendered.frame.className = "editor-shell__editor-frame";
+        host.appendChild(rendered.frame);
+        editorFrameRef.current = rendered.frame;
+
+        const disposeReady = runtimeService.onEditorReady(rendered.frame, () => {
+          if (!cancelled && !disposedRef.current) {
+            setEditorLoading(false);
+          }
+        });
+        const disposeFatal = runtimeService.onEditorFatalError(rendered.frame, (error) => {
+          if (cancelled || disposedRef.current) {
+            return;
+          }
+          const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
+          if (latestSession) {
+            commitSession(markSaveFailed(latestSession, error.message));
+          }
+          setEditorLoading(false);
+          setEditorError(error.message);
+        });
+        const disposeSynced = runtimeService.onEditorConfigSynced(rendered.frame, () => {
+          if (!cancelled && !disposedRef.current) {
+            setEditorLoading(false);
+          }
+        });
+        const disposeChange = runtimeService.onEditorConfigChange(rendered.frame, (payload) => {
+          const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
+          if (!latestSession || latestSession.selectedNode.nodeId !== payload.nodeId) {
+            return;
+          }
+          const nextSession = applyConfigChange(latestSession, payload.config);
+          commitSession(nextSession);
+          saveSchedulerRef.current?.schedule({
+            nodeId: payload.nodeId,
+            config: payload.config,
+          });
+        });
+
+        shortcutCleanupRef.current = bindEditorShortcuts(rendered.frame, {
+          undo,
+          redo,
+          canUndo: () => canUndo(sessionRef.current),
+          canRedo: () => canRedo(sessionRef.current),
+        });
+
+        return () => {
+          disposeReady();
+          disposeFatal();
+          disposeSynced();
+          disposeChange();
+        };
+      } catch (error) {
+        if (!cancelled && !disposedRef.current) {
+          setEditorLoading(false);
+          setEditorError(getErrorMessage(error));
+        }
+      }
+      return undefined;
+    };
+
+    let disposeEditorListeners: (() => void) | undefined;
+    void mountEditor().then((dispose) => {
+      disposeEditorListeners = dispose;
+    });
+
+    return () => {
+      cancelled = true;
+      disposeEditorListeners?.();
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current?.();
+      shortcutCleanupRef.current = null;
+      const host = editorHostRef.current;
+      if (host) {
+        host.replaceChildren();
+      }
+      editorFrameRef.current = null;
+    };
+  }, [commitSession, options.document.path, redo, runtimeService, selectedNode, undo]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    commitSession(null);
+    setSelectedNode(null);
+    setEditorLoading(false);
+    setEditorError(null);
+    selectionSequenceRef.current += 1;
+  }, [commitSession, options.document.id]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    options.onSessionStateChange?.(createSnapshot(session, selectedNode, editorLoading, editorError));
+  }, [editorError, editorLoading, options, selectedNode, session]);
+
+  return {
+    previewFrameRef,
+    editorHostRef,
+    session,
+    selectedNode,
+    editorLoading,
+    editorError,
+    canUndo: canUndo(session),
+    canRedo: canRedo(session),
+    undo,
+    redo,
+    close,
+  };
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
+import React, { useMemo } from "react";
+import type { Client } from "chips-sdk";
+import { ChipsButton, ChipsEmptyState } from "@chips/component-library";
+import type { BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot } from "../../domains/editor/types";
+import type { CardWorkspaceDocument } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
+import { useBaseCardEditingSession } from "./useBaseCardEditingSession";
+
+interface BaseCardWorkbenchProps {
+  client: Client;
+  document: CardWorkspaceDocument;
+  translate(key: string): string;
+  onRefresh(): Promise<void>;
+  onClose(): void;
+  onSessionStateChange?(snapshot: BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot): void;
+}
+
+export function BaseCardWorkbench(props: BaseCardWorkbenchProps) {
+  const editingSession = useBaseCardEditingSession({
+    client: props.client,
+    document: props.document,
+    onRefresh: props.onRefresh,
+    onClose: props.onClose,
+    onSessionStateChange: props.onSessionStateChange,
+  });
+
+  const selectedNodeLabel = useMemo(() => {
+    if (!editingSession.selectedNode) {
+      return null;
+    }
+    return editingSession.selectedNode.title && editingSession.selectedNode.title.trim().length > 0
+      ? editingSession.selectedNode.title
+      : editingSession.selectedNode.nodeId;
+  }, [editingSession.selectedNode]);
+
+  const statusLabel = useMemo(() => {
+    const saveState = editingSession.session?.saveState ?? "idle";
+    if (saveState === "saving") {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.saving");
+    }
+    if (saveState === "pending") {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.pendingSave");
+    }
+    if (saveState === "saved") {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.saveSucceeded");
+    }
+    if (saveState === "error") {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.saveFailed");
+    }
+    return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.idle");
+  }, [editingSession.session?.saveState, props]);
+
+  const historySummary = useMemo(() => {
+    if (!editingSession.session) {
+      return props.translate("editingEngine.editor.historyEmpty");
+    }
+    return `${props.translate("editingEngine.editor.undoCountPrefix")}${editingSession.session.history.past.length} / ${props.translate("editingEngine.editor.redoCountPrefix")}${editingSession.session.history.future.length}`;
+  }, [editingSession.session, props]);
+
+  return (
+    <div className="editor-shell__document-stage editor-shell__document-stage--editing">
+      <div className="editor-shell__preview-actions">
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={editingSession.undo} disabled={!editingSession.canUndo}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.undo")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={editingSession.redo} disabled={!editingSession.canRedo}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.redo")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => void props.onRefresh()}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshDocument")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => void editingSession.close()}>
+          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.closeDocument")}
+        </ChipsButton>
+      </div>
+
+      {!props.document.validation.valid && props.document.validation.errors.length > 0 ? (
+        <div className="editor-shell__error-banner">
+          <strong>{props.translate("editingEngine.documents.invalid")}</strong>
+          <ul className="editor-shell__error-list">
+            {props.document.validation.errors.map((item) => (
+              <li key={item}>{item}</li>
+            ))}
+          </ul>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+
+      <div className="editor-shell__editor-layout">
+        <div className="editor-shell__editor-column">
+          <div className="editor-shell__subpane-header">
+            <h3>{props.translate("editingEngine.sections.preview")}</h3>
+            <p>{props.translate("editingEngine.editor.previewHint")}</p>
+          </div>
+          <iframe
+            ref={editingSession.previewFrameRef}
+            className="editor-shell__preview-frame"
+            title={props.document.preview.title}
+            sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-forms"
+            srcDoc={props.document.preview.body}
+          />
+        </div>
+
+        <div className="editor-shell__editor-column editor-shell__editor-column--panel">
+          <div className="editor-shell__subpane-header">
+            <h3>{props.translate("editingEngine.editor.panelTitle")}</h3>
+            <p>
+              {selectedNodeLabel
+                ? `${props.translate("editingEngine.editor.selectedPrefix")}${selectedNodeLabel}`
+                : props.translate("editingEngine.editor.emptyDescription")}
+            </p>
+          </div>
+
+          <div className="editor-shell__editor-status">
+            <span>{editingSession.session?.baseCard.title ?? props.translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}</span>
+            <strong>{statusLabel}</strong>
+          </div>
+          <div className="editor-shell__editor-status editor-shell__editor-status--secondary">
+            <span>{historySummary}</span>
+            <strong>
+              {editingSession.session?.dirty
+                ? props.translate("editingEngine.editor.dirty")
+                : props.translate("editingEngine.editor.clean")}
+            </strong>
+          </div>
+
+          {editingSession.editorError || editingSession.session?.error ? (
+            <div className="editor-shell__error-banner">{editingSession.editorError ?? editingSession.session?.error}</div>
+          ) : null}
+
+          {!editingSession.selectedNode ? (
+            <div className="editor-shell__pane-state">
+              <ChipsEmptyState
+                ariaLabel={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.emptyTitle")}
+                title={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.emptyTitle")}
+                description={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.emptyDescription")}
+              />
+            </div>
+          ) : (
+            <div className="editor-shell__editor-panel">
+              {editingSession.editorLoading ? (
+                <div className="editor-shell__pane-state">
+                  <ChipsEmptyState
+                    ariaLabel={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.loadingTitle")}
+                    title={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.loadingTitle")}
+                    description={props.translate("editingEngine.editor.loadingDescription")}
+                  />
+                </div>
+              ) : null}
+              <div ref={editingSession.editorHostRef} className="editor-shell__editor-host" />
+            </div>
+          )}
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  );
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/tests/unit/editor-save-scheduler.test.ts`**

```diff
+import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+import { createEditorSaveScheduler } from "../../src/domains/editor/editor-save-scheduler";
+
+describe("editor-save-scheduler", () => {
+  afterEach(() => {
+    vi.useRealTimers();
+  });
+
+  it("debounces writes and only saves the latest config", async () => {
+    vi.useFakeTimers();
+    const savedTitles: string[] = [];
+    const scheduler = createEditorSaveScheduler({
+      delayMs: 420,
+      save: async (request) => {
+        savedTitles.push(String(request.config.title));
+        return request.nodeId;
+      },
+    });
+
+    scheduler.schedule({
+      nodeId: "intro",
+      config: { title: "First" },
+    });
+    scheduler.schedule({
+      nodeId: "intro",
+      config: { title: "Second" },
+    });
+
+    await vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync(419);
+    expect(savedTitles).toEqual([]);
+
+    await vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync(1);
+    expect(savedTitles).toEqual(["Second"]);
+  });
+
+  it("flushes pending work immediately", async () => {
+    vi.useFakeTimers();
+    const savedTitles: string[] = [];
+    const scheduler = createEditorSaveScheduler({
+      delayMs: 420,
+      save: async (request) => {
+        savedTitles.push(String(request.config.title));
+        return request.nodeId;
+      },
+    });
+
+    scheduler.schedule({
+      nodeId: "intro",
+      config: { title: "Flush Now" },
+    });
+
+    await scheduler.flush();
+    expect(savedTitles).toEqual(["Flush Now"]);
+  });
+
+  it("serializes in-flight saves and replays the queued latest request", async () => {
+    vi.useFakeTimers();
+    const completionOrder: string[] = [];
+    let releaseFirstSave: (() => void) | null = null;
+    const scheduler = createEditorSaveScheduler({
+      delayMs: 100,
+      save: (request) =>
+        new Promise<string>((resolve) => {
+          if (request.config.title === "First") {
+            releaseFirstSave = () => {
+              completionOrder.push("First");
+              resolve(request.nodeId);
+            };
+            return;
+          }
+          completionOrder.push(String(request.config.title));
+          resolve(request.nodeId);
+        }),
+    });
+
+    scheduler.schedule({
+      nodeId: "intro",
+      config: { title: "First" },
+    });
+
+    await vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync(100);
+    scheduler.schedule({
+      nodeId: "intro",
+      config: { title: "Second" },
+    });
+    scheduler.schedule({
+      nodeId: "intro",
+      config: { title: "Third" },
+    });
+
+    releaseFirstSave?.();
+    await Promise.resolve();
+    await vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync(100);
+
+    expect(completionOrder).toEqual(["First", "Third"]);
+  });
+});
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
@@
 - 已落地基础卡片编辑工作台 `BaseCardWorkbench`，在 `.card` 文档预览右侧挂载正式编辑器面板。
 - 已落地编辑域会话模型 `BaseCardEditSession`，统一承载选中节点、历史栈、最后保存配置、待保存配置、脏标记、保存状态和错误信息。
 - 已落地 `editor-command-service`，使用纯函数维护配置变更、撤销/重做以及保存状态流转。
+- 已将编辑会话编排从展示组件中下沉到 `useBaseCardEditingSession`，并通过 `base-card-editor-runtime-service` + `editor-save-scheduler` 固定正式适配边界。
 - 已落地自动保存主链路：编辑器配置变更 -> 防抖调度 -> `card.updateBaseCard` -> `syncConfig` 回推 -> 刷新当前预览文档。
 - 已落地撤销/重做主链路：按钮触发与 `Cmd/Ctrl+Z`、`Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+Z`、`Cmd/Ctrl+Y` 快捷键均已接入，并覆盖编辑器 iframe 与宿主窗口。
 - 已落地会话观测面：编辑面板展示当前基础卡片标题、保存状态、历史统计、脏/净状态，检查器继续展示文档 / 会话 / 运行时摘要。
@@
-- 将当前位于 `BaseCardWorkbench` 内的编辑会话编排、保存调度和快捷键绑定继续下沉为更稳定的应用层 / 领域层协作边界。
```

- `npm test` 通过
- `npm run build` 通过

当前项目状态可以这样理解：

- EditingEngine 的正式基础卡片编辑主链路已经成型：节点选中、编辑器挂载、配置变更、自动保存、撤销/重做、权威配置回推、预览刷新、检查器观测面都已落地

- 但整个“旧项目完整迁移”还没有结束，后面仍需要继续推进未迁移能力，尤其是基础卡片增删改序、编辑面板折叠/宽度治理、多文档更高层会话治理，以及更完整的 Host 联调验证

我建议下一步继续按这个顺序推进：
1. 先做编辑面板治理状态，补齐折叠、宽度、自动展开等旧项目等效能力
2. 再做基础卡片增删改序命令域，确认是否已有正式 Host/SDK 能力；如果没有，再按规则提工单
3. 最后补更强的集成测试与真实 Host 联调，验证高频撤销/重做、切文档 flush、失败恢复闭环

如果你要，我下一轮就直接继续做第 1 项。

```diff
+import type { EditorPanelState, EditorPanelWidthPreset } from "./types";
+
+export const DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE: EditorPanelState = {
+  collapsed: false,
+  widthPreset: "standard",
+  autoOpenOnSelection: true,
+};
+
+const PANEL_WIDTH_PRESET_PX: Record<EditorPanelWidthPreset, number> = {
+  compact: 360,
+  standard: 440,
+  expanded: 540,
+};
+
+function isWidthPreset(value: unknown): value is EditorPanelWidthPreset {
+  return value === "compact" || value === "standard" || value === "expanded";
+}
+
+export function sanitizeEditorPanelState(input: unknown): EditorPanelState {
+  if (!input || typeof input !== "object" || Array.isArray(input)) {
+    return { ...DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE };
+  }
+
+  const candidate = input as Partial<EditorPanelState>;
+  return {
+    collapsed: candidate.collapsed === true,
+    widthPreset: isWidthPreset(candidate.widthPreset)
+      ? candidate.widthPreset
+      : DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE.widthPreset,
+    autoOpenOnSelection:
+      typeof candidate.autoOpenOnSelection === "boolean"
+        ? candidate.autoOpenOnSelection
+        : DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE.autoOpenOnSelection,
+  };
+}
+
+export function getEditorPanelWidthPx(widthPreset: EditorPanelWidthPreset): number {
+  return PANEL_WIDTH_PRESET_PX[widthPreset];
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-03-11 13:20:30Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/app/providers/editor-panel-context.ts`**

```diff
+import { createContext, useContext } from "react";
+import type { EditorPanelState, EditorPanelWidthPreset } from "../../domains/editor-panel/types";
+
+export interface EditorPanelContextValue {
+  state: EditorPanelState;
+  loading: boolean;
+  busy: boolean;
+  error: string | null;
+  setCollapsed(collapsed: boolean): Promise<void>;
+  toggleCollapsed(): Promise<void>;
+  setWidthPreset(widthPreset: EditorPanelWidthPreset): Promise<void>;
+  setAutoOpenOnSelection(enabled: boolean): Promise<void>;
+  openForSelection(): Promise<void>;
+}
+
+export const EditorPanelContext = createContext<EditorPanelContextValue | null>(null);
+
+export function useEditorPanel() {
+  const context = useContext(EditorPanelContext);
+  if (!context) {
+    throw new Error("useEditorPanel must be used within EditorPanelProvider.");
+  }
+  return context;
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-03-11 13:21:16Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/app/providers/EditorPanelProvider.tsx`**

```diff
+import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
+import { appConfig } from "../../../config/app-config";
+import {
+  DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE,
+  sanitizeEditorPanelState,
+} from "../../domains/editor-panel/editor-panel-state-service";
+import type { EditorPanelState, EditorPanelWidthPreset } from "../../domains/editor-panel/types";
+import { createEditorRouteService } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-route-service";
+import { EditorPanelContext } from "./editor-panel-context";
+import { useEditorRuntime } from "./editor-runtime-context";
+
+interface EditorPanelProviderProps {
+  children: React.ReactNode;
+}
+
+function getErrorMessage(error: unknown): string {
+  if (error && typeof error === "object" && "message" in error && typeof (error as { message?: unknown }).message === "string") {
+    return (error as { message: string }).message;
+  }
+  return "编辑面板状态更新失败";
+}
+
+export function EditorPanelProvider({ children }: EditorPanelProviderProps) {
+  const { snapshot, loading: runtimeLoading } = useEditorRuntime();
+  const [state, setState] = useState<EditorPanelState>(DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE);
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);
+  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
+  const stateRef = useRef(state);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    stateRef.current = state;
+  }, [state]);
+
+  const routeService = useMemo(
+    () => (snapshot ? createEditorRouteService(snapshot.client) : null),
+    [snapshot],
+  );
+
+  const persistState = useCallback(
+    async (nextState: EditorPanelState) => {
+      setState(nextState);
+      stateRef.current = nextState;
+      setError(null);
+
+      if (!snapshot || snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host" || !routeService) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      setBusy(true);
+      try {
+        await routeService.setConfig(appConfig.configKeys.editorPanelState, nextState);
+      } catch (runtimeError) {
+        setError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
+      } finally {
+        setBusy(false);
+      }
+    },
+    [routeService, snapshot],
+  );
+
+  const patchState = useCallback(
+    async (patch: Partial<EditorPanelState>) => {
+      await persistState({
+        ...stateRef.current,
+        ...patch,
+      });
+    },
+    [persistState],
+  );
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!snapshot || runtimeLoading) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    let cancelled = false;
+
+    const bootstrap = async () => {
+      setLoading(true);
+      setError(null);
+      try {
+        if (snapshot.runtimeMode !== "host" || !routeService) {
+          if (!cancelled) {
+            setState(DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE);
+          }
+          return;
+        }
+
+        const stored = await routeService.getConfig<EditorPanelState>(appConfig.configKeys.editorPanelState);
+        if (!cancelled) {
+          setState(sanitizeEditorPanelState(stored));
+        }
+      } catch (runtimeError) {
+        if (!cancelled) {
+          setState(DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE);
+          setError(getErrorMessage(runtimeError));
+        }
+      } finally {
+        if (!cancelled) {
+          setLoading(false);
+        }
+      }
+    };
+
+    void bootstrap();
+
+    return () => {
+      cancelled = true;
+    };
+  }, [routeService, runtimeLoading, snapshot]);
+
+  const value = useMemo(
+    () => ({
+      state,
+      loading,
+      busy,
+      error,
+      setCollapsed(collapsed: boolean) {
+        return patchState({ collapsed });
+      },
+      toggleCollapsed() {
+        return patchState({ collapsed: !stateRef.current.collapsed });
+      },
+      setWidthPreset(widthPreset: EditorPanelWidthPreset) {
+        return patchState({ widthPreset, collapsed: false });
+      },
+      setAutoOpenOnSelection(enabled: boolean) {
+        return patchState({ autoOpenOnSelection: enabled });
+      },
+      async openForSelection() {
+        if (!stateRef.current.autoOpenOnSelection || !stateRef.current.collapsed) {
+          return;
+        }
+        await patchState({ collapsed: false });
+      },
+    }),
+    [busy, error, loading, patchState, state],
+  );
+
+  return <EditorPanelContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</EditorPanelContext.Provider>;
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/settings/panels/EditorPanelSettingsPanel.tsx`**

```diff
+import React from "react";
+import { ChipsCardShell, ChipsRadioGroup, ChipsSwitch } from "@chips/component-library";
+import { useEditorPanel } from "../../../app/providers/editor-panel-context";
+import { useEditorRuntime } from "../../../app/providers/editor-runtime-context";
+import { useEditorTranslation } from "../../../shared/runtime/use-editor-translation";
+
+export function EditorPanelSettingsPanel() {
+  const { snapshot } = useEditorRuntime();
+  const { state, busy, error, setCollapsed, setWidthPreset, setAutoOpenOnSelection } = useEditorPanel();
+  const translate = useEditorTranslation(snapshot?.locale);
+
+  return (
+    <ChipsCardShell title={translate("editingEngine.settings.categories.editor.title")}>
+      <div className="settings-center__panel-stack">
+        <p>{translate("editingEngine.settings.categories.editor.description")}</p>
+        {error ? <p className="editor-shell__error-banner">{error}</p> : null}
+        <div className="settings-center__field-stack">
+          <section className="settings-center__field-block">
+            <strong>{translate("editingEngine.settings.editor.visibilityLabel")}</strong>
+            <p>{translate("editingEngine.settings.editor.visibilityDescription")}</p>
+            <ChipsSwitch
+              checked={!state.collapsed}
+              disabled={busy}
+              label={translate(state.collapsed ? "editingEngine.values.panelCollapsed" : "editingEngine.values.panelExpanded")}
+              onCheckedChange={(nextValue) => {
+                void setCollapsed(!nextValue);
+              }}
+            />
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="settings-center__field-block">
+            <strong>{translate("editingEngine.settings.editor.widthLabel")}</strong>
+            <p>{translate("editingEngine.settings.editor.widthDescription")}</p>
+            <ChipsRadioGroup
+              value={state.widthPreset}
+              disabled={busy}
+              options={[
+                { value: "compact", label: translate("editingEngine.panelWidth.compact") },
+                { value: "standard", label: translate("editingEngine.panelWidth.standard") },
+                { value: "expanded", label: translate("editingEngine.panelWidth.expanded") },
+              ]}
+              onValueChange={(nextValue) => {
+                void setWidthPreset(nextValue as "compact" | "standard" | "expanded");
+              }}
+            />
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="settings-center__field-block">
+            <strong>{translate("editingEngine.settings.editor.autoOpenLabel")}</strong>
+            <p>{translate("editingEngine.settings.editor.autoOpenDescription")}</p>
+            <ChipsSwitch
+              checked={state.autoOpenOnSelection}
+              disabled={busy}
+              label={translate("editingEngine.settings.editor.autoOpenLabel")}
+              onCheckedChange={(nextValue) => {
+                void setAutoOpenOnSelection(nextValue);
+              }}
+            />
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    </ChipsCardShell>
+  );
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-03-11 13:26:03Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell"><details>

```
        },
        'inspector': {'editing': '编辑会话'},
        'editorState': {
            'idle': '等待编辑',
            'pending': '准备保存',
            'saving': '正在保存',
            'saved': '已保存',
            'error': '保存失败',

            'compact': '窄面板',
            'standard': '标准面板',
            'expanded': '宽面板',

    'en-US': {
        'actions': {
            'collapseEditorPanel': 'Collapse panel',
            'expandEditorPanel': 'Expand panel',
            'panelWidthCompact': 'Compact',
            'panelWidthStandard': 'Standard',
            'panelWidthExpanded': 'Expanded',
        },
        'fields': {
            'editorPanelState': 'Panel state',
            'editorPanelWidth': 'Panel width',
        },
        'values': {
            'panelCollapsed': 'Collapsed',
            'panelExpanded': 'Expanded',
        },
        'settings_tabs': {'editor': 'Editor'},
        'settings_categories': {
            'editor': {
                'title': 'Editor panel',
                'description': 'Govern the editor panel visibility, width, and auto-open behavior when a base card is selected.',
            }
        },
        'settings_editor': {
            'visibilityLabel': 'Panel visibility',
            'visibilityDescription': 'Control whether the right-side editor panel stays expanded or collapsed by default.',
            'widthLabel': 'Panel width',
            'widthDescription': 'Switch the editor panel width through formal workbench governance state.',
            'autoOpenLabel': 'Auto-open on selection',
            'autoOpenDescription': 'When enabled, selecting a base card in preview expands the editor panel automatically.',
        },
        'inspector': {'editing': 'Editing session'},
        'editorState': {
            'idle': 'Idle',
            'pending': 'Pending save',
            'saving': 'Saving',
            'saved': 'Saved',
            'error': 'Save failed',
        },
        'panelWidth': {
            'compact': 'Compact panel',
            'standard': 'Standard panel',
            'expanded': 'Expanded panel',
        },
    },
}

for locale, data_updates in updates.items():
    path = Path(f'Chips-EditingEngine/i18n/{locale}.json')
    data = json.loads(path.read_text())
    root = data['editingEngine']
    root.setdefault('actions', {}).update(data_updates['actions'])
    root.setdefault('fields', {}).update(data_updates['fields'])
    root.setdefault('values', {}).update(data_updates['values'])
    root.setdefault('inspector', {}).update(data_updates['inspector'])
    root['editorState'] = data_updates['editorState']
    root['panelWidth'] = data_updates['panelWidth']
    settings = root.setdefault('settings', {})
    settings.setdefault('tabs', {}).update(data_updates['settings_tabs'])
    settings.setdefault('categories', {}).update(data_updates['settings_categories'])
    settings['editor'] = data_updates['settings_editor']
    path.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n')
PY]
```

```diff
+import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
+import {
+  DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE,
+  getEditorPanelWidthPx,
+  sanitizeEditorPanelState,
+} from "../../src/domains/editor-panel/editor-panel-state-service";
+
+describe("editor-panel-state-service", () => {
+  it("returns defaults for invalid state payloads", () => {
+    expect(sanitizeEditorPanelState(null)).toEqual(DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE);
+    expect(sanitizeEditorPanelState("invalid")).toEqual(DEFAULT_EDITOR_PANEL_STATE);
+  });
+
+  it("sanitizes persisted state and drops unsupported values", () => {
+    expect(
+      sanitizeEditorPanelState({
+        collapsed: true,
+        widthPreset: "expanded",
+        autoOpenOnSelection: false,
+      }),
+    ).toEqual({
+      collapsed: true,
+      widthPreset: "expanded",
+      autoOpenOnSelection: false,
+    });
+
+    expect(
+      sanitizeEditorPanelState({
+        collapsed: false,
+        widthPreset: "giant",
+        autoOpenOnSelection: "yes",
+      }),
+    ).toEqual({
+      collapsed: false,
+      widthPreset: "standard",
+      autoOpenOnSelection: true,
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("maps width presets to stable panel widths", () => {
+    expect(getEditorPanelWidthPx("compact")).toBe(360);
+    expect(getEditorPanelWidthPx("standard")).toBe(440);
+    expect(getEditorPanelWidthPx("expanded")).toBe(540);
+  });
+});
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/开发计划/03-阶段三-核心编辑域迁移.md`**

```diff
@@
 - 已落地编辑域会话模型 `BaseCardEditSession`，统一承载选中节点、历史栈、最后保存配置、待保存配置、脏标记、保存状态和错误信息。
 - 已落地 `editor-command-service`，使用纯函数维护配置变更、撤销/重做以及保存状态流转。
 - 已将编辑会话编排从展示组件中下沉到 `useBaseCardEditingSession`，并通过 `base-card-editor-runtime-service` + `editor-save-scheduler` 固定正式适配边界。
 - 已落地自动保存主链路：编辑器配置变更 -> 防抖调度 -> `card.updateBaseCard` -> `syncConfig` 回推 -> 刷新当前预览文档。
 - 已落地撤销/重做主链路：按钮触发与 `Cmd/Ctrl+Z`、`Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+Z`、`Cmd/Ctrl+Y` 快捷键均已接入，并覆盖编辑器 iframe 与宿主窗口。
```

```diff
@@
 ---
 
+- 工单编号：工单030-EDITING-ENGINE-COMPOSITE-STRUCTURE-MUTATION-CONTRACT-GAP
+- 日期：2026-03-11
+- 发现阶段：编辑引擎阶段三 / 基础卡片增删改序与锁定态迁移前契约核对
+- 问题类型：生态架构契约 / Host-SDK 复合卡片结构写入能力缺失 / 编辑模式治理能力缺失
+- 问题描述：
+  - 根据旧项目需求基线 `归档/Chips-Editor/需求文档/02-功能需求.md`，编辑引擎后续必须迁移的正式能力包括：
+    - `FR-046` 添加基础卡片：通过微内核 `card.add_base_card`
+    - `FR-047` 删除基础卡片：通过微内核 `card.remove_base_card`
+    - `FR-048` 调整基础卡片顺序：通过微内核更新复合卡片结构并自动保存
+    - `FR-049` 编辑模式/查看模式切换：锁定按钮或快捷键切换，并保存状态
+  - 当前生态正式文档与代码复核结果显示，Host / SDK 已冻结的卡片正式能力仅覆盖：
+    - `card.parse`
+    - `card.getBaseCard`
+    - `card.render`
+    - `card.renderBaseCardEditor`
+    - `card.updateBaseCard`
+    - `card.validate`
+  - `生态共用技术文档/架构设计/薯片生态-架构设计手册.md` 当前对 `card` 域的架构手册口径仍是 `parse/render/validate`；
+  - `生态共用技术文档/插件开发/08-SDK使用指南.md` 也只公开 `getBaseCard/updateBaseCard` 这一“单个基础卡片配置编辑”闭环，没有新增、删除、重排基础卡片或锁定态切换的正式接口；
+  - `Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-host-services.ts`、`Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-schemas.ts`、`Chips-SDK/src/contracts/route-manifest.json` 中未发现 `card.addBaseCard`、`card.removeBaseCard`、`card.reorderBaseCard`、`card.setLockState`、`card.setViewMode` 等正式 route；
+  - `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts` 当前也只具备基础卡片读取、渲染、编辑器挂载和 `updateBaseCard` 写回能力，未见复合卡片结构级增删改序或锁定态写入服务。
+- 影响范围：
+  - `Chips-EditingEngine` 无法按正式生态架构继续迁移“基础卡片增删改序命令域”和“查看/编辑锁定态切换”；
+  - 若继续开发，只能在应用层私改 `.card/.card/structure.yaml`、私设锁定字段或发明前端局部协议，违反“不允许临时开发、必须走正式契约”的仓库规则；
+  - 编辑引擎阶段三剩余核心能力会被阻断，无法安全进入完整交付。
+- 复现步骤：
+  1. 阅读 `归档/Chips-Editor/需求文档/02-功能需求.md` 的 `FR-046`、`FR-047`、`FR-048`、`FR-049`，确认旧项目已有“添加/删除/重排基础卡片 + 锁定态切换”正式业务目标。
+  2. 阅读 `Chips-EditingEngine/需求文档/02-功能需求与旧项目迁移矩阵.md`，确认这些能力仍属于当前迁移范围，且尚未完成。
+  3. 检查 `生态共用技术文档/架构设计/薯片生态-架构设计手册.md`、`生态共用技术文档/插件开发/08-SDK使用指南.md`、`生态共用技术文档/插件开发/03-卡片插件开发.md`，确认当前共享正式能力只闭环到 `updateBaseCard`。
+  4. 检查 `Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-host-services.ts`、`Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-schemas.ts`、`Chips-SDK/src/contracts/route-manifest.json`，确认不存在复合卡片结构级增删改序和锁定态治理的正式 route。
+  5. 检查 `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts`，确认 Host 当前未提供上述结构写入服务实现。
+- 期望行为：
+  - 生态需要先补齐并冻结复合卡片结构编辑正式契约，至少明确：
+    - 添加基础卡片的输入参数、插入位置表达、ID 生成责任边界；
+    - 删除基础卡片的确认与写回契约；
+    - 调整基础卡片顺序的正式结构更新接口；
+    - 结构变更后的预览刷新、自动保存、撤销/重做协作边界；
+    - 查看/编辑模式或锁定态的正式数据模型、持久化字段、事件与路由；
+    - 这些动作与 Host、SDK、编辑引擎、基础卡片插件之间的职责分工。
+- 暂行处理：
+  - 已记录工单，并停止继续推进“基础卡片增删改序 / 锁定态切换”这条开发线。
+  - 不采用应用端直接改写 `.card` 包内容、私设结构协议、仅做前端假状态或其他临时开发方案。
+- 需要协作方：生态架构契约维护方、`Chips-Host` 维护方、`Chips-SDK` 维护方、卡片文件格式与编辑协议维护方、编辑引擎项目维护方
+- 状态：待处理

 - 日期：2026-03-11
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/项目日志与笔记/工单030-EDITING-ENGINE-COMPOSITE-STRUCTURE-MUTATION-CONTRACT-GAP/任务说明.md`**

```diff
+# 工单030：编辑引擎复合卡片结构编辑与锁定态正式契约缺失
+
+## 1. 背景
+
+`Chips-EditingEngine` 阶段三当前已经正式落地：
+
+- 工作区文档会话；
+- 工作区目录浏览；
+- 设置中心；
+- 基础卡片选中；
+- 基础卡片编辑器挂载；
+- `card.getBaseCard / card.renderBaseCardEditor / card.updateBaseCard` 基础配置编辑闭环；
+- 自动保存、撤销 / 重做、编辑面板治理状态。
+
+按迁移计划，下一步本应继续迁移旧项目中已经存在的以下核心能力：
+
+1. 复合卡片内添加基础卡片；
+2. 删除基础卡片；
+3. 调整基础卡片顺序；
+4. 查看模式 / 编辑模式（锁定态）切换。
+
+在正式进入实现前，对生态共享文档、Host、SDK、当前项目文档进行了契约复核。
+
+## 2. 旧项目基线要求
+
+`归档/Chips-Editor/需求文档/02-功能需求.md` 明确给出：
+
+### 2.1 FR-046 添加基础卡片
+
+- 通过微内核生成 ID；
+- 通过微内核 `card.add_base_card` 添加；
+- 创建配置文件；
+- 更新复合卡片结构；
+- 自动保存；
+- 触发 `base-card:added`。
+
+### 2.2 FR-047 删除基础卡片
+
+- 确认后通过微内核 `card.remove_base_card` 删除；
+- 从复合卡片结构中移除；
+- 删除配置文件；
+- 自动保存；
+- 触发 `base-card:removed`。
+
+### 2.3 FR-048 调整基础卡片顺序
+
+- 拖动基础卡片调整顺序；
+- 通过微内核更新复合卡片结构；
+- 自动保存新顺序；
+- 触发 `base-card:reordered`。
+
+### 2.4 FR-049 编辑模式切换
+
+- 支持编辑模式 / 查看模式；
+- 通过锁定按钮、快捷键、右键菜单切换；
+- 切换状态需要保存。
+
+这些都不是可选优化项，而是旧项目上层正确能力的一部分。
+
+## 3. 当前生态正式能力复核结果
+
+### 3.1 共享正式文档当前只闭环到“单个基础卡片配置编辑”
+
+从以下正式文档可确认：
+
+- `生态共用技术文档/架构设计/薯片生态-架构设计手册.md`
+- `生态共用技术文档/插件开发/08-SDK使用指南.md`
+- `生态共用技术文档/插件开发/03-卡片插件开发.md`
+
+当前被共享文档明确冻结或公开的卡片正式能力主要是：
+
+- `card.parse`
+- `card.getBaseCard`
+- `card.render`
+- `card.renderBaseCardEditor`
+- `card.updateBaseCard`
+- `card.validate`
+
+其中 `updateBaseCard` 的语义是：
+
+- 针对已经存在的某个基础卡片节点；
+- 回写该节点的标准化配置；
+- 不涉及复合卡片结构级的新增、删除、重排；
+- 不涉及查看模式 / 编辑模式或锁定态治理。
+
+### 3.2 Host / SDK 当前未公开结构编辑或锁定态治理 route
+
+核对结果：
+
+- `Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-host-services.ts`
+- `Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-schemas.ts`
+- `Chips-SDK/src/contracts/route-manifest.json`
+
+当前未发现以下正式接口：
+
+- `card.addBaseCard`
+- `card.removeBaseCard`
+- `card.reorderBaseCard`
+- `card.insertBaseCard`
+- `card.setLockState`
+- `card.setEditMode`
+- `card.setViewMode`
+- 其他等价的复合卡片结构写入或锁定态治理 route
+
+### 3.3 Host 卡片服务当前也没有对应服务实现
+
+核对：
+
+- `Chips-Host/packages/card-service/src/card-service.ts`
+
+当前 Host 卡片服务已具备：
+
+- 读取卡片 AST；
+- 渲染卡片；
+- 读取指定基础卡片；
+- 生成基础卡片编辑器 iframe；
+- 回写指定基础卡片配置。
+
+但未见：
+
+- 新建基础卡片节点并更新 `.card/structure.yaml`；
+- 删除基础卡片节点并同步删除内容文件；
+- 以正式事务方式重排基础卡片顺序；
+- 保存查看/编辑模式或锁定态。
+
+## 4. 为什么这是阻断问题
+
+编辑引擎不能直接采用以下方案继续推进：
+
+1. 应用端私自解压 `.card` 包并改写 `.card/structure.yaml`；
+2. 应用端自行决定新增节点 ID 生成、结构插入位置和内容文件命名规则；
+3. 应用端私设 `locked`、`mode` 等字段写回元数据或结构文件；
+4. 只做前端内存态拖拽排序和锁定按钮，而不走正式 Host 写入链路；
+5. 自行约定未在共享文档中冻结的事件名或 SDK 调用方式。
+
+上述做法都属于：
+
+- 临时开发；
+- 私有契约；
+- 绕过 Host/SDK 正式边界；
+- 会污染后续生态统一架构。
+
+因此，在生态先补齐正式契约前，编辑引擎不能继续推进这条开发线。
+
+## 5. 需要生态补齐的正式能力
+
+建议先补齐并冻结以下能力，再恢复 EditingEngine 相关开发：
+
+### 5.1 复合卡片结构编辑接口
+
+至少需要明确：
+
+- 添加基础卡片接口
+  - 输入：`cardFile`、`baseCardType`、`pluginId?`、`insertPosition`
+  - 输出：新增节点记录、更新后的结构摘要、必要时返回新的预览或节点信息
+- 删除基础卡片接口
+  - 输入：`cardFile`、`nodeId`
+  - 输出：删除结果、更新后的结构摘要
+- 重排基础卡片接口
+  - 输入：`cardFile`、`nodeId`、`targetPosition` 或 `beforeNodeId/afterNodeId`
+  - 输出：更新后的结构摘要
+
+### 5.2 锁定态 / 查看-编辑模式治理接口
+
+至少需要明确：
+
+- 锁定态保存位置属于 metadata、structure 还是独立运行时状态；
+- 查看模式 / 编辑模式是否是文档持久态；
+- 正式 route 名称、输入输出模式；
+- 预览 iframe 与编辑面板对模式切换的事件协作边界。
+
+### 5.3 与当前已落地命令域的协作边界
+
+需要明确：
+
+- 结构编辑动作如何与自动保存协同；
+- 结构编辑动作如何进入撤销 / 重做系统；
+- 成功写回后如何刷新预览；
+- 失败时如何回滚到权威状态；
+- 是否需要新的共享事件或沿用现有回推链路。
+
+## 6. 当前结论
+
+当前生态还没有提供足以承接以下迁移项的正式契约：
+
+- 基础卡片增删改序；
+- 查看模式 / 编辑模式切换；
+- 锁定态持久化。
+
+因此，本工单成立，`Chips-EditingEngine` 必须在此处暂停继续推进该开发线，等待生态处理后再继续。
```
</details></tool-use>
