```
[bash -lc python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

# 1. Bridge API spec
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/协议与接口标准/02-Bridge-API规范.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"### file子域\n\nfile子域提供文件操作能力，包括file.read(path, options)读取文件，file.write(path, data)写入文件，file.exists(path)检查文件是否存在，file.mkdir(path)创建目录，file.delete(path)删除文件，file.list(path)列出目录内容，file.copy(src, dest)复制文件，file.move(src, dest)移动文件。\n",
"### file子域\n\nfile 子域提供低层文件系统能力，面向基础设施级应用与编辑类应用开放通用文件编排接口。正式动作包括 `file.read`、`file.write`、`file.stat`、`file.list`、`file.watch`、`file.exists`、`file.mkdir`、`file.delete`、`file.copy`、`file.move`。\n\n设计约束：\n\n- Host 负责提供稳定、较低颗粒度的文件能力，不要求为每个上层业务动作都新增专用 route；\n- 获得正式权限的应用可以基于文件格式规范，自行完成目录创建、内容写回、文件搬移、事务编排等工作；\n- 基础设施级应用必须仍然遵守正式文件格式、主题系统、多语言系统与错误码规范，不能私设第二套协议。\n\n### zip子域\n\nzip 子域提供压缩包能力，正式动作包括 `zip.compress(inputDir, outputZip)`、`zip.extract(zipPath, outputDir)`、`zip.list(zipPath)`。\n\n对于 `.card`、`.box` 等以 ZIP 为承载格式的生态文档，Host 负责提供压缩/解压基础能力；是否封装为更高层业务动作，由上层应用按正式架构决定。对 EditingEngine 这类基础设施级应用，允许在获得 `zip.manage` 与 `file.manage` 后直接完成“解压 -> 改写 -> 重新打包”链路。\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"| `card.updateBaseCard({ cardFile, nodeId, config })` | 通过 Host 正式写链路更新基础卡片配置 | 否 |\n",
"| `card.updateBaseCard({ cardFile, nodeId, config })` | 通过 Host 正式写链路更新单个基础卡片配置 | 否 |\n"
)
insert_after = "`card.render` 返回 `view.semanticHash` 与可选 `view.diagnostics/view.consistency`，用于一致性比对与诊断。\n"
addition = "\n卡片文档写入补充约束（2026-03-11）：\n\n- `card.getBaseCard / card.renderBaseCardEditor / card.updateBaseCard` 继续承担“单个基础卡片配置编辑”这一高层语义链路；\n- 复合卡片结构编辑、文档模式切换、批量内容写回等更底层动作，不强制要求 Host 为 EditingEngine 单独提供业务级 route；\n- 获得 `file.manage` + `zip.manage` 的基础设施级应用，可以基于正式 `.card` 文件格式直接执行解压、改写、重打包；\n- 这类应用必须严格遵守 `metadata.yaml`、`structure.yaml`、`content/*.yaml` 的正式字段与写回规则，不得发明私有包结构。\n"
text = text.replace(insert_after, insert_after + addition)
text = text.replace(
"| `chips.invoke('file.read')` | file.read | 读取文件 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.write')` | file.write | 写入文件 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.delete')` | file.delete | 删除文件 |\n| `chips.invoke('resource.fetch')` | resource.fetch | 网络请求 |\n| `chips.invoke('card.read*')` | card.read | 读取卡片 |\n| `chips.invoke('card.write*')` | card.write | 修改卡片 |\n| `chips.invoke('window.open', { config })` | window.open | 创建窗口 |\n| `chips.shell.openExternal()` | platform.shellOpenExternal | 打开外部链接 |\n",
"| `chips.invoke('file.read')` | `file.read` 或 `file.manage` | 读取文件 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.write')` | `file.write` 或 `file.manage` | 写入文件 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.stat')` | `file.read` 或 `file.manage` | 读取文件元信息 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.list')` | `file.read` 或 `file.manage` | 列目录 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.exists')` | `file.read` 或 `file.manage` | 检查存在性 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.mkdir')` | `file.manage` | 创建目录 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.delete')` | `file.manage` | 删除文件或目录 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.copy')` | `file.manage` | 复制文件或目录 |\n| `chips.invoke('file.move')` | `file.manage` | 移动文件或目录 |\n| `chips.invoke('zip.compress')` | `zip.manage` | 压缩目录 |\n| `chips.invoke('zip.extract')` | `zip.manage` | 解压压缩包 |\n| `chips.invoke('resource.fetch')` | resource.fetch | 网络请求 |\n| `chips.invoke('card.read*')` | card.read | 读取卡片 |\n| `chips.invoke('card.write*')` | card.write | 修改卡片 |\n| `chips.invoke('window.open', { config })` | window.open | 创建窗口 |\n| `chips.shell.openExternal()` | platform.shellOpenExternal | 打开外部链接 |\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"6. 检查 'file.write' 是否在权限列表中\n7. 如果有权限，转发给路由器执行\n8. 如果无权限，返回 PERMISSION_DENIED 错误\n",
"6. 检查精确权限或同命名空间的 `*.manage` 超集权限是否在权限列表中\n7. 如果有权限，转发给路由器执行\n8. 如果无权限，返回 PERMISSION_DENIED 错误\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"以下 API 对所有插件无条件开放：\n",
"权限匹配补充规则：\n\n- 默认仍以精确权限名声明与校验；\n- 当某个服务域定义了 `namespace.manage` 时，`namespace.manage` 视为该命名空间下所有动作的超集权限；\n- 基础设施级应用优先声明较粗粒度的 `*.manage`，普通业务插件仍应遵循最小权限原则声明精确权限。\n\n### 无需权限的 API\n\n以下 API 对所有插件无条件开放：\n"
)
p.write_text(text)

# 2. Host service design
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/架构设计/14-Host服务域设计.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"| 核心动作 | read/write/stat/list |\n| 输入基线 | path + options |\n| 输出基线 | content/meta |\n| 幂等性 | read/stat/list 幂等 |\n| 权限边界 | `file.read` / `file.write` |\n",
"| 核心动作 | read/write/stat/list/watch/exists/mkdir/delete/copy/move |\n| 输入基线 | path + options |\n| 输出基线 | content/meta/ack |\n| 幂等性 | read/stat/list/exists 幂等 |\n| 权限边界 | `file.read` / `file.write` / `file.manage` |\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"interface FileService {\n  read(path: string, options?: FileReadOptions): Promise<FileContent>;\n  write(path: string, content: FileContent, options?: FileWriteOptions): Promise<void>;\n  stat(path: string): Promise<FileStat>;\n  list(dir: string, options?: FileListOptions): Promise<FileEntry[]>;\n}\n",
"interface FileService {\n  read(path: string, options?: FileReadOptions): Promise<FileContent>;\n  write(path: string, content: FileContent, options?: FileWriteOptions): Promise<void>;\n  stat(path: string): Promise<FileStat>;\n  list(dir: string, options?: FileListOptions): Promise<FileEntry[]>;\n  watch(path: string): Promise<FileWatchSubscription>;\n  exists(path: string): Promise<{ exists: boolean }>;\n  mkdir(path: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void>;\n  delete(path: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void>;\n  copy(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>;\n  move(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>;\n}\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"- `card.updateBaseCard` 必须由 Host 负责 `.card` 解包、`content/{nodeId}.yaml` 回写、`.card/metadata.yaml.modified_at` 更新与重新打包；应用层不得自行读写卡片压缩包内部文件。\n",
"- `card.updateBaseCard` 继续承担“单个基础卡片配置编辑”的高层语义写链路。\n- 对 EditingEngine 这类基础设施级应用，若已获得 `file.manage` + `zip.manage`，允许按正式文件格式直接完成 `.card` 的解包、结构改写、内容写回、`metadata.yaml.modified_at` 更新与重新打包；Host 不要求再为每个结构动作追加专用业务 route。\n- 普通业务插件仍不得绕过正式文件格式规范私改压缩包内容；直接文件编排只面向承担文档治理责任的基础设施级应用。\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"| 核心动作 | compress/extract/list |\n| 输入基线 | files |\n| 输出基线 | zip/meta |\n| 幂等性 | list 幂等 |\n| 权限边界 | `zip.manage` |\n",
"| 核心动作 | compress/extract/list |\n| 输入基线 | files / path |\n| 输出基线 | zip/meta/entries |\n| 幂等性 | list 幂等 |\n| 权限边界 | `zip.manage` |\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"  READ: 'file.read',\n  WRITE: 'file.write',\n  STAT: 'file.stat',\n  LIST: 'file.list',\n",
"  READ: 'file.read',\n  WRITE: 'file.write',\n  STAT: 'file.stat',\n  LIST: 'file.list',\n  EXISTS: 'file.exists',\n  MKDIR: 'file.mkdir',\n  DELETE: 'file.delete',\n  COPY: 'file.copy',\n  MOVE: 'file.move',\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"        permission: ['file.read'],\n",
"        permission: ['file.read'],\n"
,1)
insert_marker = "### 权限验收\n"
addition = "### 低颗粒度接口补充约束（2026-03-11）\n\n- Host 在 `file`、`zip` 等基础服务域优先提供稳定的底层能力面，而不是按编辑引擎每一个交互动作拆 route；\n- 编辑引擎、资源管理器等基础设施级应用应在应用层完成业务编排，在 Host 层复用统一文件/压缩/渲染服务；\n- 当服务域声明 `namespace.manage` 时，`namespace.manage` 自动覆盖该命名空间下的精确权限检查；\n- 该粗粒度权限只用于承担生态底层治理责任的应用，不改变普通插件最小权限原则。\n\n"
text = text.replace(insert_marker, addition + insert_marker)
p.write_text(text)

# 3. SDK guide
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/插件开发/08-SDK使用指南.md')
text = p.read_text()
old = "## 文件操作\n\nSDK提供卡片文件的读写能力。\n\n解析卡片使用 `client.card.parse()` 方法，传入卡片文件路径。返回卡片对象，包含元数据、内容列表等。方法签名：\n"
new = "## 文件操作\n\nSDK 提供两层正式能力：\n\n- 语义层：`client.card.*`，面向解析、渲染、基础卡片编辑器挂载等高层场景；\n- 基础层：`client.file.*` 与 `client.zip.*`，面向基础设施级应用的底层文件/压缩编排。\n\n对 EditingEngine、资源管理器这类需要直接治理 `.card/.box` 文档结构的应用，推荐优先使用 `client.file` + `client.zip`，而不是要求 Host 为每一个业务动作都新增专用 route。\n\n### file API\n\n```typescript\nclient.file.read(path: string, options?: { encoding?: 'utf-8' | 'binary' }): Promise<string | Uint8Array>\nclient.file.write(path: string, content: string | Uint8Array, options?: { encoding?: 'utf-8' | 'binary' }): Promise<void>\nclient.file.stat(path: string): Promise<FileStat>\nclient.file.list(dir: string): Promise<FileEntry[]>\nclient.file.exists(path: string): Promise<boolean>\nclient.file.mkdir(path: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void>\nclient.file.delete(path: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void>\nclient.file.copy(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>\nclient.file.move(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>\n```\n\n### zip API\n\n```typescript\nclient.zip.compress(inputDir: string, outputZip: string): Promise<void>\nclient.zip.extract(zipPath: string, outputDir: string): Promise<void>\nclient.zip.list(zipPath: string): Promise<Array<{ path: string; size: number; isDirectory: boolean }>>\n```\n\n解析卡片使用 `client.card.parse()` 方法，传入卡片文件路径。返回卡片对象，包含元数据、内容列表等。方法签名：\n"
text = text.replace(old, new)
text = text.replace(
"> 注意：旧版 `cards.read`、`cards.create`、`cards.update`、`cards.delete` 方法已归档，请使用 `card.parse/getBaseCard/render/renderBaseCardEditor/updateBaseCard/validate` 正式接口。\n",
"> 注意：旧版 `cards.read`、`cards.create`、`cards.update`、`cards.delete` 方法已归档，请使用 `card.parse/getBaseCard/render/renderBaseCardEditor/updateBaseCard/validate` 以及 `file.* / zip.*` 正式接口。\n\n补充约束（2026-03-11）：\n\n- `card.updateBaseCard` 只覆盖“单个基础卡片配置编辑”；\n- 基础卡片增删改序、文档模式切换、批量内容写回等文档结构级动作，推荐由基础设施级应用通过 `client.file` + `client.zip` 直接完成；\n- 若插件声明了 `file.manage`，SDK 调用 `file.read/write/stat/list/exists/mkdir/delete/copy/move` 时都可通过权限校验；普通业务插件仍建议按最小权限声明精确权限。\n"
)
p.write_text(text)

# 4. Architecture handbook
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/架构设计/薯片生态-架构设计手册.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"| `file` | `read/write/stat/list` | path + options -> content/meta | `read/stat/list` 幂等 | `file.read/file.write` | `FILE_NOT_FOUND`, `FILE_PERMISSION_DENIED` |\n",
"| `file` | `read/write/stat/list/watch/exists/mkdir/delete/copy/move` | path + options -> content/meta/ack | `read/stat/list/exists` 幂等 | `file.read/file.write/file.manage` | `FILE_NOT_FOUND`, `FILE_PERMISSION_DENIED` |\n"
)
marker = "### 14.2 最小权限原则\n"
addition = "### 14.1A 粗粒度权限补充规则（2026-03-11）\n- 默认权限模型仍支持精确动作名。\n- 当某个服务域声明 `namespace.manage` 时，`namespace.manage` 视为该命名空间下所有动作的超集权限。\n- `file.manage`、`zip.manage` 用于 EditingEngine、资源管理器等基础设施级应用，避免 Host 为每个文档治理动作增设一条业务 route。\n- 该规则不改变普通业务插件的最小权限原则；普通插件仍优先声明精确权限。\n\n"
text = text.replace(marker, addition + marker)
insert_after = "## 13. 状态与数据流模型（详细）\n"
if insert_after in text and '### 13.4 基础设施级文档写入模型（2026-03-11）' not in text:
    text = text.replace(insert_after, insert_after + "\n### 13.4 基础设施级文档写入模型（2026-03-11）\n- 对 `.card`、`.box` 这类压缩包文档，Host 提供 `zip.extract/zip.compress` 与 `file.*` 基础能力。\n- EditingEngine 等基础设施级应用负责在应用层完成事务编排：解压到临时目录、按正式规范改写 `metadata.yaml/structure.yaml/content/*`、重新打包、清理临时目录。\n- Host 不再要求为‘添加基础卡片’、‘删除基础卡片’、‘调整顺序’、‘切换查看/编辑模式’分别新增底层 route；真正需要标准化的是文件格式与权限规则。\n- 统一渲染、基础卡片编辑器挂载、主题/语言注入等高层语义能力仍由 `card.render`、`card.getBaseCard`、`card.renderBaseCardEditor` 承担。\n\n")
p.write_text(text)

# 5. Card format spec
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/文件格式规范/01-卡片文件格式规范.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"  # === 可选扩展属性 ===\n  visibility:\n",
"  # === 编辑状态 ===\n  editor_state:\n    type: object\n    description: \"编辑引擎持久化的文档治理状态\"\n    properties:\n      mode:\n        type: string\n        enum: [\"edit\", \"view\"]\n        default: \"edit\"\n        description: \"文档编辑模式。view 表示锁定/查看模式，edit 表示可编辑模式\"\n\n  # === 可选扩展属性 ===\n  visibility:\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"# 主题设置\ntheme: \"薯片官方:默认主题\"\n\n# 标签系统\n",
"# 主题设置\ntheme: \"薯片官方:默认主题\"\n\n# 编辑状态\neditor_state:\n  mode: \"edit\"\n\n# 标签系统\n"
)
insert_after = "### 4.3 设计说明\n\n**职责分离**:\n- `structure.yaml`: 只负责结构关系和文件索引\n- `content/*.yaml`: 负责具体内容配置\n- `metadata.yaml`: 负责卡片自身元信息\n"
addition = "\n### 4.4 结构写回正式规则（2026-03-11）\n\n为支持 EditingEngine 等基础设施级应用直接治理 `.card` 文档，结构写回规则正式冻结如下：\n\n- 新增基础卡片：\n  - 生成唯一 `nodeId`（10 位 62 进制，且在当前卡片内唯一）；\n  - 在 `structure.yaml.structure` 的目标位置插入 `{ id, type }`；\n  - 新建 `content/{nodeId}.yaml`；\n  - 同步更新 `structure.yaml.manifest.card_count`；\n  - 更新 `.card/metadata.yaml.modified_at`。\n- 删除基础卡片：\n  - 从 `structure.yaml.structure` 删除对应节点；\n  - 删除 `content/{nodeId}.yaml`；\n  - 同步更新 `manifest.card_count`；\n  - 更新 `metadata.yaml.modified_at`。\n- 调整基础卡片顺序：\n  - 仅调整 `structure.yaml.structure` 中节点顺序；\n  - 不改变既有 `nodeId` 与 `content/{nodeId}.yaml` 路径；\n  - 更新 `metadata.yaml.modified_at`。\n- 切换编辑/查看模式：\n  - 持久化到 `metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode`；\n  - `view` 代表查看/锁定模式，`edit` 代表可编辑模式；\n  - 更新 `metadata.yaml.modified_at`。\n- 直接文件治理必须保证事务性：推荐顺序为“解压 -> 改写临时目录 -> 校验 -> 重打包 -> 原子替换 -> 清理临时目录”。\n"
text = text.replace(insert_after, insert_after + addition)
p.write_text(text)

# 6. EditingEngine docs
p = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/01-迁移总体架构设计.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"- 文件解析、卡片渲染、窗口原生控制、主题广播、语言广播等公共能力尽量复用 Host。\n- 编辑引擎聚焦业务编排：工作区状态、布局切换、工具窗口状态、命令和工作流。\n",
"- 文件解析、卡片渲染、窗口原生控制、主题广播、语言广播等公共能力尽量复用 Host。\n- 编辑引擎聚焦业务编排：工作区状态、布局切换、工具窗口状态、命令和工作流。\n- 文档写入优先复用 Host 提供的低层 `file.*` / `zip.*` 能力；不要求 Host 为每个编辑动作都提供一条细粒度业务 route。\n"
)

if '### 5.6 卡片包治理系统' not in text:
    text += "\n### 5.6 卡片包治理系统\n\n负责：\n\n- `.card` 临时解压目录创建与清理；\n- `metadata.yaml`、`structure.yaml`、`content/*.yaml` 的读写编排；\n- 基础卡片新增、删除、重排；\n- 编辑 / 查看模式切换持久化；\n- 打包完成后的预览刷新与错误回滚。\n\n该层是 EditingEngine 迁入新生态后的关键差异点：Host 只提供宽松、较底层的能力面，编辑引擎自身承担正式文件格式编排责任。\n"

if 'src/domains/card-package/' not in text:
    text += "\n## 6. 新增模块规划（2026-03-11）\n\n为承接新的低层文档治理方案，运行时目录补充如下：\n\n- `src/domains/card-package/`：`.card` 解压、读写、重打包、临时目录清理、事务回滚；\n- `src/domains/card-package/codecs/`：`metadata.yaml`、`structure.yaml`、`content/*.yaml` 编解码；\n- `src/domains/card-package/commands/`：基础卡片新增、删除、重排、模式切换命令；\n- `src/shared/runtime/editor-route-service.ts`：补齐 `file.*` / `zip.*` 运行时适配；\n- `src/features/editor/`：挂接结构编辑 UI 与文档模式治理 UI。\n\n目录边界要求：\n\n- 直接文件治理逻辑不得散落在 React 组件中；\n- UI 只能调用命令服务，不直接拼接 ZIP/文件系统细节；\n- 解析/编码逻辑必须可单测，不依赖 DOM。\n"
p.write_text(text)

p = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/03-数据流与接口适配设计.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"### 2.2 自动保存\n\n基础卡片自动保存正式链路（2026-03-11 已落地）：\n\n1. 预览 iframe 通过 `chips.composite:node-select` 选中基础卡片节点；\n2. 编辑引擎调用 `card.getBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId)` 获取当前基础卡片权威配置，并创建本地编辑会话；\n3. 编辑引擎调用 `card.renderBaseCardEditor({ cardFile, nodeId })` 挂载正式编辑器 iframe；\n4. 编辑器通过 `chips.basecard-editor:config-change` 上报标准化配置；\n5. 编辑域先更新本地历史快照与脏状态，再进入防抖保存调度；\n6. 防抖期满后，编辑引擎调用 `card.updateBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId, config)`；\n7. Host 成功写回后，编辑引擎通过 `sync-config` 回推权威配置，并刷新当前预览文档；\n8. 若保存失败，编辑面板进入错误态，保留当前选中节点、历史栈和未保存配置，等待下一次变更或手动刷新。\n\n当前实现约束：\n\n- 当前保存调度器已抽离为 `src/domains/editor/editor-save-scheduler.ts`，由 `useBaseCardEditingSession` 负责编排，并支持基础防抖、串行化保存与 flush；\n- 当前会话范围限定在“单个已选中的基础卡片配置编辑”，尚未扩展到基础卡片增删改序或跨文档脏队列；\n- 当前尚未实现工作区级统一保存队列，后续若进入多文档并发编辑场景，需要继续上提到应用层。\n",
"### 2.2 自动保存与文档写回\n\n当前正式链路拆分为两类：\n\n1. 基础卡片编辑器挂载与语义读取：继续使用 `card.getBaseCard`、`card.renderBaseCardEditor`；\n2. 文档级写入：统一使用 `card-package-domain`，内部复用 `zip.extract` + `file.*` + `zip.compress`。\n\n文档写回正式链路（2026-03-11 调整后）：\n\n1. 预览 iframe 通过 `chips.composite:node-select` 选中基础卡片节点；\n2. 编辑引擎调用 `card.getBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId)` 获取当前基础卡片权威配置，并创建本地编辑会话；\n3. 编辑引擎调用 `card.renderBaseCardEditor({ cardFile, nodeId })` 挂载正式编辑器 iframe；\n4. 编辑器通过 `chips.basecard-editor:config-change` 上报标准化配置；\n5. 编辑域先更新本地历史快照与脏状态，再进入防抖保存调度；\n6. 防抖期满后，保存调度器调用 `card-package-domain`：解压 `.card`、改写 `content/{nodeId}.yaml`、更新 `metadata.yaml.modified_at`、重新打包并清理临时目录；\n7. 写回成功后，编辑引擎通过 `sync-config` 回推权威配置，并刷新当前预览文档；\n8. 若保存失败，编辑面板进入错误态，保留当前选中节点、历史栈和未保存配置，等待下一次变更或手动刷新。\n\n同一套文档写回域还承接：\n\n- 新增基础卡片；\n- 删除基础卡片；\n- 调整基础卡片顺序；\n- 切换 `metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode`。\n\n约束：\n\n- ZIP/文件系统细节只能位于 `src/domains/card-package/**`；\n- React 组件不得直接改写临时目录；\n- 工作区级统一保存队列仍是后续优化项，但单文档事务边界必须先完整闭环。\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"3. 保存调度器进入防抖期，并准备对当前节点执行 `card.updateBaseCard`。\n4. `card.updateBaseCard` 成功后，编辑引擎通过 `markSaveSucceeded()` 更新权威配置，再通过 `chips.basecard-editor:sync-config` 回推 Host 规范化后的权威配置。\n",
"3. 保存调度器进入防抖期，并准备对当前节点执行卡片包写回事务。\n4. 卡片包事务成功后，编辑引擎通过 `markSaveSucceeded()` 更新权威配置，再通过 `chips.basecard-editor:sync-config` 回推规范化后的权威配置。\n"
)
if '### 3.5 结构编辑与模式切换' not in text:
    text = text.replace('## 4. 布局链路\n', "### 3.5 结构编辑与模式切换\n\n1. 新增/删除/重排/模式切换命令统一进入 `card-package-domain`；\n2. 命令服务在临时目录中改写 `structure.yaml`、`content/*.yaml`、`metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode`；\n3. 重打包成功后刷新当前工作区文档，并根据结果修正选中节点、脏状态与撤销/重做快照；\n4. 若任一文件步骤失败，命令服务必须丢弃临时目录并维持原始文档不变。\n\n## 4. 布局链路\n")
p.write_text(text)

p = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/需求文档/02-功能需求与旧项目迁移矩阵.md')
```

```
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/协议与接口标准/02-Bridge-API规范.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"### file子域\n\nfile子域提供文件操作能力，包括file.read(path, options)读取文件，file.write(path, data)写入文件，file.exists(path)检查文件是否存在，file.mkdir(path)创建目录，file.delete(path)删除文件，file.list(path)列出目录内容，file.copy(src, dest)复制文件，file.move(src, dest)移动文件。\n",
"### file子域\n\nfile 子域提供低层文件系统能力，面向基础设施级应用与编辑类应用开放通用文件编排接口。正式动作包括 `file.read`、`file.write`、`file.stat`、`file.list`、`file.watch`、`file.exists`、`file.mkdir`、`file.delete`、`file.copy`、`file.move`。\n\n设计约束：\n\n- Host 负责提供稳定、较低颗粒度的文件能力，不要求为每个上层业务动作都新增专用 route；\n- 获得正式权限的应用可以基于文件格式规范，自行完成目录创建、内容写回、文件搬移、事务编排等工作；\n- 基础设施级应用必须仍然遵守正式文件格式、主题系统、多语言系统与错误码规范，不能私设第二套协议。\n\n### zip子域\n\nzip 子域提供压缩包能力，正式动作包括 `zip.compress(inputDir, outputZip)`、`zip.extract(zipPath, outputDir)`、`zip.list(zipPath)`。\n\n对于 `.card`、`.box` 等以 ZIP 为承载格式的生态文档，Host 负责提供压缩/解压基础能力；是否封装为更高层业务动作，由上层应用按正式架构决定。对 EditingEngine 这类基础设施级应用，允许在获得 `zip.manage` 与 `file.manage` 后直接完成“解压 -> 改写 -> 重新打包”链路。\n"
)

text = text.replace(
"6. 检查 'file.write' 是否在权限列表中\n7. 如果有权限，转发给路由器执行\n8. 如果无权限，返回 PERMISSION_DENIED 错误\n",
"6. 检查精确权限或同命名空间的 `*.manage` 超集权限是否在权限列表中\n7. 如果有权限，转发给路由器执行\n8. 如果无权限，返回 PERMISSION_DENIED 错误\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"### 无需权限的 API\n\n以下 API 对所有插件无条件开放：\n",
"权限匹配补充规则：\n\n- 默认仍以精确权限名声明与校验；\n- 当某个服务域定义了 `namespace.manage` 时，`namespace.manage` 视为该命名空间下所有动作的超集权限；\n- 基础设施级应用优先声明较粗粒度的 `*.manage`，普通业务插件仍应遵循最小权限原则声明精确权限。\n\n### 无需权限的 API\n\n以下 API 对所有插件无条件开放：\n"
)
p.write_text(text)

# 2. Host service design
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/架构设计/14-Host服务域设计.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"| 核心动作 | read/write/stat/list |\n| 输入基线 | path + options |\n| 输出基线 | content/meta |\n| 幂等性 | read/stat/list 幂等 |\n| 权限边界 | `file.read` / `file.write` |\n",
"| 核心动作 | read/write/stat/list/watch/exists/mkdir/delete/copy/move |\n| 输入基线 | path + options |\n| 输出基线 | content/meta/ack |\n| 幂等性 | read/stat/list/exists 幂等 |\n| 权限边界 | `file.read` / `file.write` / `file.manage` |\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"interface FileService {\n  read(path: string, options?: FileReadOptions): Promise<FileContent>;\n  write(path: string, content: FileContent, options?: FileWriteOptions): Promise<void>;\n  stat(path: string): Promise<FileStat>;\n  list(dir: string, options?: FileListOptions): Promise<FileEntry[]>;\n}\n",
"interface FileService {\n  read(path: string, options?: FileReadOptions): Promise<FileContent>;\n  write(path: string, content: FileContent, options?: FileWriteOptions): Promise<void>;\n  stat(path: string): Promise<FileStat>;\n  list(dir: string, options?: FileListOptions): Promise<FileEntry[]>;\n  watch(path: string): Promise<FileWatchSubscription>;\n  exists(path: string): Promise<{ exists: boolean }>;\n  mkdir(path: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void>;\n  delete(path: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void>;\n  copy(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>;\n  move(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>;\n}\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"- `card.updateBaseCard` 必须由 Host 负责 `.card` 解包、`content/{nodeId}.yaml` 回写、`.card/metadata.yaml.modified_at` 更新与重新打包；应用层不得自行读写卡片压缩包内部文件。\n",
"- `card.updateBaseCard` 继续承担“单个基础卡片配置编辑”的高层语义写链路。\n- 对 EditingEngine 这类基础设施级应用，若已获得 `file.manage` + `zip.manage`，允许按正式文件格式直接完成 `.card` 的解包、结构改写、内容写回、`metadata.yaml.modified_at` 更新与重新打包；Host 不要求再为每个结构动作追加专用业务 route。\n- 普通业务插件仍不得绕过正式文件格式规范私改压缩包内容；直接文件编排只面向承担文档治理责任的基础设施级应用。\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"| 核心动作 | compress/extract/list |\n| 输入基线 | files |\n| 输出基线 | zip/meta |\n| 幂等性 | list 幂等 |\n| 权限边界 | `zip.manage` |\n",
"| 核心动作 | compress/extract/list |\n| 输入基线 | files / path |\n| 输出基线 | zip/meta/entries |\n| 幂等性 | list 幂等 |\n| 权限边界 | `zip.manage` |\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"  READ: 'file.read',\n  WRITE: 'file.write',\n  STAT: 'file.stat',\n  LIST: 'file.list',\n",
"  READ: 'file.read',\n  WRITE: 'file.write',\n  STAT: 'file.stat',\n  LIST: 'file.list',\n  EXISTS: 'file.exists',\n  MKDIR: 'file.mkdir',\n  DELETE: 'file.delete',\n  COPY: 'file.copy',\n  MOVE: 'file.move',\n"
)
insert_marker = "### 权限验收\n"
addition = "### 低颗粒度接口补充约束（2026-03-11）\n\n- Host 在 `file`、`zip` 等基础服务域优先提供稳定的底层能力面，而不是按编辑引擎每一个交互动作拆 route；\n- 编辑引擎、资源管理器等基础设施级应用应在应用层完成业务编排，在 Host 层复用统一文件/压缩/渲染服务；\n- 当服务域声明 `namespace.manage` 时，`namespace.manage` 自动覆盖该命名空间下的精确权限检查；\n- 该粗粒度权限只用于承担生态底层治理责任的应用，不改变普通插件最小权限原则。\n\n"
text = text.replace(insert_marker, addition + insert_marker)
p.write_text(text)

# 3. SDK guide
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/插件开发/08-SDK使用指南.md')
text = p.read_text()
old = "## 文件操作\n\nSDK提供卡片文件的读写能力。\n\n解析卡片使用 `client.card.parse()` 方法，传入卡片文件路径。返回卡片对象，包含元数据、内容列表等。方法签名：\n"
new = "## 文件操作\n\nSDK 提供两层正式能力：\n\n- 语义层：`client.card.*`，面向解析、渲染、基础卡片编辑器挂载等高层场景；\n- 基础层：`client.file.*` 与 `client.zip.*`，面向基础设施级应用的底层文件/压缩编排。\n\n对 EditingEngine、资源管理器这类需要直接治理 `.card/.box` 文档结构的应用，推荐优先使用 `client.file` + `client.zip`，而不是要求 Host 为每一个业务动作都新增专用 route。\n\n### file API\n\n```typescript\nclient.file.read(path: string, options?: { encoding?: 'utf-8' | 'binary' }): Promise<string | Uint8Array>\nclient.file.write(path: string, content: string | Uint8Array, options?: { encoding?: 'utf-8' | 'binary' }): Promise<void>\nclient.file.stat(path: string): Promise<FileStat>\nclient.file.list(dir: string): Promise<FileEntry[]>\nclient.file.exists(path: string): Promise<boolean>\nclient.file.mkdir(path: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void>\nclient.file.delete(path: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void>\nclient.file.copy(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>\nclient.file.move(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>\n```\n\n### zip API\n\n```typescript\nclient.zip.compress(inputDir: string, outputZip: string): Promise<void>\nclient.zip.extract(zipPath: string, outputDir: string): Promise<void>\nclient.zip.list(zipPath: string): Promise<Array<{ path: string; size: number; isDirectory: boolean }>>\n```\n\n解析卡片使用 `client.card.parse()` 方法，传入卡片文件路径。返回卡片对象，包含元数据、内容列表等。方法签名：\n"
text = text.replace(old, new)
text = text.replace(
"> 注意：旧版 `cards.read`、`cards.create`、`cards.update`、`cards.delete` 方法已归档，请使用 `card.parse/getBaseCard/render/renderBaseCardEditor/updateBaseCard/validate` 正式接口。\n",
"> 注意：旧版 `cards.read`、`cards.create`、`cards.update`、`cards.delete` 方法已归档，请使用 `card.parse/getBaseCard/render/renderBaseCardEditor/updateBaseCard/validate` 以及 `file.* / zip.*` 正式接口。\n\n补充约束（2026-03-11）：\n\n- `card.updateBaseCard` 只覆盖“单个基础卡片配置编辑”；\n- 基础卡片增删改序、文档模式切换、批量内容写回等文档结构级动作，推荐由基础设施级应用通过 `client.file` + `client.zip` 直接完成；\n- 若插件声明了 `file.manage`，SDK 调用 `file.read/write/stat/list/exists/mkdir/delete/copy/move` 时都可通过权限校验；普通业务插件仍建议按最小权限声明精确权限。\n"
)
p.write_text(text)

# 4. Architecture handbook
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/架构设计/薯片生态-架构设计手册.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"| `file` | `read/write/stat/list` | path + options -> content/meta | `read/stat/list` 幂等 | `file.read/file.write` | `FILE_NOT_FOUND`, `FILE_PERMISSION_DENIED` |\n",
"| `file` | `read/write/stat/list/watch/exists/mkdir/delete/copy/move` | path + options -> content/meta/ack | `read/stat/list/exists` 幂等 | `file.read/file.write/file.manage` | `FILE_NOT_FOUND`, `FILE_PERMISSION_DENIED` |\n"
)
marker = "### 14.2 最小权限原则\n"
addition = "### 14.1A 粗粒度权限补充规则（2026-03-11）\n- 默认权限模型仍支持精确动作名。\n- 当某个服务域声明 `namespace.manage` 时，`namespace.manage` 视为该命名空间下所有动作的超集权限。\n- `file.manage`、`zip.manage` 用于 EditingEngine、资源管理器等基础设施级应用，避免 Host 为每个文档治理动作增设一条业务 route。\n- 该规则不改变普通业务插件的最小权限原则；普通插件仍优先声明精确权限。\n\n"
text = text.replace(marker, addition + marker)
insert_after = "## 13. 状态与数据流模型（详细）\n"
if insert_after in text and '### 13.4 基础设施级文档写入模型（2026-03-11）' not in text:
    text = text.replace(insert_after, insert_after + "\n### 13.4 基础设施级文档写入模型（2026-03-11）\n- 对 `.card`、`.box` 这类压缩包文档，Host 提供 `zip.extract/zip.compress` 与 `file.*` 基础能力。\n- EditingEngine 等基础设施级应用负责在应用层完成事务编排：解压到临时目录、按正式规范改写 `metadata.yaml/structure.yaml/content/*`、重新打包、清理临时目录。\n- Host 不再要求为‘添加基础卡片’、‘删除基础卡片’、‘调整顺序’、‘切换查看/编辑模式’分别新增底层 route；真正需要标准化的是文件格式与权限规则。\n- 统一渲染、基础卡片编辑器挂载、主题/语言注入等高层语义能力仍由 `card.render`、`card.getBaseCard`、`card.renderBaseCardEditor` 承担。\n\n")
p.write_text(text)

# 5. Card format spec
p = Path('生态共用技术文档/文件格式规范/01-卡片文件格式规范.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"  # === 可选扩展属性 ===\n  visibility:\n",
"  # === 编辑状态 ===\n  editor_state:\n    type: object\n    description: \"编辑引擎持久化的文档治理状态\"\n    properties:\n      mode:\n        type: string\n        enum: [\"edit\", \"view\"]\n        default: \"edit\"\n        description: \"文档编辑模式。view 表示锁定/查看模式，edit 表示可编辑模式\"\n\n  # === 可选扩展属性 ===\n  visibility:\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"# 主题设置\ntheme: \"薯片官方:默认主题\"\n\n# 标签系统\n",
"# 主题设置\ntheme: \"薯片官方:默认主题\"\n\n# 编辑状态\neditor_state:\n  mode: \"edit\"\n\n# 标签系统\n"
)
insert_after = "### 4.3 设计说明\n\n**职责分离**:\n- `structure.yaml`: 只负责结构关系和文件索引\n- `content/*.yaml`: 负责具体内容配置\n- `metadata.yaml`: 负责卡片自身元信息\n"
addition = "\n### 4.4 结构写回正式规则（2026-03-11）\n\n为支持 EditingEngine 等基础设施级应用直接治理 `.card` 文档，结构写回规则正式冻结如下：\n\n- 新增基础卡片：\n  - 生成唯一 `nodeId`（10 位 62 进制，且在当前卡片内唯一）；\n  - 在 `structure.yaml.structure` 的目标位置插入 `{ id, type }`；\n  - 新建 `content/{nodeId}.yaml`；\n  - 同步更新 `structure.yaml.manifest.card_count`；\n  - 更新 `.card/metadata.yaml.modified_at`。\n- 删除基础卡片：\n  - 从 `structure.yaml.structure` 删除对应节点；\n  - 删除 `content/{nodeId}.yaml`；\n  - 同步更新 `manifest.card_count`；\n  - 更新 `metadata.yaml.modified_at`。\n- 调整基础卡片顺序：\n  - 仅调整 `structure.yaml.structure` 中节点顺序；\n  - 不改变既有 `nodeId` 与 `content/{nodeId}.yaml` 路径；\n  - 更新 `metadata.yaml.modified_at`。\n- 切换编辑/查看模式：\n  - 持久化到 `metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode`；\n  - `view` 代表查看/锁定模式，`edit` 代表可编辑模式；\n  - 更新 `metadata.yaml.modified_at`。\n- 直接文件治理必须保证事务性：推荐顺序为“解压 -> 改写临时目录 -> 校验 -> 重打包 -> 原子替换 -> 清理临时目录”。\n"
text = text.replace(insert_after, insert_after + addition)
p.write_text(text)

# 6. EditingEngine docs
p = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/01-迁移总体架构设计.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"- 文件解析、卡片渲染、窗口原生控制、主题广播、语言广播等公共能力尽量复用 Host。\n- 编辑引擎聚焦业务编排：工作区状态、布局切换、工具窗口状态、命令和工作流。\n",
"- 文件解析、卡片渲染、窗口原生控制、主题广播、语言广播等公共能力尽量复用 Host。\n- 编辑引擎聚焦业务编排：工作区状态、布局切换、工具窗口状态、命令和工作流。\n- 文档写入优先复用 Host 提供的低层 `file.*` / `zip.*` 能力；不要求 Host 为每个编辑动作都提供一条细粒度业务 route。\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"- `file-domain/`\n- `editor-domain/`\n",
"- `file-domain/`\n- `card-package-domain/`\n- `editor-domain/`\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"负责：\n\n- 打开/新建/保存/导入/导出动作的 Host 调用封装；\n- 文件对话框；\n- 外部拖拽文件输入的识别和路由。\n",
"负责：\n\n- 打开/新建/保存/导入/导出动作的 Host 调用封装；\n- 文件对话框；\n- 外部拖拽文件输入的识别和路由；\n- 基于 `file.*` / `zip.*` 的文档级写入事务。\n"
)
if '### 5.6 卡片包治理系统' not in text:
    text += "\n### 5.6 卡片包治理系统\n\n负责：\n\n- `.card` 临时解压目录创建与清理；\n- `metadata.yaml`、`structure.yaml`、`content/*.yaml` 的读写编排；\n- 基础卡片新增、删除、重排；\n- 编辑 / 查看模式切换持久化；\n- 打包完成后的预览刷新与错误回滚。\n\n该层是 EditingEngine 迁入新生态后的关键差异点：Host 只提供宽松、较底层的能力面，编辑引擎自身承担正式文件格式编排责任。\n"
p.write_text(text)

p = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/02-运行时模块划分与目录规划.md')
text = p.read_text()
if 'src/domains/card-package/' not in text:
    text += "\n## 6. 新增模块规划（2026-03-11）\n\n为承接新的低层文档治理方案，运行时目录补充如下：\n\n- `src/domains/card-package/`：`.card` 解压、读写、重打包、临时目录清理、事务回滚；\n- `src/domains/card-package/codecs/`：`metadata.yaml`、`structure.yaml`、`content/*.yaml` 编解码；\n- `src/domains/card-package/commands/`：基础卡片新增、删除、重排、模式切换命令；\n- `src/shared/runtime/editor-route-service.ts`：补齐 `file.*` / `zip.*` 运行时适配；\n- `src/features/editor/`：挂接结构编辑 UI 与文档模式治理 UI。\n\n目录边界要求：\n\n- 直接文件治理逻辑不得散落在 React 组件中；\n- UI 只能调用命令服务，不直接拼接 ZIP/文件系统细节；\n- 解析/编码逻辑必须可单测，不依赖 DOM。\n"
p.write_text(text)

p = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/03-数据流与接口适配设计.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"### 2.2 自动保存\n\n基础卡片自动保存正式链路（2026-03-11 已落地）：\n\n1. 预览 iframe 通过 `chips.composite:node-select` 选中基础卡片节点；\n2. 编辑引擎调用 `card.getBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId)` 获取当前基础卡片权威配置，并创建本地编辑会话；\n3. 编辑引擎调用 `card.renderBaseCardEditor({ cardFile, nodeId })` 挂载正式编辑器 iframe；\n4. 编辑器通过 `chips.basecard-editor:config-change` 上报标准化配置；\n5. 编辑域先更新本地历史快照与脏状态，再进入防抖保存调度；\n6. 防抖期满后，编辑引擎调用 `card.updateBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId, config)`；\n7. Host 成功写回后，编辑引擎通过 `sync-config` 回推权威配置，并刷新当前预览文档；\n8. 若保存失败，编辑面板进入错误态，保留当前选中节点、历史栈和未保存配置，等待下一次变更或手动刷新。\n\n当前实现约束：\n\n- 当前保存调度器已抽离为 `src/domains/editor/editor-save-scheduler.ts`，由 `useBaseCardEditingSession` 负责编排，并支持基础防抖、串行化保存与 flush；\n- 当前会话范围限定在“单个已选中的基础卡片配置编辑”，尚未扩展到基础卡片增删改序或跨文档脏队列；\n- 当前尚未实现工作区级统一保存队列，后续若进入多文档并发编辑场景，需要继续上提到应用层。\n",
"### 2.2 自动保存与文档写回\n\n当前正式链路拆分为两类：\n\n1. 基础卡片编辑器挂载与语义读取：继续使用 `card.getBaseCard`、`card.renderBaseCardEditor`；\n2. 文档级写入：统一使用 `card-package-domain`，内部复用 `zip.extract` + `file.*` + `zip.compress`。\n\n文档写回正式链路（2026-03-11 调整后）：\n\n1. 预览 iframe 通过 `chips.composite:node-select` 选中基础卡片节点；\n2. 编辑引擎调用 `card.getBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId)` 获取当前基础卡片权威配置，并创建本地编辑会话；\n3. 编辑引擎调用 `card.renderBaseCardEditor({ cardFile, nodeId })` 挂载正式编辑器 iframe；\n4. 编辑器通过 `chips.basecard-editor:config-change` 上报标准化配置；\n5. 编辑域先更新本地历史快照与脏状态，再进入防抖保存调度；\n6. 防抖期满后，保存调度器调用 `card-package-domain`：解压 `.card`、改写 `content/{nodeId}.yaml`、更新 `metadata.yaml.modified_at`、重新打包并清理临时目录；\n7. 写回成功后，编辑引擎通过 `sync-config` 回推权威配置，并刷新当前预览文档；\n8. 若保存失败，编辑面板进入错误态，保留当前选中节点、历史栈和未保存配置，等待下一次变更或手动刷新。\n\n同一套文档写回域还承接：\n\n- 新增基础卡片；\n- 删除基础卡片；\n- 调整基础卡片顺序；\n- 切换 `metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode`。\n\n约束：\n\n- ZIP/文件系统细节只能位于 `src/domains/card-package/**`；\n- React 组件不得直接改写临时目录；\n- 工作区级统一保存队列仍是后续优化项，但单文档事务边界必须先完整闭环。\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"3. 保存调度器进入防抖期，并准备对当前节点执行 `card.updateBaseCard`。\n4. `card.updateBaseCard` 成功后，编辑引擎通过 `markSaveSucceeded()` 更新权威配置，再通过 `chips.basecard-editor:sync-config` 回推 Host 规范化后的权威配置。\n",
"3. 保存调度器进入防抖期，并准备对当前节点执行卡片包写回事务。\n4. 卡片包事务成功后，编辑引擎通过 `markSaveSucceeded()` 更新权威配置，再通过 `chips.basecard-editor:sync-config` 回推规范化后的权威配置。\n"
)
if '### 3.5 结构编辑与模式切换' not in text:
    text = text.replace('## 4. 布局链路\n', "### 3.5 结构编辑与模式切换\n\n1. 新增/删除/重排/模式切换命令统一进入 `card-package-domain`；\n2. 命令服务在临时目录中改写 `structure.yaml`、`content/*.yaml`、`metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode`；\n3. 重打包成功后刷新当前工作区文档，并根据结果修正选中节点、脏状态与撤销/重做快照；\n4. 若任一文件步骤失败，命令服务必须丢弃临时目录并维持原始文档不变。\n\n## 4. 布局链路\n")
p.write_text(text)

p = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/需求文档/02-功能需求与旧项目迁移矩阵.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"- 复合卡片内基础卡片增删改序、锁定状态切换仍属于后续迁移项，当前文档不视为已完成。\n",
"- 复合卡片内基础卡片增删改序、锁定状态切换已进入当前正式迁移范围，采用 `file.* + zip.* + 卡片文件格式规范` 的低层文档治理方案实现。\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"| 基础卡片增删改序命令域 | 待迁移 | 未落地 |\n",
"| 基础卡片增删改序命令域 | `src/domains/card-package/**` + `src/features/editor/**` | 进行中（按低层文件治理方案迁移） |\n"
)
p.write_text(text)

p = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/开发计划/03-阶段三-核心编辑域迁移.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"- 继续迁移基础卡片增删改序、锁定态等仍未进入正式命令域的旧项目能力。\n",
"- 继续完成 `card-package-domain`：基础卡片新增、删除、重排、`metadata.editor_state.mode` 切换、事务回滚与集成测试。\n"
)
if '## 7. 架构补充决议（2026-03-11）' not in text:
    text += "\n## 7. 架构补充决议（2026-03-11）\n\n- EditingEngine 获准直接使用 Host 的低层 `file.*` / `zip.*` 能力治理 `.card` 文档；\n- Host 只需提供宽松、较底层的通用接口，不再为每个编辑动作补专用业务 route；\n- 文档级正式约束转移到共享文件格式规范、权限规则和 EditingEngine 自身事务实现；\n- 后续开发按“先文档冻结、再代码落地、最后测试收口”执行。\n"
p.write_text(text)
PY]
```

```diff
   public async list(inputPath: string, options?: FileListOptions): Promise<string[]> {

     return list;
   }
+
+  public async exists(inputPath: string): Promise<boolean> {
+    const normalizedPath = this.normalize(inputPath);
+    try {
+      await fs.access(normalizedPath);
+      return true;
+    } catch {
+      return false;
+    }
+  }
+
+  public async mkdir(inputPath: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void> {
+    const normalizedPath = this.normalize(inputPath);
+    await fs.mkdir(normalizedPath, { recursive: options?.recursive ?? true });
+  }
+
+  public async delete(inputPath: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void> {
+    const normalizedPath = this.normalize(inputPath);
+    await fs.rm(normalizedPath, {
+      recursive: options?.recursive ?? true,
+      force: false
+    });
+  }
+
+  public async copy(sourcePath: string, destinationPath: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void> {
+    const normalizedSource = this.normalize(sourcePath);
+    const normalizedDestination = this.normalize(destinationPath);
+    const overwrite = options?.overwrite ?? true;
+
+    await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(normalizedDestination), { recursive: true });
+    await fs.cp(normalizedSource, normalizedDestination, {
+      force: overwrite,
+      errorOnExist: !overwrite,
+      recursive: true
+    });
+  }
+
+  public async move(sourcePath: string, destinationPath: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void> {
+    const normalizedSource = this.normalize(sourcePath);
+    const normalizedDestination = this.normalize(destinationPath);
+    const overwrite = options?.overwrite ?? true;
+
+    if (!overwrite) {
+      const destinationExists = await this.exists(normalizedDestination);
+      if (destinationExists) {
+        throw createError('PAL_FS_MOVE_TARGET_EXISTS', `Destination already exists: ${normalizedDestination}`, {
+          source: normalizedSource,
+          destination: normalizedDestination
+        });
+      }
+    } else if (await this.exists(normalizedDestination)) {
+      await fs.rm(normalizedDestination, { recursive: true, force: true });
+    }
+
+    await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(normalizedDestination), { recursive: true });
+
+    try {
+      await fs.rename(normalizedSource, normalizedDestination);
+    } catch (error) {
+      await this.copy(normalizedSource, normalizedDestination, { overwrite });
+      await this.delete(normalizedSource, { recursive: true });
+      if (!(await this.exists(normalizedDestination))) {
+        throw error;
+      }
+    }
+  }
```

```diff
@@
 export class PermissionGuard {
   public check(required: string[], granted: string[] | undefined): boolean {
     if (required.length === 0) {
       return true;
@@
     }
 
     const grantedSet = new Set(granted);
-    return required.every((permission) => grantedSet.has(permission));
+    return required.every((permission) => {
+      if (grantedSet.has(permission)) {
+        return true;
+      }
+
+      const separatorIndex = permission.indexOf('.');
+      if (separatorIndex <= 0) {
+        return false;
+      }
+
+      const namespace = permission.slice(0, separatorIndex);
+      return grantedSet.has(`${namespace}.manage`);
+    });
   }
 }
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
+        await fs.rm(inputPath, { recursive: options?.recursive ?? true, force: false });

+      async copy(source, destination, options) {
+        await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(destination), { recursive: true });

+          recursive: true,
+          force: options?.overwrite ?? true,
+          errorOnExist: !(options?.overwrite ?? true),
+        });
```

```diff
@@
 export interface FileApi {
   read(path: string, options?: FileReadOptions): Promise<FileContent>;
   write(path: string, content: FileContent, options?: { encoding?: "utf-8" | "binary" }): Promise<void>;

+  delete(path: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }): Promise<void>;
+  copy(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>;
+  move(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }): Promise<void>;
 }
 
 export function createFileApi(client: CoreClient): FileApi {
   return {
     async read(path, options) {
       if (!path) {
         throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "file.read: path is required.");
       }
-      return client.invoke("file.read", { path, ...options });
+      const result = await client.invoke<{ path: string; encoding?: "utf-8" | "binary" }, { content: FileContent }>(
+        "file.read",
+        { path, ...options },
+      );
+      return result.content;
     },
     async write(path, content, options) {
       if (!path) {
         throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "file.write: path is required.");
       }
-      return client.invoke("file.write", { path, content, ...options });
+      await client.invoke("file.write", { path, content, ...options });
     },
     async stat(path) {
       if (!path) {
         throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "file.stat: path is required.");
       }
-      return client.invoke("file.stat", { path });
+      const result = await client.invoke<{ path: string }, { meta: FileStat }>("file.stat", { path });
+      return result.meta;
     },
     async list(dir) {
       if (!dir) {
         throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "file.list: dir is required.");
       }
-      return client.invoke("file.list", { dir });
+      const result = await client.invoke<{ dir: string }, { entries: string[] }>("file.list", { dir });
+      return result.entries;
+    },
+    async exists(path) {
+      if (!path) {
+        throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "file.exists: path is required.");
+      }
+      const result = await client.invoke<{ path: string }, { exists: boolean }>("file.exists", { path });
+      return result.exists;
+    },
+    async mkdir(path, options) {
+      if (!path) {
+        throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "file.mkdir: path is required.");
+      }
+      await client.invoke("file.mkdir", { path, options });
+    },
+    async delete(path, options) {
+      if (!path) {
+        throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "file.delete: path is required.");
+      }
+      await client.invoke("file.delete", { path, options });
+    },
+    async copy(source, destination, options) {
+      if (!source || !destination) {
+        throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "file.copy: source and destination are required.");
+      }
+      await client.invoke("file.copy", { source, destination, options });
+    },
+    async move(source, destination, options) {
+      if (!source || !destination) {
+        throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "file.move: source and destination are required.");
+      }
+      await client.invoke("file.move", { source, destination, options });
     },
   };
 }
```

**Add: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-SDK/src/api/zip.ts`**

```diff
+import type { CoreClient } from "../types/client";
+import { createError } from "../types/errors";
+
+export interface ZipEntry {
+  path: string;
+  size: number;
+  compressedSize?: number;
+  isDirectory: boolean;
+}
+
+export interface ZipApi {
+  compress(inputDir: string, outputZip: string): Promise<void>;
+  extract(zipPath: string, outputDir: string): Promise<void>;
+  list(zipPath: string): Promise<ZipEntry[]>;
+}
+
+export function createZipApi(client: CoreClient): ZipApi {
+  return {
+    async compress(inputDir, outputZip) {
+      if (!inputDir || !outputZip) {
+        throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "zip.compress: inputDir and outputZip are required.");
+      }
+      await client.invoke("zip.compress", { inputDir, outputZip });
+    },
+    async extract(zipPath, outputDir) {
+      if (!zipPath || !outputDir) {
+        throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "zip.extract: zipPath and outputDir are required.");
+      }
+      await client.invoke("zip.extract", { zipPath, outputDir });
+    },
+    async list(zipPath) {
+      if (!zipPath) {
+        throw createError("INVALID_ARGUMENT", "zip.list: zipPath is required.");
+      }
+      const result = await client.invoke<{ zipPath: string }, { entries: ZipEntry[] }>("zip.list", { zipPath });
+      return result.entries;
+    },
+  };
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

- command:

```
[bash -lc python3 - <<'PY'
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('Chips-SDK/src/contracts/route-manifest.json')
data = json.loads(p.read_text())
routes = data['routes']
for action in ['file.exists', 'file.mkdir', 'file.delete', 'file.copy', 'file.move']:
    routes.setdefault(action, {'action': action})
ordered = {'routes': {k: routes[k] for k in sorted(routes)}}
p.write_text(json.dumps(ordered, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n')
PY]
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell**</summary>

**Input:**

- command:

```
[bash -lc cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/src/domains/card-package/yaml-lite.ts' <<'EOF'
export type YamlValue = string | number | boolean | null | YamlValue[] | { [key: string]: YamlValue };

interface YamlLine {
  indent: number;
  content: string;
}

const parseScalar = (raw: string): YamlValue => {
  const value = raw.trim();
  if (value === 'null') {
    return null;
  }
  if (value === 'true') {
    return true;
  }
  if (value === 'false') {
    return false;
  }
  if (/^-?\d+$/.test(value)) {
    return Number(value);
  }
  if (/^-?\d+\.\d+$/.test(value)) {
    return Number(value);
  }
  if ((value.startsWith('"') && value.endsWith('"')) || (value.startsWith("'") && value.endsWith("'"))) {
    return value.slice(1, -1);
  }
  return value;
};

const splitTopLevel = (input: string, separator: string): string[] => {
  const parts: string[] = [];
  let current = '';
  let quote: '"' | "'" | null = null;
  let squareDepth = 0;
  let curlyDepth = 0;

  for (let index = 0; index < input.length; index += 1) {
    const char = input[index]!;
    const previous = index > 0 ? input[index - 1] : '';

    if ((char === '"' || char === "'") && previous !== '\\') {
      if (quote === char) {
        quote = null;
      } else if (quote === null) {
        quote = char;
      }
      current += char;
      continue;
    }

    if (quote === null) {
      if (char === '[') {
        squareDepth += 1;
      } else if (char === ']') {
        squareDepth -= 1;
      } else if (char === '{') {
        curlyDepth += 1;
      } else if (char === '}') {
        curlyDepth -= 1;
      } else if (char === separator && squareDepth === 0 && curlyDepth === 0) {
        parts.push(current.trim());
        current = '';
        continue;
      }
    }

    current += char;
  }

  if (current.trim().length > 0) {
    parts.push(current.trim());
  }

  return parts;
};

const findTopLevelSeparator = (input: string, separator: string): number => {
  let quote: '"' | "'" | null = null;
  let squareDepth = 0;
  let curlyDepth = 0;

  for (let index = 0; index < input.length; index += 1) {
    const char = input[index]!;
    const previous = index > 0 ? input[index - 1] : '';

    if ((char === '"' || char === "'") && previous !== '\\') {
      if (quote === char) {
        quote = null;
      } else if (quote === null) {
        quote = char;
      }
      continue;
    }

    if (quote !== null) {
      continue;
    }

    if (char === '[') {
      squareDepth += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (char === ']') {
      squareDepth -= 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (char === '{') {
      curlyDepth += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (char === '}') {
      curlyDepth -= 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (char === separator && squareDepth === 0 && curlyDepth === 0) {
      if (separator === ':') {
        const next = input[index + 1];
        if (typeof next === 'string' && next.trim().length > 0) {
          continue;
        }
      }
      return index;
    }
  }

  return -1;
};

const parseInlineValue = (raw: string): YamlValue => {
  const value = raw.trim();
  if (value === '[]') {
    return [];
  }
  if (value === '{}') {
    return {};
  }
  if (value.startsWith('[') && value.endsWith(']')) {
    const inner = value.slice(1, -1).trim();
    if (inner.length === 0) {
      return [];
    }
    return splitTopLevel(inner, ',').map((part) => parseInlineValue(part));
  }
  if (value.startsWith('{') && value.endsWith('}')) {
    const inner = value.slice(1, -1).trim();
    if (inner.length === 0) {
      return {};
    }
    const objectValue: Record<string, YamlValue> = {};
    for (const part of splitTopLevel(inner, ',')) {
      const separatorIndex = findTopLevelSeparator(part, ':');
      if (separatorIndex < 0) {
        continue;
      }
      const key = part.slice(0, separatorIndex).trim();
      const nextValue = part.slice(separatorIndex + 1).trim();
      objectValue[key] = parseInlineValue(nextValue);
    }
    return objectValue;
  }
  return parseScalar(value);
};

const normalizeLines = (text: string): YamlLine[] => {
  const lines: YamlLine[] = [];
  for (const rawLine of text.split(/\r?\n/)) {
    const line = rawLine.replace(/\t/g, '  ');
    if (!line.trim() || line.trim().startsWith('#')) {
      continue;
    }

    lines.push({
      indent: line.match(/^\s*/)?.[0].length ?? 0,
      content: line.trim(),
    });
  }
  return lines;
};

const parseNode = (lines: YamlLine[], index: number, indent: number): [YamlValue, number] => {
  const current = lines[index];
  if (!current) {
    return [{}, index];
  }
  if (current.content.startsWith('- ') && current.indent === indent) {
    return parseArray(lines, index, indent);
  }
  return parseObject(lines, index, indent);
};

const readBlockScalar = (
  lines: YamlLine[],
  startIndex: number,
  parentIndent: number,
  style: '|' | '>',
): [string, number] => {
  if (startIndex >= lines.length) {
    return ['', startIndex];
  }

  const first = lines[startIndex];
  if (!first || first.indent <= parentIndent) {
    return ['', startIndex];
  }

  const blockIndent = first.indent;
  const chunks: string[] = [];
  let index = startIndex;

  while (index < lines.length) {
    const current = lines[index]!;
    if (current.indent < blockIndent) {
      break;
    }
    chunks.push(current.content);
    index += 1;
  }

  return [style === '>' ? chunks.join(' ') : chunks.join('\n'), index];
};

const parseObject = (lines: YamlLine[], startIndex: number, indent: number): [Record<string, YamlValue>, number] => {
  const result: Record<string, YamlValue> = {};
  let index = startIndex;

  while (index < lines.length) {
    const current = lines[index]!;
    if (current.indent < indent) {
      break;
    }
    if (current.indent > indent) {
      throw new Error('Invalid indentation in YAML content');
    }
    if (current.content.startsWith('- ')) {
      break;
    }

    const separatorIndex = findTopLevelSeparator(current.content, ':');
    if (separatorIndex < 0) {
      index += 1;
      continue;
    }

    const key = current.content.slice(0, separatorIndex).trim();
    const valueText = current.content.slice(separatorIndex + 1).trim();
    index += 1;

    if (valueText === '|' || valueText === '>') {
      const [blockValue, nextIndex] = readBlockScalar(lines, index, indent, valueText);
      result[key] = blockValue;
      index = nextIndex;
      continue;
    }

    if (valueText.length > 0) {
      result[key] = parseInlineValue(valueText);
      continue;
    }

    if (index < lines.length && lines[index]!.indent > indent) {
      const [child, nextIndex] = parseNode(lines, index, lines[index]!.indent);
      result[key] = child;
      index = nextIndex;
      continue;
    }

    result[key] = {};
  }

  return [result, index];
};

const parseArray = (lines: YamlLine[], startIndex: number, indent: number): [YamlValue[], number] => {
  const result: YamlValue[] = [];
  let index = startIndex;

  while (index < lines.length) {
    const current = lines[index]!;
    if (current.indent < indent) {
      break;
    }
    if (current.indent !== indent || !current.content.startsWith('- ')) {
      break;
    }

    const valueText = current.content.slice(2).trim();
    index += 1;

    if (valueText === '|' || valueText === '>') {
      const [blockValue, nextIndex] = readBlockScalar(lines, index, indent, valueText);
      result.push(blockValue);
      index = nextIndex;
      continue;
    }

    if (valueText.length === 0) {
      if (index < lines.length && lines[index]!.indent > indent) {
        const [child, nextIndex] = parseNode(lines, index, lines[index]!.indent);
        result.push(child);
        index = nextIndex;
      } else {
        result.push(null);
      }
      continue;
    }

    const separatorIndex = findTopLevelSeparator(valueText, ':');
    if (separatorIndex < 0) {
      result.push(parseInlineValue(valueText));
      continue;
    }

    const objectValue: Record<string, YamlValue> = {};
    const key = valueText.slice(0, separatorIndex).trim();
    const inlineValue = valueText.slice(separatorIndex + 1).trim();

    if (inlineValue.length > 0) {
      objectValue[key] = parseInlineValue(inlineValue);
    } else if (index < lines.length && lines[index]!.indent > indent) {
      const [child, nextIndex] = parseNode(lines, index, lines[index]!.indent);
      objectValue[key] = child;
      index = nextIndex;
    } else {
      objectValue[key] = {};
    }

    if (index < lines.length && lines[index]!.indent > indent && !lines[index]!.content.startsWith('- ')) {
      const [tail, nextIndex] = parseObject(lines, index, lines[index]!.indent);
      Object.assign(objectValue, tail);
      index = nextIndex;
    }

    result.push(objectValue);
  }

  return [result, index];
};

export const parseYamlLite = (text: string): Record<string, YamlValue> => {
  const lines = normalizeLines(text);
  if (lines.length === 0) {
    return {};
  }

  const [value] = parseObject(lines, 0, lines[0]!.indent);
  return value;
};

const stringifyScalar = (value: Exclude<YamlValue, YamlValue[] | { [key: string]: YamlValue }>): string => {
  if (value === null) {
    return 'null';
  }
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    return JSON.stringify(value);
  }
  return String(value);
};

const stringifyInline = (value: YamlValue): string => {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return `[${value.map((item) => stringifyInline(item)).join(', ')}]`;
  }
  if (value && typeof value === 'object') {
    return `{ ${Object.entries(value)
      .map(([key, nextValue]) => `${key}: ${stringifyInline(nextValue)}`)
      .join(', ')} }`;
  }
  return stringifyScalar(value);
};

export const stringifyYamlLite = (input: Record<string, YamlValue>, indent = 0): string => {
  const lines: string[] = [];
  const prefix = ' '.repeat(indent);

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(input)) {
    if (Array.isArray(value)) {
      if (value.length === 0) {
        lines.push(`${prefix}${key}: []`);
        continue;
      }
      lines.push(`${prefix}${key}:`);
      for (const item of value) {
        if (item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item)) {
          const entries = Object.entries(item);
          if (entries.length === 0) {
            lines.push(`${prefix}  - {}`);
            continue;
          }
          const [firstKey, firstValue] = entries[0]!;
          if (firstValue && typeof firstValue === 'object' && !Array.isArray(firstValue)) {
            lines.push(`${prefix}  - ${firstKey}:`);
            lines.push(stringifyYamlLite(firstValue as Record<string, YamlValue>, indent + 6));
          } else {
            lines.push(`${prefix}  - ${firstKey}: ${stringifyInline(firstValue)}`);
          }
          for (const [entryKey, entryValue] of entries.slice(1)) {
            if (entryValue && typeof entryValue === 'object' && !Array.isArray(entryValue)) {
              lines.push(`${prefix}    ${entryKey}:`);
              lines.push(stringifyYamlLite(entryValue as Record<string, YamlValue>, indent + 6));
            } else {
              lines.push(`${prefix}    ${entryKey}: ${stringifyInline(entryValue)}`);
            }
          }
          continue;
        }

        lines.push(`${prefix}  - ${stringifyInline(item)}`);
      }
      continue;
    }

    if (value && typeof value === 'object') {
      const entries = Object.entries(value);
      if (entries.length === 0) {
        lines.push(`${prefix}${key}: {}`);
        continue;
      }
      lines.push(`${prefix}${key}:`);
      lines.push(stringifyYamlLite(value as Record<string, YamlValue>, indent + 2));
      continue;
    }

    lines.push(`${prefix}${key}: ${stringifyScalar(value)}`);
  }

  return lines.filter((line) => line.length > 0).join('\n');
};
EOF]
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell**</summary>

**Input:**

- command:

```
[bash -lc cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/src/domains/card-package/card-package-service.ts' <<'EOF'
import type { Client, PluginRecord } from "chips-sdk";
import { parseYamlLite, stringifyYamlLite, type YamlValue } from "./yaml-lite";

export type CardDocumentMode = "edit" | "view";

export interface AvailableBaseCardType {
  pluginId: string;
  pluginName: string;
  cardType: string;
  templatePath: string;
}

export interface CardStructureNode {
  id: string;
  type: string;
}

export interface AddBaseCardInput {
  cardFile: string;
  cardType: string;
  insertIndex: number;
}

export interface AddBaseCardResult {
  nodeId: string;
  cardType: string;
  pluginId: string;
  title: string;
}

export interface ReorderBaseCardInput {
  cardFile: string;
  nodeId: string;
  targetIndex: number;
}

export interface RemoveBaseCardInput {
  cardFile: string;
  nodeId: string;
}

export interface SetDocumentModeInput {
  cardFile: string;
  mode: CardDocumentMode;
}

export interface CardPackageService {
  listAvailableBaseCardTypes(): Promise<AvailableBaseCardType[]>;
  addBaseCard(input: AddBaseCardInput): Promise<AddBaseCardResult>;
  removeBaseCard(input: RemoveBaseCardInput): Promise<void>;
  reorderBaseCard(input: ReorderBaseCardInput): Promise<void>;
  setDocumentMode(input: SetDocumentModeInput): Promise<void>;
}

type YamlObject = Record<string, YamlValue>;

interface CardMutationContext {
  stageRoot: string;
  packageDir: string;
  metadataPath: string;
  structurePath: string;
  outputZipPath: string;
  metadata: YamlObject;
  structure: YamlObject;
}

const BASE62_ALPHABET = "0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ";

function asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  return value && typeof value === "object" && !Array.isArray(value) ? (value as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
}

function asYamlObject(value: unknown): YamlObject {
  return value && typeof value === "object" && !Array.isArray(value) ? (value as YamlObject) : {};
}

function asString(value: unknown): string | undefined {
  return typeof value === "string" && value.trim().length > 0 ? value : undefined;
}

function asCardDocumentMode(value: unknown): CardDocumentMode {
  return value === "view" ? "view" : "edit";
}

function normalizeSlashes(pathname: string): string {
  return pathname.replace(/\\/g, "/");
}

function dirname(pathname: string): string {
  const normalized = normalizeSlashes(pathname);
  const index = normalized.lastIndexOf("/");
  if (index <= 0) {
    return index === 0 ? "/" : ".";
  }
  return normalized.slice(0, index);
}

function basename(pathname: string): string {
  const normalized = normalizeSlashes(pathname);
  const index = normalized.lastIndexOf("/");
  return index >= 0 ? normalized.slice(index + 1) : normalized;
}

function joinPath(...parts: string[]): string {
  const joined = parts
    .filter((part) => part.length > 0)
    .map((part, index) => {
      const normalized = normalizeSlashes(part);
      if (index === 0) {
        return normalized.replace(/\/+$/g, "");
      }
      return normalized.replace(/^\/+|\/+$/g, "");
    })
    .filter((part) => part.length > 0)
    .join("/");

  if (parts[0]?.startsWith("/")) {
    return `/${joined.replace(/^\/+/, "")}`;
  }

  return joined;
}

function randomId(length: number): string {
  const values = new Uint32Array(length);
  globalThis.crypto.getRandomValues(values);
  let result = "";
  for (const value of values) {
    result += BASE62_ALPHABET[value % BASE62_ALPHABET.length];
  }
  return result;
}

function readStructureNodes(structure: Record<string, unknown>): CardStructureNode[] {
  const nodes = Array.isArray(structure.structure) ? structure.structure : [];
  return nodes
    .map((item) => {
      const record = asRecord(item);
      const id = asString(record.id);
      const type = asString(record.type);
      if (!id || !type) {
        return null;
      }
      return { id, type } satisfies CardStructureNode;
    })
    .filter((item): item is CardStructureNode => item !== null);
}

function writeStructureNodes(structure: YamlObject, nodes: CardStructureNode[]): YamlObject {
  const manifest = asYamlObject(structure.manifest);
  return {
    ...structure,
    structure: nodes.map((node) => ({ id: node.id, type: node.type })),
    manifest: {
      ...manifest,
      card_count: nodes.length,
    },
  };
}

function readTitleFromConfig(config: Record<string, unknown>, nodeId: string): string {
  return asString(config.title) ?? nodeId;
}

export function readDocumentMode(ast: { metadata?: Record<string, unknown> } | null | undefined): CardDocumentMode {
  const metadata = asRecord(ast?.metadata);
  const editorState = asRecord(metadata.editor_state);
  return asCardDocumentMode(editorState.mode);
}

export function readDocumentStructureNodes(ast: { structure?: Record<string, unknown> } | null | undefined): CardStructureNode[] {
  return readStructureNodes(asRecord(ast?.structure));
}

function createMutationPaths(cardFile: string) {
  const fileName = basename(cardFile);
  const directory = dirname(cardFile);
  const stageRoot = joinPath(directory, `.chips-editing-engine-stage-${Date.now()}-${randomId(6)}`);
  return {
    stageRoot,
    packageDir: joinPath(stageRoot, "package"),
    outputDir: joinPath(stageRoot, "output"),
    outputZipPath: joinPath(stageRoot, "output", fileName),
    metadataPath: joinPath(stageRoot, "package", ".card", "metadata.yaml"),
    structurePath: joinPath(stageRoot, "package", ".card", "structure.yaml"),
  };
}

async function withCardMutation<T>(client: Client, cardFile: string, mutate: (ctx: CardMutationContext) => Promise<T>): Promise<T> {
  const paths = createMutationPaths(cardFile);

  await client.file.mkdir(paths.packageDir, { recursive: true });
  await client.file.mkdir(paths.outputDir, { recursive: true });
  await client.zip.extract(cardFile, paths.packageDir);

  try {
    const metadataText = await client.file.read(paths.metadataPath, { encoding: "utf-8" });
    const structureText = await client.file.read(paths.structurePath, { encoding: "utf-8" });
    const metadata = parseYamlLite(String(metadataText));
    const structure = parseYamlLite(String(structureText));

    const ctx: CardMutationContext = {
      stageRoot: paths.stageRoot,
      packageDir: paths.packageDir,
      metadataPath: paths.metadataPath,
      structurePath: paths.structurePath,
      outputZipPath: paths.outputZipPath,
      metadata,
      structure,
    };

    const result = await mutate(ctx);
    await client.file.write(ctx.metadataPath, `${stringifyYamlLite(ctx.metadata)}\n`, { encoding: "utf-8" });
    await client.file.write(ctx.structurePath, `${stringifyYamlLite(ctx.structure)}\n`, { encoding: "utf-8" });
    await client.zip.compress(ctx.packageDir, ctx.outputZipPath);
    await client.file.move(ctx.outputZipPath, cardFile, { overwrite: true });
    return result;
  } finally {
    await client.file.delete(paths.stageRoot, { recursive: true }).catch(() => undefined);
  }
}

function markMetadataModified(metadata: YamlObject, mode?: CardDocumentMode): YamlObject {
  const nextEditorState = {
    ...asYamlObject(metadata.editor_state),
    ...(mode ? { mode } : {}),
  };
  return {
    ...metadata,
    editor_state: nextEditorState,
    modified_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  };
}

async function loadTemplateConfig(client: Client, templatePath: string, cardType: string, nodeId: string): Promise<YamlObject> {
  const raw = await client.file.read(templatePath, { encoding: "utf-8" });
  const parsed = parseYamlLite(String(raw));
  return {
    ...parsed,
    id: asString(parsed.id) ?? nodeId,
    card_type: asString(parsed.card_type) ?? cardType,
  };
}

async function resolveBaseCardTypeMap(client: Client): Promise<Map<string, AvailableBaseCardType>> {
  const plugins = await client.plugin.query({ type: "card" });
  const result = new Map<string, AvailableBaseCardType>();

  for (const plugin of plugins) {
    if (!plugin.enabled) {
      continue;
    }
    const capabilities = Array.isArray(plugin.capabilities) ? plugin.capabilities : [];
    for (const capability of capabilities) {
      if (typeof capability !== "string" || capability.trim().length === 0) {
        continue;
      }
      const templatePath = joinPath(plugin.installPath, "templates", "default-card-config.yaml");
      const hasTemplate = await client.file.exists(templatePath);
      if (!hasTemplate) {
        continue;
      }
      result.set(capability, {
        pluginId: plugin.id,
        pluginName: plugin.name,
        cardType: capability,
        templatePath,
      });
    }
  }

  return result;
}

function findNodeIndex(nodes: CardStructureNode[], nodeId: string): number {
  return nodes.findIndex((node) => node.id === nodeId);
}

function clampIndex(index: number, length: number): number {
  if (length <= 0) {
    return 0;
  }
  return Math.max(0, Math.min(index, length - 1));
}

export function createCardPackageService(client: Client): CardPackageService {
  return {
    async listAvailableBaseCardTypes() {
      return [...(await resolveBaseCardTypeMap(client)).values()].sort((left, right) =>
        left.pluginName.localeCompare(right.pluginName, "zh-CN"),
      );
    },
    async addBaseCard(input) {
      const typeMap = await resolveBaseCardTypeMap(client);
      const selectedType = typeMap.get(input.cardType);
      if (!selectedType) {
        throw new Error(`No card template is available for type: ${input.cardType}`);
      }

      return withCardMutation(client, input.cardFile, async (ctx) => {
        const nodes = readStructureNodes(ctx.structure);
        let nodeId = randomId(10);
        while (nodes.some((node) => node.id === nodeId)) {
          nodeId = randomId(10);
        }

        const config = await loadTemplateConfig(client, selectedType.templatePath, input.cardType, nodeId);
        const nextNodes = [...nodes];
        const insertIndex = Math.max(0, Math.min(input.insertIndex, nextNodes.length));
        nextNodes.splice(insertIndex, 0, { id: nodeId, type: input.cardType });
        ctx.structure = writeStructureNodes(ctx.structure, nextNodes);
        ctx.metadata = markMetadataModified(ctx.metadata);

        const contentPath = joinPath(ctx.packageDir, "content", `${nodeId}.yaml`);
        await client.file.write(contentPath, `${stringifyYamlLite(config)}\n`, { encoding: "utf-8" });

        return {
          nodeId,
          cardType: input.cardType,
          pluginId: selectedType.pluginId,
          title: readTitleFromConfig(config, nodeId),
        } satisfies AddBaseCardResult;
      });
    },
    async removeBaseCard(input) {
      await withCardMutation(client, input.cardFile, async (ctx) => {
        const nodes = readStructureNodes(ctx.structure);
        const nextNodes = nodes.filter((node) => node.id !== input.nodeId);
        if (nextNodes.length === nodes.length) {
          throw new Error(`Base card node not found: ${input.nodeId}`);
        }
        ctx.structure = writeStructureNodes(ctx.structure, nextNodes);
        ctx.metadata = markMetadataModified(ctx.metadata);
        const contentPath = joinPath(ctx.packageDir, "content", `${input.nodeId}.yaml`);
        if (await client.file.exists(contentPath)) {
          await client.file.delete(contentPath);
        }
      });
    },
    async reorderBaseCard(input) {
      await withCardMutation(client, input.cardFile, async (ctx) => {
        const nodes = readStructureNodes(ctx.structure);
        const currentIndex = findNodeIndex(nodes, input.nodeId);
        if (currentIndex < 0) {
          throw new Error(`Base card node not found: ${input.nodeId}`);
        }
        const nextNodes = [...nodes];
        const [targetNode] = nextNodes.splice(currentIndex, 1);
        if (!targetNode) {
          throw new Error(`Base card node not found: ${input.nodeId}`);
        }
        nextNodes.splice(clampIndex(input.targetIndex, nextNodes.length + 1), 0, targetNode);
        ctx.structure = writeStructureNodes(ctx.structure, nextNodes);
        ctx.metadata = markMetadataModified(ctx.metadata);
      });
    },
    async setDocumentMode(input) {
      await withCardMutation(client, input.cardFile, async (ctx) => {
        ctx.metadata = markMetadataModified(ctx.metadata, input.mode);
      });
    },
  };
}
EOF]
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell"><details>
