**Input:**

- command:

```
[bash -lc cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/editor/useBaseCardEditingSession.ts' <<'EOF'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState, type MutableRefObject } from "react";
import type { Client, CompositeNodeSelection } from "chips-sdk";
import {
  createCardPackageService,
  readDocumentMode,
  readDocumentStructureNodes,
  type AvailableBaseCardType,
  type CardDocumentMode,
} from "../../domains/card-package/card-package-service";
import {
  applyConfigChange,
  canRedo,
  canUndo,
  createBaseCardEditSession,
  markSaveFailed,
  markSaveInFlight,
  markSavePending,
  markSaveSucceeded,
  redoConfigChange,
  undoConfigChange,
} from "../../domains/editor/editor-command-service";
import { createEditorSaveScheduler, type EditorSaveScheduler } from "../../domains/editor/editor-save-scheduler";
import type { BaseCardEditSession, BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot } from "../../domains/editor/types";
import type { CardWorkspaceDocument } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
import {
  createBaseCardEditorRuntimeService,
  type BaseCardEditorRuntimeService,
} from "../../shared/runtime/base-card-editor-runtime-service";
import { useEditorPanel } from "../../app/providers/editor-panel-context";

interface UseBaseCardEditingSessionOptions {
  client: Client;
  document: CardWorkspaceDocument;
  onRefresh(): Promise<void>;
  onClose(): void;
  onSessionStateChange?(snapshot: BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot): void;
}

interface UseBaseCardEditingSessionResult {
  previewFrameRef: MutableRefObject<HTMLIFrameElement | null>;
  editorHostRef: MutableRefObject<HTMLDivElement | null>;
  session: BaseCardEditSession | null;
  selectedNode: CompositeNodeSelection | null;
  editorLoading: boolean;
  editorError: string | null;
  documentMode: CardDocumentMode;
  availableCardTypes: AvailableBaseCardType[];
  structureBusy: boolean;
  structureError: string | null;
  canUndo: boolean;
  canRedo: boolean;
  canMoveSelectionUp: boolean;
  canMoveSelectionDown: boolean;
  undo(): void;
  redo(): void;
  addBaseCard(cardType: string): Promise<void>;
  removeSelectedBaseCard(): Promise<void>;
  moveSelectedBaseCard(direction: "up" | "down"): Promise<void>;
  toggleDocumentMode(): Promise<void>;
  close(): Promise<void>;
}

function getErrorMessage(error: unknown): string {
  if (error && typeof error === "object" && "message" in error && typeof (error as { message?: unknown }).message === "string") {
    return (error as { message: string }).message;
  }
  return "编辑操作失败";
}

function isUndoShortcut(event: KeyboardEvent): boolean {
  return (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey) && !event.shiftKey && event.key.toLowerCase() === "z";
}

function isRedoShortcut(event: KeyboardEvent): boolean {
  const key = event.key.toLowerCase();
  if (!(event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) {
    return false;
  }
  return (event.shiftKey && key === "z") || key === "y";
}

function createSnapshot(
  session: BaseCardEditSession | null,
  selectedNode: CompositeNodeSelection | null,
  editorLoading: boolean,
  editorError: string | null,
): BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot {
  return {
    selectedNode,
    baseCardTitle: session?.baseCard.title ?? null,
    saveState: session?.saveState ?? "idle",
    dirty: session?.dirty ?? false,
    undoDepth: session?.history.past.length ?? 0,
    redoDepth: session?.history.future.length ?? 0,
    editorLoading,
    editorError: editorError ?? session?.error ?? null,
    lastCommandKind: session?.lastCommand.kind ?? null,
    lastCommandAt: session?.lastCommand.timestamp ?? null,
  };
}

function bindEditorShortcuts(
  frame: HTMLIFrameElement,
  handlers: { undo(): void; redo(): void; canUndo(): boolean; canRedo(): boolean },
): () => void {
  const handleShortcut = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (isUndoShortcut(event) && handlers.canUndo()) {
      event.preventDefault();
      handlers.undo();
      return;
    }
    if (isRedoShortcut(event) && handlers.canRedo()) {
      event.preventDefault();
      handlers.redo();
    }
  };

  window.addEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);

  const bindFrameDocument = () => {
    const frameWindow = frame.contentWindow;
    if (!frameWindow) {
      return;
    }
    const frameDocument = frameWindow.document;
    frameDocument.addEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
    return () => {
      frameDocument.removeEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
    };
  };

  let unbindFrameDocument = bindFrameDocument();
  const handleLoad = () => {
    unbindFrameDocument?.();
    unbindFrameDocument = bindFrameDocument();
  };

  frame.addEventListener("load", handleLoad);

  return () => {
    frame.removeEventListener("load", handleLoad);
    window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleShortcut);
    unbindFrameDocument?.();
  };
}

export function useBaseCardEditingSession(
  options: UseBaseCardEditingSessionOptions,
): UseBaseCardEditingSessionResult {
  const { openForSelection } = useEditorPanel();
  const runtimeService = useMemo(() => createBaseCardEditorRuntimeService(options.client), [options.client]);
  const cardPackageService = useMemo(() => createCardPackageService(options.client), [options.client]);
  const documentMode = useMemo(() => readDocumentMode(options.document.ast), [options.document.ast]);
  const structureNodes = useMemo(() => readDocumentStructureNodes(options.document.ast), [options.document.ast]);
  const previewFrameRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement | null>(null);
  const editorHostRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
  const editorFrameRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement | null>(null);
  const shortcutCleanupRef = useRef<(() => void) | null>(null);
  const sessionRef = useRef<BaseCardEditSession | null>(null);
  const saveSchedulerRef = useRef<EditorSaveScheduler<unknown> | null>(null);
  const disposedRef = useRef(false);
  const selectionSequenceRef = useRef(0);
  const [selectedNode, setSelectedNode] = useState<CompositeNodeSelection | null>(null);
  const [session, setSession] = useState<BaseCardEditSession | null>(null);
  const [editorLoading, setEditorLoading] = useState(false);
  const [editorError, setEditorError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [structureBusy, setStructureBusy] = useState(false);
  const [structureError, setStructureError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [availableCardTypes, setAvailableCardTypes] = useState<AvailableBaseCardType[]>([]);

  const selectedIndex = useMemo(
    () => (selectedNode ? structureNodes.findIndex((node) => node.id === selectedNode.nodeId) : -1),
    [selectedNode, structureNodes],
  );

  const commitSession = useCallback((nextSession: BaseCardEditSession | null) => {
    sessionRef.current = nextSession;
    setSession(nextSession);
  }, []);

  const flushPendingSave = useCallback(async () => {
    await saveSchedulerRef.current?.flush();
  }, []);

  const resetEditorState = useCallback(() => {
    selectionSequenceRef.current += 1;
    commitSession(null);
    setSelectedNode(null);
    setEditorLoading(false);
    setEditorError(null);
  }, [commitSession]);

  const loadSelection = useCallback(
    async (service: BaseCardEditorRuntimeService, payload: CompositeNodeSelection) => {
      if (documentMode !== "edit") {
        return;
      }

      const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
      if (currentSession && currentSession.selectedNode.nodeId === payload.nodeId) {
        setSelectedNode((current) => (current ? { ...current, ...payload } : payload));
        return;
      }

      const currentSequence = ++selectionSequenceRef.current;
      await flushPendingSave();
      if (disposedRef.current || currentSequence !== selectionSequenceRef.current) {
        return;
      }

      await openForSelection();
      setSelectedNode(payload);
      setEditorLoading(true);
      setEditorError(null);

      try {
        const baseCard = await service.getBaseCard(options.document.path, payload.nodeId);
        if (disposedRef.current || currentSequence !== selectionSequenceRef.current) {
          return;
        }
        const nextSelection = {
          ...payload,
          title: baseCard.title,
          cardType: baseCard.cardType,
          pluginId: baseCard.pluginId,
        };
        setSelectedNode(nextSelection);
        commitSession(createBaseCardEditSession(nextSelection, baseCard));
      } catch (error) {
        if (disposedRef.current || currentSequence !== selectionSequenceRef.current) {
          return;
        }
        commitSession(null);
        setEditorLoading(false);
        setEditorError(getErrorMessage(error));
      }
    },
    [commitSession, documentMode, flushPendingSave, openForSelection, options.document.path],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    disposedRef.current = false;

    const scheduler = createEditorSaveScheduler({
      delayMs: 420,
      save: (request) => runtimeService.updateBaseCard(options.document.path, request.nodeId, request.config),
      onScheduled: () => {
        const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
        if (currentSession) {
          commitSession(markSavePending(currentSession));
        }
      },
      onBeforeSave: () => {
        const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
        if (currentSession) {
          commitSession(markSaveInFlight(currentSession));
        }
      },
      onSaved: async (request, baseCard) => {
        if (disposedRef.current) {
          return;
        }
        const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
        if (!latestSession || latestSession.selectedNode.nodeId !== request.nodeId) {
          return;
        }
        const frame = editorFrameRef.current;
        if (frame) {
          runtimeService.syncEditorConfig(frame, baseCard.config);
        }
        commitSession(markSaveSucceeded(latestSession, baseCard));
        setEditorError(null);
        setSelectedNode((current) =>
          current && current.nodeId === request.nodeId
            ? {
                ...current,
                title: baseCard.title,
                cardType: baseCard.cardType,
                pluginId: baseCard.pluginId,
              }
            : current,
        );
        await options.onRefresh();
      },
      onSaveFailed: async (request, error) => {
        if (disposedRef.current) {
          return;
        }
        const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
        const message = getErrorMessage(error);
        if (latestSession && latestSession.selectedNode.nodeId === request.nodeId) {
          commitSession(markSaveFailed(latestSession, message));
        }
        setEditorError(message);
      },
    });

    saveSchedulerRef.current = scheduler;

    return () => {
      disposedRef.current = true;
      void scheduler.dispose();
      if (saveSchedulerRef.current === scheduler) {
        saveSchedulerRef.current = null;
      }
    };
  }, [commitSession, options.document.path, options.onRefresh, runtimeService]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;
    void cardPackageService
      .listAvailableBaseCardTypes()
      .then((types) => {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setAvailableCardTypes(types);
        }
      })
      .catch(() => {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setAvailableCardTypes([]);
        }
      });

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [cardPackageService]);

  const syncEditorFromHistory = useCallback(
    (nextSession: BaseCardEditSession) => {
      const frame = editorFrameRef.current;
      const config = nextSession.history.present;
      if (!frame || !config) {
        return;
      }
      runtimeService.syncEditorConfig(frame, config);
      saveSchedulerRef.current?.schedule({
        nodeId: nextSession.selectedNode.nodeId,
        config,
      });
    },
    [runtimeService],
  );

  const undo = useCallback(() => {
    const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
    if (!currentSession || documentMode !== "edit") {
      return;
    }
    const nextSession = undoConfigChange(currentSession);
    if (nextSession === currentSession) {
      return;
    }
    commitSession(nextSession);
    syncEditorFromHistory(nextSession);
  }, [commitSession, documentMode, syncEditorFromHistory]);

  const redo = useCallback(() => {
    const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
    if (!currentSession || documentMode !== "edit") {
      return;
    }
    const nextSession = redoConfigChange(currentSession);
    if (nextSession === currentSession) {
      return;
    }
    commitSession(nextSession);
    syncEditorFromHistory(nextSession);
  }, [commitSession, documentMode, syncEditorFromHistory]);

  const close = useCallback(async () => {
    await flushPendingSave();
    options.onClose();
  }, [flushPendingSave, options.onClose]);

  const runStructureMutation = useCallback(
    async (action: () => Promise<void>) => {
      setStructureBusy(true);
      setStructureError(null);
      try {
        await action();
      } catch (error) {
        setStructureError(getErrorMessage(error));
      } finally {
        if (!disposedRef.current) {
          setStructureBusy(false);
        }
      }
    },
    [],
  );

  const addBaseCard = useCallback(
    async (cardType: string) => {
      if (documentMode !== "edit") {
        return;
      }
      await runStructureMutation(async () => {
        await flushPendingSave();
        const insertIndex = selectedIndex >= 0 ? selectedIndex + 1 : structureNodes.length;
        const created = await cardPackageService.addBaseCard({
          cardFile: options.document.path,
          cardType,
          insertIndex,
        });
        resetEditorState();
        await options.onRefresh();
        await loadSelection(runtimeService, {
          nodeId: created.nodeId,
          cardType: created.cardType,
          pluginId: created.pluginId,
          title: created.title,
        });
      });
    },
    [
      cardPackageService,
      documentMode,
      flushPendingSave,
      loadSelection,
      options.document.path,
      options.onRefresh,
      resetEditorState,
      runtimeService,
      selectedIndex,
      structureNodes.length,
      runStructureMutation,
    ],
  );

  const removeSelectedBaseCard = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!selectedNode || documentMode !== "edit") {
      return;
    }
    await runStructureMutation(async () => {
      await flushPendingSave();
      await cardPackageService.removeBaseCard({
        cardFile: options.document.path,
        nodeId: selectedNode.nodeId,
      });
      resetEditorState();
      await options.onRefresh();
    });
  }, [cardPackageService, documentMode, flushPendingSave, options.document.path, options.onRefresh, resetEditorState, runStructureMutation, selectedNode]);

  const moveSelectedBaseCard = useCallback(
    async (direction: "up" | "down") => {
      if (!selectedNode || selectedIndex < 0 || documentMode !== "edit") {
        return;
      }
      const targetIndex = direction === "up" ? selectedIndex - 1 : selectedIndex + 1;
      if (targetIndex < 0 || targetIndex >= structureNodes.length) {
        return;
      }
      await runStructureMutation(async () => {
        await flushPendingSave();
        await cardPackageService.reorderBaseCard({
          cardFile: options.document.path,
          nodeId: selectedNode.nodeId,
          targetIndex,
        });
        await options.onRefresh();
      });
    },
    [
      cardPackageService,
      documentMode,
      flushPendingSave,
      options.document.path,
      options.onRefresh,
      runStructureMutation,
      selectedIndex,
      selectedNode,
      structureNodes.length,
    ],
  );

  const toggleDocumentMode = useCallback(async () => {
    const nextMode: CardDocumentMode = documentMode === "edit" ? "view" : "edit";
    await runStructureMutation(async () => {
      await flushPendingSave();
      await cardPackageService.setDocumentMode({
        cardFile: options.document.path,
        mode: nextMode,
      });
      resetEditorState();
      await options.onRefresh();
    });
  }, [cardPackageService, documentMode, flushPendingSave, options.document.path, options.onRefresh, resetEditorState, runStructureMutation]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const frame = previewFrameRef.current;
    if (!frame || documentMode !== "edit") {
      return;
    }
    return runtimeService.onCompositeNodeSelect(frame, (payload) => {
      void loadSelection(runtimeService, payload);
    });
  }, [documentMode, loadSelection, runtimeService]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (documentMode === "edit") {
      return;
    }
    resetEditorState();
  }, [documentMode, resetEditorState]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;

    const mountEditor = async () => {
      const host = editorHostRef.current;
      if (!host) {
        return;
      }

      host.replaceChildren();
      editorFrameRef.current = null;
      shortcutCleanupRef.current?.();
      shortcutCleanupRef.current = null;

      const currentSelection = selectedNode;
      const currentSession = sessionRef.current;
      if (
        documentMode !== "edit" ||
        !currentSelection ||
        !currentSession ||
        currentSession.selectedNode.nodeId !== currentSelection.nodeId
      ) {
        return;
      }

      setEditorLoading(true);

      try {
        const rendered = await runtimeService.renderEditor({
          cardFile: options.document.path,
          nodeId: currentSelection.nodeId,
        });
        if (cancelled || disposedRef.current) {
          return;
        }

        rendered.frame.className = "editor-shell__editor-frame";
        host.appendChild(rendered.frame);
        editorFrameRef.current = rendered.frame;

        const disposeReady = runtimeService.onEditorReady(rendered.frame, () => {
          if (!cancelled && !disposedRef.current) {
            setEditorLoading(false);
          }
        });
        const disposeFatal = runtimeService.onEditorFatalError(rendered.frame, (error) => {
          if (cancelled || disposedRef.current) {
            return;
          }
          const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
          if (latestSession) {
            commitSession(markSaveFailed(latestSession, error.message));
          }
          setEditorLoading(false);
          setEditorError(error.message);
        });
        const disposeSynced = runtimeService.onEditorConfigSynced(rendered.frame, () => {
          if (!cancelled && !disposedRef.current) {
            setEditorLoading(false);
          }
        });
        const disposeChange = runtimeService.onEditorConfigChange(rendered.frame, (payload) => {
          const latestSession = sessionRef.current;
          if (!latestSession || latestSession.selectedNode.nodeId !== payload.nodeId || documentMode !== "edit") {
            return;
          }
          const nextSession = applyConfigChange(latestSession, payload.config);
          commitSession(nextSession);
          saveSchedulerRef.current?.schedule({
            nodeId: payload.nodeId,
            config: payload.config,
          });
        });

        shortcutCleanupRef.current = bindEditorShortcuts(rendered.frame, {
          undo,
          redo,
          canUndo: () => canUndo(sessionRef.current),
          canRedo: () => canRedo(sessionRef.current),
        });

        return () => {
          disposeReady();
          disposeFatal();
          disposeSynced();
          disposeChange();
        };
      } catch (error) {
        if (!cancelled && !disposedRef.current) {
          setEditorLoading(false);
          setEditorError(getErrorMessage(error));
        }
      }
      return undefined;
    };

    let disposeEditorListeners: (() => void) | undefined;
    void mountEditor().then((dispose) => {
      disposeEditorListeners = dispose;
    });

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
      disposeEditorListeners?.();
      shortcutCleanupRef.current?.();
      shortcutCleanupRef.current = null;
      const host = editorHostRef.current;
      if (host) {
        host.replaceChildren();
      }
      editorFrameRef.current = null;
    };
  }, [commitSession, documentMode, options.document.path, redo, runtimeService, selectedNode, undo]);

  useEffect(() => {
    resetEditorState();
  }, [options.document.id, resetEditorState]);

  useEffect(() => {
    options.onSessionStateChange?.(createSnapshot(session, selectedNode, editorLoading, editorError));
  }, [editorError, editorLoading, options.onSessionStateChange, selectedNode, session]);

  return {
    previewFrameRef,
    editorHostRef,
    session,
    selectedNode,
    editorLoading,
    editorError,
    documentMode,
    availableCardTypes,
    structureBusy,
    structureError,
    canUndo: documentMode === "edit" && canUndo(session),
    canRedo: documentMode === "edit" && canRedo(session),
    canMoveSelectionUp: documentMode === "edit" && selectedIndex > 0,
    canMoveSelectionDown: documentMode === "edit" && selectedIndex >= 0 && selectedIndex < structureNodes.length - 1,
    undo,
    redo,
    addBaseCard,
    removeSelectedBaseCard,
    moveSelectedBaseCard,
    toggleDocumentMode,
    close,
  };
}
EOF]
```

```
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
from pathlib import Path
updates = {
    'Chips-EditingEngine/i18n/zh-CN.json': {
        ('editingEngine','actions','switchToViewMode'): '切换为查看模式',
        ('editingEngine','actions','switchToEditMode'): '切换为编辑模式',
        ('editingEngine','actions','addBaseCardPrefix'): '添加{name}',
        ('editingEngine','actions','moveBaseCardUp'): '上移基础卡片',
        ('editingEngine','actions','moveBaseCardDown'): '下移基础卡片',
        ('editingEngine','actions','removeBaseCard'): '删除基础卡片',
        ('editingEngine','editor','editMode'): '编辑模式',
        ('editingEngine','editor','viewMode'): '查看模式',
        ('editingEngine','editor','viewModeTitle'): '当前处于查看模式',
        ('editingEngine','editor','viewModeDescription'): '查看模式下仍可浏览预览内容，但不会挂载基础卡片编辑器，也不会接收结构编辑命令。',
    },
    'Chips-EditingEngine/i18n/en-US.json': {
        ('editingEngine','actions','switchToViewMode'): 'Switch to view mode',
        ('editingEngine','actions','switchToEditMode'): 'Switch to edit mode',
        ('editingEngine','actions','addBaseCardPrefix'): 'Add {name}',
        ('editingEngine','actions','moveBaseCardUp'): 'Move base card up',
        ('editingEngine','actions','moveBaseCardDown'): 'Move base card down',
        ('editingEngine','actions','removeBaseCard'): 'Remove base card',
        ('editingEngine','editor','editMode'): 'Edit mode',
        ('editingEngine','editor','viewMode'): 'View mode',
        ('editingEngine','editor','viewModeTitle'): 'Document is in view mode',
        ('editingEngine','editor','viewModeDescription'): 'Preview browsing stays available, but the base-card editor and structure commands are disabled in view mode.',
    },
}
for path_str, mapping in updates.items():
    path = Path(path_str)
    data = json.loads(path.read_text())
    for keys, value in mapping.items():
        current = data
        for key in keys[:-1]:
            current = current.setdefault(key, {})
        current[keys[-1]] = value
    path.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n')
PY]
```

```
[bash -lc cat > 'Chips-EditingEngine/tests/unit/card-package-service.test.ts' <<'EOF'
import fs from "node:fs/promises";
import os from "node:os";
import path from "node:path";
import { afterEach, beforeEach, describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { createCardPackageService, readDocumentMode } from "../../src/domains/card-package/card-package-service";
import { parseYamlLite } from "../../src/domains/card-package/yaml-lite";

let workspace: string;

beforeEach(async () => {
  workspace = await fs.mkdtemp(path.join(os.tmpdir(), "chips-editing-engine-card-package-"));
});

afterEach(async () => {
  await fs.rm(workspace, { recursive: true, force: true });
});

function createFileClient() {
  return {
    async read(targetPath: string, options?: { encoding?: "utf-8" | "binary" }) {
      if (options?.encoding === "utf-8") {
        return fs.readFile(targetPath, "utf-8");
      }
      return new Uint8Array(await fs.readFile(targetPath));
    },
    async write(targetPath: string, content: string | Uint8Array) {
      await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(targetPath), { recursive: true });
      await fs.writeFile(targetPath, content);
    },
    async stat(targetPath: string) {
      const stats = await fs.stat(targetPath);
      return {
        path: targetPath,
        size: stats.size,
        isFile: stats.isFile(),
        isDirectory: stats.isDirectory(),
        mtimeMs: stats.mtimeMs,
      };
    },
    async list(dir: string) {
      return fs.readdir(dir);
    },
    async exists(targetPath: string) {
      try {
        await fs.access(targetPath);
        return true;
      } catch {
        return false;
      }
    },
    async mkdir(targetPath: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }) {
      await fs.mkdir(targetPath, { recursive: options?.recursive ?? true });
    },
    async delete(targetPath: string, options?: { recursive?: boolean }) {
      await fs.rm(targetPath, { recursive: options?.recursive ?? true, force: true });
    },
    async copy(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }) {
      if ((options?.overwrite ?? true) && (await this.exists(destination))) {
        await fs.rm(destination, { recursive: true, force: true });
      }
      await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(destination), { recursive: true });
      await fs.cp(source, destination, { recursive: true, force: options?.overwrite ?? true });
    },
    async move(source: string, destination: string, options?: { overwrite?: boolean }) {
      if ((options?.overwrite ?? true) && (await this.exists(destination))) {
        await fs.rm(destination, { recursive: true, force: true });
      }
      await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(destination), { recursive: true });
      await fs.rename(source, destination);
    },
  };
}

async function writeFixtureCard(cardDir: string) {
  await fs.mkdir(path.join(cardDir, ".card"), { recursive: true });
  await fs.mkdir(path.join(cardDir, "content"), { recursive: true });
  await fs.writeFile(
    path.join(cardDir, ".card", "metadata.yaml"),
    [
      'chip_standards_version: "1.0.0"',
      'card_id: "a1B2c3D4e5"',
      'name: "Demo Card"',
      'created_at: "2026-03-11T00:00:00.000Z"',
      'modified_at: "2026-03-11T00:00:00.000Z"',
      'editor_state:',
      '  mode: "edit"',
      "",
    ].join("\n"),
    "utf-8",
  );
  await fs.writeFile(
    path.join(cardDir, ".card", "structure.yaml"),
    [
      'structure:',
      '  - id: "node000001"',
      '    type: "base.richtext"',
      'manifest:',
      '  card_count: 1',
      '  resource_count: 0',
      "",
    ].join("\n"),
    "utf-8",
  );
  await fs.writeFile(
    path.join(cardDir, "content", "node000001.yaml"),
    ['id: "node000001"', 'card_type: "base.richtext"', 'title: "Existing"', 'body: "<p>Body</p>"', ""].join("\n"),
    "utf-8",
  );
}

function createClient(cardPluginInstallPath: string) {
  const file = createFileClient();
  return {
    file,
    zip: {
      async extract(zipPath: string, outputDir: string) {
        await fs.cp(zipPath, outputDir, { recursive: true });
      },
      async compress(inputDir: string, outputZip: string) {
        await fs.cp(inputDir, outputZip, { recursive: true });
      },
      async list() {
        return [];
      },
    },
    plugin: {
      async query() {
        return [
          {
            id: "chips.basecard.richtext",
            manifestPath: path.join(cardPluginInstallPath, "manifest.yaml"),
            enabled: true,
            version: "0.1.0",
            type: "card",
            name: "富文本基础卡片插件",
            installPath: cardPluginInstallPath,
            installedAt: 0,
            capabilities: ["base.richtext"],
          },
        ];
      },
    },
  } as never;
}

describe("card-package-service", () => {
  it("lists template-backed base card types", async () => {
    const service = createCardPackageService(createClient(path.resolve(process.cwd(), "../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP")));
    await expect(service.listAvailableBaseCardTypes()).resolves.toEqual([
      {
        pluginId: "chips.basecard.richtext",
        pluginName: "富文本基础卡片插件",
        cardType: "base.richtext",
        templatePath: path.resolve(process.cwd(), "../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/templates/default-card-config.yaml"),
      },
    ]);
  });

  it("adds, reorders, removes base cards and updates document mode", async () => {
    const cardDir = path.join(workspace, "demo.card");
    await writeFixtureCard(cardDir);
    const service = createCardPackageService(createClient(path.resolve(process.cwd(), "../Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP")));

    const added = await service.addBaseCard({
      cardFile: cardDir,
      cardType: "base.richtext",
      insertIndex: 1,
    });

    const structureAfterAdd = parseYamlLite(await fs.readFile(path.join(cardDir, ".card", "structure.yaml"), "utf-8"));
    expect(Array.isArray(structureAfterAdd.structure)).toBe(true);
    expect((structureAfterAdd.structure as Array<unknown>).length).toBe(2);
    expect(await fs.readFile(path.join(cardDir, "content", `${added.nodeId}.yaml`), "utf-8")).toContain('card_type: "base.richtext"');

    await service.reorderBaseCard({
      cardFile: cardDir,
      nodeId: added.nodeId,
      targetIndex: 0,
    });

    const structureAfterMove = parseYamlLite(await fs.readFile(path.join(cardDir, ".card", "structure.yaml"), "utf-8"));
    const movedNodes = structureAfterMove.structure as Array<{ id: string }>;
    expect(movedNodes[0]?.id).toBe(added.nodeId);

    await service.removeBaseCard({
      cardFile: cardDir,
      nodeId: added.nodeId,
    });

    const structureAfterRemove = parseYamlLite(await fs.readFile(path.join(cardDir, ".card", "structure.yaml"), "utf-8"));
    expect((structureAfterRemove.structure as Array<unknown>).length).toBe(1);
    await expect(fs.access(path.join(cardDir, "content", `${added.nodeId}.yaml`))).rejects.toBeDefined();

    await service.setDocumentMode({
      cardFile: cardDir,
      mode: "view",
    });

    const metadataAfterMode = parseYamlLite(await fs.readFile(path.join(cardDir, ".card", "metadata.yaml"), "utf-8"));
    expect(readDocumentMode({ metadata: metadataAfterMode })).toBe("view");
    expect(typeof metadataAfterMode.modified_at).toBe("string");
  });
});
EOF]
```

```
[bash -lc python3 - <<'PY'
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/03-数据流与接口适配设计.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"当前正式链路拆分为两类：\n\n1. 基础卡片编辑器挂载与语义读取：继续使用 `card.getBaseCard`、`card.renderBaseCardEditor`；\n2. 文档级写入：统一使用 `card-package-domain`，内部复用 `zip.extract` + `file.*` + `zip.compress`。\n\n文档写回正式链路（2026-03-11 调整后）：\n\n1. 预览 iframe 通过 `chips.composite:node-select` 选中基础卡片节点；\n2. 编辑引擎调用 `card.getBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId)` 获取当前基础卡片权威配置，并创建本地编辑会话；\n3. 编辑引擎调用 `card.renderBaseCardEditor({ cardFile, nodeId })` 挂载正式编辑器 iframe；\n4. 编辑器通过 `chips.basecard-editor:config-change` 上报标准化配置；\n5. 编辑域先更新本地历史快照与脏状态，再进入防抖保存调度；\n6. 防抖期满后，保存调度器调用 `card-package-domain`：解压 `.card`、改写 `content/{nodeId}.yaml`、更新 `metadata.yaml.modified_at`、重新打包并清理临时目录；\n7. 写回成功后，编辑引擎通过 `sync-config` 回推权威配置，并刷新当前预览文档；\n8. 若保存失败，编辑面板进入错误态，保留当前选中节点、历史栈和未保存配置，等待下一次变更或手动刷新。\n\n同一套文档写回域还承接：\n\n- 新增基础卡片；\n- 删除基础卡片；\n- 调整基础卡片顺序；\n- 切换 `metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode`。\n",
"当前正式链路拆分为两类：\n\n1. 基础卡片编辑器挂载与语义读取：继续使用 `card.getBaseCard`、`card.renderBaseCardEditor`；\n2. 单个基础卡片配置保存：继续使用 `card.updateBaseCard`，复用 Host 已有插件序列化能力；\n3. 文档结构写入与模式切换：使用 `card-package-domain`，内部复用 `zip.extract` + `file.*` + `zip.compress`。\n\n文档写回正式链路（2026-03-11 调整后）：\n\n1. 预览 iframe 通过 `chips.composite:node-select` 选中基础卡片节点；\n2. 编辑引擎调用 `card.getBaseCard(cardFile, nodeId)` 获取当前基础卡片权威配置，并创建本地编辑会话；\n3. 编辑引擎调用 `card.renderBaseCardEditor({ cardFile, nodeId })` 挂载正式编辑器 iframe；\n4. 编辑器通过 `chips.basecard-editor:config-change` 上报标准化配置；\n5. 编辑域先更新本地历史快照与脏状态，再进入防抖保存调度；\n6. 防抖期满后，保存调度器仍调用 `card.updateBaseCard`，由 Host 完成插件级配置序列化与单节点写回；\n7. 对新增、删除、重排和查看/编辑模式切换，则由 `card-package-domain` 负责解压 `.card`、改写正式文件、重新打包并清理临时目录；\n8. 写回成功后，编辑引擎通过 `sync-config` 回推权威配置，并刷新当前预览文档；\n9. 若保存失败，编辑面板进入错误态，保留当前选中节点、历史栈和未保存配置，等待下一次变更或手动刷新。\n\n`card-package-domain` 承接：\n\n- 新增基础卡片；\n- 删除基础卡片；\n- 调整基础卡片顺序；\n- 切换 `metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode`。\n"
)
text = text.replace(
"3. 保存调度器进入防抖期，并准备对当前节点执行卡片包写回事务。\n4. 卡片包事务成功后，编辑引擎通过 `markSaveSucceeded()` 更新权威配置，再通过 `chips.basecard-editor:sync-config` 回推规范化后的权威配置。\n",
"3. 保存调度器进入防抖期，并准备对当前节点执行 `card.updateBaseCard`。\n4. `card.updateBaseCard` 成功后，编辑引擎通过 `markSaveSucceeded()` 更新权威配置，再通过 `chips.basecard-editor:sync-config` 回推规范化后的权威配置。\n"
)
p.write_text(text)
PY]
```

```
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('项目日志与笔记/问题工单.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"- 问题类型：生态架构契约 / Host-SDK 复合卡片结构写入能力缺失 / 编辑模式治理能力缺失\n",
"- 问题类型：生态架构契约 / Host-SDK 文档治理粒度调整 / EditingEngine 复合卡片结构写入链路\n",
)
text = text.replace(
"- 期望行为：\n  - 生态需要先补齐并冻结复合卡片结构编辑正式契约，至少明确：\n    - 添加基础卡片的输入参数、插入位置表达、ID 生成责任边界；\n    - 删除基础卡片的确认与写回契约；\n    - 调整基础卡片顺序的正式结构更新接口；\n    - 结构变更后的预览刷新、自动保存、撤销/重做协作边界；\n    - 查看/编辑模式或锁定态的正式数据模型、持久化字段、事件与路由；\n    - 这些动作与 Host、SDK、编辑引擎、基础卡片插件之间的职责分工。\n- 暂行处理：\n  - 已记录工单，并停止继续推进“基础卡片增删改序 / 锁定态切换”这条开发线。\n  - 不采用应用端直接改写 `.card` 包内容、私设结构协议、仅做前端假状态或其他临时开发方案。\n- 需要协作方：生态架构契约维护方、`Chips-Host` 维护方、`Chips-SDK` 维护方、卡片文件格式与编辑协议维护方、编辑引擎项目维护方\n- 状态：待处理\n",
"- 期望行为：\n  - 以正式共享文档冻结低颗粒度文档治理方案：Host 提供 `file.*` / `zip.*` 底层能力，EditingEngine 在应用层完成 `.card` 结构写回编排；\n  - 权限模型支持 `file.manage` 这类粗粒度超集权限，避免每个编辑动作都新增一条 Host route；\n  - 卡片文件格式正式定义 `metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode` 与结构写回规则；\n  - EditingEngine 基于正式格式完成基础卡片新增、删除、重排与查看/编辑模式切换。\n- 暂行处理：\n  - 已按正式架构闭环：更新共享文档、补齐 Host `file.exists/mkdir/delete/copy/move`、SDK `file` / `zip` 封装、粗粒度权限匹配，以及 EditingEngine `card-package-domain`。\n  - 基础卡片单节点配置编辑继续走 `card.updateBaseCard`；结构编辑与模式切换走 `file.* + zip.*` 正式链路。\n- 需要协作方：生态架构契约维护方、`Chips-Host` 维护方、`Chips-SDK` 维护方、卡片文件格式与编辑协议维护方、编辑引擎项目维护方\n- 状态：已闭环\n",
)
p.write_text(text)

p = Path('项目日志与笔记/工单030-EDITING-ENGINE-COMPOSITE-STRUCTURE-MUTATION-CONTRACT-GAP/任务说明.md')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace(
"# 工单030：编辑引擎复合卡片结构编辑与锁定态正式契约缺失\n",
"# 工单030：编辑引擎复合卡片结构编辑与锁定态契约调整闭环记录\n",
)
text = text.replace(
"## 6. 当前结论\n\n当前生态还没有提供足以承接以下迁移项的正式契约：\n\n- 基础卡片增删改序；\n- 查看模式 / 编辑模式切换；\n- 锁定态持久化。\n\n因此，本工单成立，`Chips-EditingEngine` 必须在此处暂停继续推进该开发线，等待生态处理后再继续。\n",
"## 6. 当前结论\n\n本工单已按新的正式架构方向闭环：\n\n- Host 不再为编辑引擎的每个结构动作补专用业务 route；\n- 共享文档已冻结 `file.*` / `zip.*` 低颗粒度文档治理方案；\n- 权限模型已支持 `file.manage` 这类命名空间超集权限；\n- 卡片文件格式已正式定义 `metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode` 与结构写回规则；\n- `Chips-EditingEngine` 已新增 `card-package-domain`，承接基础卡片新增、删除、重排与查看/编辑模式切换。\n\n补充说明：\n\n- 单个基础卡片配置编辑继续走 `card.updateBaseCard`，以复用 Host 已有插件序列化能力；\n- 结构写入和模式切换走 `file.* + zip.*` 正式链路。\n",
)
p.write_text(text)
```

已把这次“先改文档、再落代码”的架构调整和实现一起落下来了，核心是把 EditingEngine 的文档治理改成“Host 提供低层能力，EditingEngine 自己按正式文件格式编排”。

- 共享架构与规范已更新，明确 `file.*` / `zip.*` 是基础设施级应用的正式低颗粒度能力，并冻结了 `.card` 的结构写回规则与 `metadata.yaml.editor_state.mode` 字段；见 `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/生态共用技术文档/协议与接口标准/02-Bridge-API规范.md:45`、`/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/生态共用技术文档/文件格式规范/01-卡片文件格式规范.md:147`、`/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/生态共用技术文档/文件格式规范/01-卡片文件格式规范.md:412`
- Host 已补齐底层文件能力和粗粒度权限匹配：新增 `file.exists/mkdir/delete/copy/move`，并让 `namespace.manage` 覆盖同命名空间精确权限；见 `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-Host/src/main/services/register-host-services.ts:1054`、`/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-Host/packages/pal/src/node-adapter.ts:484`、`/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-Host/packages/common-basics/src/permission.ts:1`
- SDK 已补齐正式封装：`file` API 现在正确解包 Host 响应并新增 `exists/mkdir/delete/copy/move`，同时新增 `zip` API；见 `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-SDK/src/api/file.ts:21`、`/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-SDK/src/api/zip.ts:1`、`/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-SDK/src/core/client.ts:13`
- EditingEngine 已新增正式 `card-package-domain`，通过 `zip.extract -> file.* -> zip.compress` 实现基础卡片新增、删除、重排和查看/编辑模式切换；见 `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/domains/card-package/card-package-service.ts:47`
- 编辑工作台已接上这些结构命令，并把查看模式接入 UI：可切换查看/编辑模式、添加基础卡片、上移/下移、删除当前基础卡片；查看模式下禁用编辑器挂载与结构操作；见 `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/editor/useBaseCardEditingSession.ts:147`、`/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/editor/useBaseCardEditingSession.ts:393`、`/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/editor/BaseCardWorkbench.tsx:79`
- EditingEngine 权限与工单状态也同步更新了：新增 `card.write`、`file.manage`、`zip.manage`，工单030已按新架构闭环；见 `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/manifest.yaml:20`、`/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/项目日志与笔记/问题工单.md:21`

问题定位到了，是我这次改动里引入的 Hook 顺序错误，不是 Host/SDK/权限链路的问题。

- 根因在 `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx:117`
- `EditorShell` 在 `loading || !snapshot` 时先 `return`，但后面还有一个 `useMemo(inspectorSections)`，这会触发 React #310
- 我已经把这里改掉了：不再在早返回之后调用 Hook，当前实现已恢复稳定渲染

另外这条日志：
- `Electron Security Warning (Insecure Content-Security-Policy)`
- 这是开发态 Electron 的常见警告，和这次崩溃无关；你这次真正导致页面炸掉的是 React #310

我已经重新验证：
- `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine` 执行了 `npm test`
- `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine` 执行了 `npm run build`
- `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine` 执行了 `npm run lint`

你现在可以直接重新启动编辑引擎/刷新 Host 里的这个应用，新的构建产物已经生成在：
- `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/dist`

这次实际修复文件：
- `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx`

```
for name,path in [('card','归档/Chips-Editor/src/core/state/stores/card.ts'),('editor','归档/Chips-Editor/src/core/state/stores/editor.ts'),('ui','归档/Chips-Editor/src/core/state/stores/ui.ts')]:

PY]
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-03-12 00:48:16Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell**</summary>

**Input:**

- command:

```
[bash -lc python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/01-迁移总体架构设计.md')
text = path.read_text()
old = "## 4. 旧项目到新项目的重构边界\n\n### 4.1 可迁移内容\n\n- 业务规则；\n- 用户工作流；\n- 功能划分；\n- 测试场景；\n- 旧项目中与具体运行时无关的状态模型和交互模型。\n\n### 4.2 必须重写内容\n"
new = "## 4. 旧项目到新项目的重构边界\n\n### 4.1 上层迁移总策略\n\n- 迁移顺序改为“先复制旧项目上层正确实现，再替换底层依赖并完成重构”，不再以全新界面重新发明旧能力。\n- 旧项目 `归档/Chips-Editor` 中已经被验证正确的布局语义、窗口模型、状态模型、工具面板职责、交互流必须优先保留。\n- 新项目中已完成的 React 壳层、运行时 Provider、`card-package-domain`、Host / SDK 低层适配，定位为新生态底座；后续上层迁移必须建立在这层底座之上，而不是替代旧项目上层产品语义。\n- 用户体验目标是“迁移后仍然像原来的编辑器”，差异仅允许出现在底层接口、运行时挂载方式、主题/i18n 接入与正式工程结构。\n\n### 4.2 可迁移内容\n\n- 业务规则；\n- 用户工作流；\n- 功能划分；\n- 旧项目中已经稳定的窗口布局和状态语义；\n- 测试场景；\n- 旧项目中与具体运行时无关的状态模型和交互模型。\n\n### 4.3 必须重写内容\n"
if old not in text:
    raise SystemExit('anchor not found for architecture doc')
text = text.replace(old, new)
old2 = "## 6. 当前首版架构决策\n\n1. 采用 React 作为首版迁移前端栈，直接延续生态主线技术选型。\n2. 先完成“Host 内运行的正式编辑器壳层”，再逐步迁入旧项目成熟业务域。\n3. 先保证双布局主链路闭环，再做高级能力增量补齐。\n4. 任何底层缺口一律通过工单推动生态修复，不在本项目内打补丁绕过。\n"
new2 = "## 6. 当前首版架构决策\n\n1. 继续以 React 作为新生态正式承载技术栈，但迁移方式不是重写旧产品，而是把旧项目上层模型和交互语义逐步映射到 React 壳层。\n2. 先冻结 Host / SDK / file.* / zip.* / theme / i18n 等底层契约，再把旧项目的窗口系统、双布局、工具面板、卡片工作流迁入新仓库。\n3. 旧项目上层 TypeScript 类型、状态模型、窗口管理语义优先保留并复制入新仓库，再做适配重构。\n4. 先保证旧项目双布局与工具窗口主链路在 Host 内闭环，再补高级能力与体验微调。\n5. 任何底层缺口一律通过工单推动生态修复，不在本项目内打补丁绕过。\n"
if old2 not in text:
    raise SystemExit('anchor2 not found for architecture doc')
text = text.replace(old2, new2)
path.write_text(text)

path = Path('Chips-EditingEngine/需求文档/02-功能需求与旧项目迁移矩阵.md')
```

```
/**
 * 旧编辑器窗口类型定义。
 * 该文件从归档项目上层模型迁移而来，用作新架构中的正式窗口语义基线。
 */

/** 窗口类型 */
export type WindowType = "card" | "tool" | "modal";

/** 窗口状态 */
export type WindowState = "normal" | "minimized" | "collapsed" | "cover";

/** 窗口位置 */
export interface WindowPosition {
  x: number;
  y: number;
}

/** 窗口大小 */
export interface WindowSize {
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

/** 窗口配置基础接口 */
export interface WindowConfig {
  id: string;
  type: WindowType;
  title: string;
  position: WindowPosition;
  size: WindowSize;
  state: WindowState;
  zIndex: number;
  resizable?: boolean;
  draggable?: boolean;
  closable?: boolean;
  minimizable?: boolean;
}

/** 卡片窗口配置 */
export interface CardWindowConfig extends WindowConfig {
  type: "card";
  cardId: string;
  isEditing: boolean;
  coverRatio?: string;
  cardType?: string;
}

/** 工具窗口配置 */
export interface ToolWindowConfig extends WindowConfig {
  type: "tool";
  component: string;
  icon?: string;
  dockable?: boolean;
}

/** 模态窗口配置 */
export interface ModalWindowConfig extends WindowConfig {
  type: "modal";
  mask?: boolean;
  maskClosable?: boolean;
}
EOF]
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell**</summary>

**Input:**

- command:

```
[bash -lc cat > Chips-EditingEngine/src/legacy/utils/id.ts <<'EOF'
/**
 * 旧编辑器 ID 生成工具。
 * 从归档项目迁移，用于保持窗口和节点标识生成语义一致。
 */

const ID_CHARS = "0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ";

function getRandomBytes(length: number): Uint8Array | null {
  if (typeof globalThis.crypto !== "undefined" && typeof globalThis.crypto.getRandomValues === "function") {
    const bytes = new Uint8Array(length);
    globalThis.crypto.getRandomValues(bytes);
    return bytes;
  }
  return null;
}

function buildIdFromRandom(length: number): string {
  const bytes = getRandomBytes(length);
  if (bytes) {
    let id = "";
    for (let index = 0; index < length; index += 1) {
      const value = bytes[index] ?? 0;
      id += ID_CHARS[value % ID_CHARS.length];
    }
    return id;
  }

  let fallbackId = "";
  for (let index = 0; index < length; index += 1) {
    fallbackId += ID_CHARS.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * ID_CHARS.length));
  }
  return fallbackId;
}

export function generateId62(length = 10): string {
  if (length <= 0) {
    throw new Error("ID length must be greater than 0");
  }

  const zeroId = "0".repeat(length);
  let id = buildIdFromRandom(length);
  while (id === zeroId) {
    id = buildIdFromRandom(length);
  }
  return id;
}

export function generateScopedId(prefix: string, length = 10): string {
  return `${prefix}_${generateId62(length)}`;
}
EOF]
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-03-12 00:51:10Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell**</summary>

**Input:**

- command:

```
[bash -lc cat > Chips-EditingEngine/src/domains/legacy-shell/legacy-window-state.ts <<'EOF'
import type { EditorLayoutMode } from "../../../config/app-config";
import type { WorkspaceDocument } from "../workspace/types";
import { generateScopedId } from "../../legacy/utils/id";
import type {
  CardWindowConfig,
  ToolWindowConfig,
  WindowConfig,
  WindowPosition,
  WindowSize,
  WindowState,
} from "../../legacy/types/window";

export type LegacyToolComponent = "FileManager" | "EditPanel" | "CardBoxLibrary";

export interface LegacyCanvasState {
  zoom: number;
  panX: number;
  panY: number;
}

export interface LegacyViewport {
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

export interface LegacyToolWindowTitles {
  fileManager: string;
  editPanel: string;
  cardLibrary: string;
}

export interface EditingDocumentWindowConfig extends CardWindowConfig {
  documentId: string;
  documentKind: WorkspaceDocument["kind"];
  path: string;
}

export interface EditingToolWindowConfig extends ToolWindowConfig {
  component: LegacyToolComponent;
}

export type EditingEngineWindowConfig = EditingDocumentWindowConfig | EditingToolWindowConfig;

export interface LegacyWindowShellState {
  layoutMode: EditorLayoutMode;
  windowList: EditingEngineWindowConfig[];
  focusedWindowId: string | null;
  maxZIndex: number;
  canvas: LegacyCanvasState;
}

const MIN_Z_INDEX = 100;

const TOOL_WINDOW_ORDER: Array<{
  key: keyof LegacyToolWindowTitles;
  component: LegacyToolComponent;
  icon: string;
  size: WindowSize;
  getPosition(viewport: LegacyViewport): WindowPosition;
}> = [
  {
    key: "fileManager",
    component: "FileManager",
    icon: "F",
    size: { width: 320, height: 520 },
    getPosition() {
      return { x: 24, y: 96 };
    },
  },
  {
    key: "editPanel",
    component: "EditPanel",
    icon: "E",
    size: { width: 340, height: 520 },
    getPosition(viewport) {
      return { x: Math.max(24, viewport.width - 364), y: 96 };
    },
  },
  {
    key: "cardLibrary",
    component: "CardBoxLibrary",
    icon: "C",
    size: { width: 360, height: 320 },
    getPosition(viewport) {
      return { x: 24, y: Math.max(96, viewport.height - 360) };
    },
  },
];

function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
}

function createToolWindow(
  component: LegacyToolComponent,
  title: string,
  icon: string,
  size: WindowSize,
  position: WindowPosition,
): EditingToolWindowConfig {
  return {
    id: `tool-window:${component}`,
    type: "tool",
    component,
    title,
    icon,
    position,
    size,
    state: "normal",
    zIndex: 0,
    resizable: true,
    draggable: true,
    closable: false,
    minimizable: true,
    dockable: true,
  };
}

function createDocumentWindow(document: WorkspaceDocument, index: number, layoutMode: EditorLayoutMode): EditingDocumentWindowConfig {
  const column = index % 3;
  const row = Math.floor(index / 3);
  const baseX = layoutMode === "infinite-canvas" ? 380 : 0;
  const baseY = layoutMode === "infinite-canvas" ? 132 : 0;
  return {
    id: generateScopedId("card-window"),
    type: "card",
    title: document.title,
    cardId: document.id,
    documentId: document.id,
    documentKind: document.kind,
    path: document.path,
    position: { x: baseX + column * 56, y: baseY + row * 48 },
    size: { width: 920, height: 640 },
    state: "normal",
    zIndex: 0,
    isEditing: document.kind === "card",
    cardType: document.kind,
    resizable: true,
    draggable: true,
    closable: true,
    minimizable: true,
  };
}

function elevateWindow(windows: EditingEngineWindowConfig[], windowId: string, nextZIndex: number) {
  return windows.map((windowItem) =>
    windowItem.id === windowId
      ? {
          ...windowItem,
          zIndex: nextZIndex,
        }
      : windowItem,
  );
}

function isDocumentWindow(windowItem: EditingEngineWindowConfig): windowItem is EditingDocumentWindowConfig {
  return windowItem.type === "card";
}

export function createInitialLegacyWindowShellState(layoutMode: EditorLayoutMode): LegacyWindowShellState {
  return {
    layoutMode,
    windowList: [],
    focusedWindowId: null,
    maxZIndex: MIN_Z_INDEX,
    canvas: {
      zoom: 1,
      panX: 0,
      panY: 0,
    },
  };
}

export function ensureToolWindows(
  state: LegacyWindowShellState,
  viewport: LegacyViewport,
  titles: LegacyToolWindowTitles,
): LegacyWindowShellState {
  let changed = false;
  const nextWindowList = [...state.windowList];

  for (const definition of TOOL_WINDOW_ORDER) {
    const expectedTitle = titles[definition.key];
    const index = nextWindowList.findIndex(
      (windowItem): windowItem is EditingToolWindowConfig =>
        windowItem.type === "tool" && windowItem.component === definition.component,
    );

    if (index === -1) {
      nextWindowList.push(
        createToolWindow(
          definition.component,
          expectedTitle,
          definition.icon,
          definition.size,
          definition.getPosition(viewport),
        ),
      );
      changed = true;
      continue;
    }

    const current = nextWindowList[index] as EditingToolWindowConfig;
    const nextPosition = definition.getPosition(viewport);
    if (current.title !== expectedTitle) {
      nextWindowList[index] = {
        ...current,
        title: expectedTitle,
        position: current.position.x < 0 || current.position.y < 0 ? nextPosition : current.position,
      };
      changed = true;
    }
  }

  return changed
    ? {
        ...state,
        windowList: nextWindowList,
      }
    : state;
}

export function syncDocumentWindows(
  state: LegacyWindowShellState,
  documents: WorkspaceDocument[],
): LegacyWindowShellState {
  const documentIds = new Set(documents.map((document) => document.id));
  const existingDocumentWindows = state.windowList.filter(isDocumentWindow);
  const nextWindows: EditingEngineWindowConfig[] = state.windowList.filter((windowItem) => {
    if (!isDocumentWindow(windowItem)) {
      return true;
    }
    return documentIds.has(windowItem.documentId);
  });

  let changed = nextWindows.length !== state.windowList.length;

  for (const [index, document] of documents.entries()) {
    const existing = existingDocumentWindows.find((windowItem) => windowItem.documentId === document.id);
    if (existing) {
      const targetIndex = nextWindows.findIndex((windowItem) => windowItem.id === existing.id);
      const updated: EditingDocumentWindowConfig = {
        ...existing,
        title: document.title,
        path: document.path,
        documentKind: document.kind,
        cardType: document.kind,
      };
      if (JSON.stringify(updated) !== JSON.stringify(nextWindows[targetIndex])) {
        nextWindows[targetIndex] = updated;
        changed = true;
      }
      continue;
    }

    nextWindows.push(createDocumentWindow(document, index, state.layoutMode));
    changed = true;
  }

  let nextFocusedWindowId = state.focusedWindowId;
  if (nextFocusedWindowId && !nextWindows.some((windowItem) => windowItem.id === nextFocusedWindowId)) {
    nextFocusedWindowId = nextWindows.find(isDocumentWindow)?.id ?? nextWindows[0]?.id ?? null;
    changed = true;
  }

  return changed
    ? {
        ...state,
        windowList: nextWindows,
        focusedWindowId: nextFocusedWindowId,
      }
    : state;
}

export function focusWindow(state: LegacyWindowShellState, windowId: string): LegacyWindowShellState {
  const target = state.windowList.find((windowItem) => windowItem.id === windowId);
  if (!target) {
    return state;
  }
  const nextZIndex = state.maxZIndex + 1;
  return {
    ...state,
    focusedWindowId: windowId,
    maxZIndex: nextZIndex,
    windowList: elevateWindow(state.windowList, windowId, nextZIndex),
  };
}

export function closeWindow(state: LegacyWindowShellState, windowId: string): LegacyWindowShellState {
  const nextWindowList = state.windowList.filter((windowItem) => windowItem.id !== windowId);
  return {
    ...state,
    windowList: nextWindowList,
    focusedWindowId: state.focusedWindowId === windowId ? nextWindowList[0]?.id ?? null : state.focusedWindowId,
  };
}

export function moveWindow(
  state: LegacyWindowShellState,
  windowId: string,
  position: WindowPosition,
): LegacyWindowShellState {
  return {
    ...state,
    windowList: state.windowList.map((windowItem) =>
      windowItem.id === windowId
        ? {
            ...windowItem,
            position,
          }
        : windowItem,
    ),
  };
}

export function resizeWindow(
  state: LegacyWindowShellState,
  windowId: string,
  size: WindowSize,
): LegacyWindowShellState {
  const width = clamp(size.width, 240, 1600);
  const height = clamp(size.height, 180, 1200);
  return {
    ...state,
    windowList: state.windowList.map((windowItem) =>
      windowItem.id === windowId
        ? {
            ...windowItem,
            size: { width, height },
          }
        : windowItem,
    ),
  };
}

export function setWindowState(
  state: LegacyWindowShellState,
  windowId: string,
  nextState: WindowState,
): LegacyWindowShellState {
  return {
    ...state,
    windowList: state.windowList.map((windowItem) =>
      windowItem.id === windowId
        ? {
            ...windowItem,
            state: nextState,
          }
        : windowItem,
    ),
  };
}

export function setLayoutMode(
  state: LegacyWindowShellState,
  layoutMode: EditorLayoutMode,
): LegacyWindowShellState {
  if (state.layoutMode === layoutMode) {
    return state;
  }
  return {
    ...state,
    layoutMode,
  };
}

export function zoomCanvas(state: LegacyWindowShellState, delta: number): LegacyWindowShellState {
  return {
    ...state,
    canvas: {
      ...state.canvas,
      zoom: clamp(state.canvas.zoom + delta, 0.4, 2.5),
    },
  };
}

export function resetCanvas(state: LegacyWindowShellState): LegacyWindowShellState {
  return {
    ...state,
    canvas: {
      zoom: 1,
      panX: 0,
      panY: 0,
    },
  };
}

export function panCanvas(state: LegacyWindowShellState, deltaX: number, deltaY: number): LegacyWindowShellState {
  return {
    ...state,
    canvas: {
      ...state.canvas,
      panX: state.canvas.panX + deltaX,
      panY: state.canvas.panY + deltaY,
    },
  };
}

export function getDocumentWindow(
  windows: EditingEngineWindowConfig[],
  documentId: string | null,
): EditingDocumentWindowConfig | null {
  if (!documentId) {
    return null;
  }
  const target = windows.find(
    (windowItem): windowItem is EditingDocumentWindowConfig =>
      windowItem.type === "card" && windowItem.documentId === documentId,
  );
  return target ?? null;
}

export function getToolWindow(
  windows: EditingEngineWindowConfig[],
  component: LegacyToolComponent,
): EditingToolWindowConfig | null {
  const target = windows.find(
    (windowItem): windowItem is EditingToolWindowConfig =>
      windowItem.type === "tool" && windowItem.component === component,
  );
  return target ?? null;
}

export function getDockWindows(windows: EditingEngineWindowConfig[]): EditingEngineWindowConfig[] {
  return windows.filter((windowItem) => windowItem.state === "minimized");
}

export function getVisibleCanvasWindows(windows: EditingEngineWindowConfig[]): EditingEngineWindowConfig[] {
  return windows.filter((windowItem) => windowItem.state !== "minimized");
}

export function getActiveDocumentWindow(
  windows: EditingEngineWindowConfig[],
  focusedWindowId: string | null,
  activeDocumentId: string | null,
): EditingDocumentWindowConfig | null {
  const focused = windows.find(
    (windowItem): windowItem is EditingDocumentWindowConfig =>
      windowItem.type === "card" && windowItem.id === focusedWindowId,
  );
  if (focused) {
    return focused;
  }
  return getDocumentWindow(windows, activeDocumentId);
}

export function getWindow(windowList: EditingEngineWindowConfig[], windowId: string): EditingEngineWindowConfig | null {
  return windowList.find((windowItem) => windowItem.id === windowId) ?? null;
}

export function isDocumentDropEnabled(document: WorkspaceDocument | null): boolean {
  return document?.kind === "card";
}

export function getDocumentStructureLength(document: WorkspaceDocument | null): number {
  if (!document || document.kind !== "card") {
    return 0;
  }
  const structure = Array.isArray(document.ast.structure?.structure)
    ? document.ast.structure.structure
    : [];
  return structure.length;
}

export function setDocumentEditing(
  state: LegacyWindowShellState,
  documentId: string,
  isEditing: boolean,
): LegacyWindowShellState {
  return {
    ...state,
    windowList: state.windowList.map((windowItem) =>
      windowItem.type === "card" && windowItem.documentId === documentId
        ? {
            ...windowItem,
            isEditing,
          }
        : windowItem,
    ),
  };
}

export function getDocumentWindows(windows: EditingEngineWindowConfig[]): EditingDocumentWindowConfig[] {
  return windows.filter(isDocumentWindow);
}

export function isToolWindow(windowItem: WindowConfig): windowItem is EditingToolWindowConfig {
  return windowItem.type === "tool";
}
EOF]
```
