```
[bash -lc cat > Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx <<'EOF'
import React, {
  useCallback,
  useEffect,
  useMemo,
  useRef,
  useState,
  type CSSProperties,
  type ReactNode,
} from "react";
import { ChipsButton, ChipsEmptyState } from "@chips/component-library";
import type { Client } from "chips-sdk";
import { useEditorPanel } from "../../app/providers/editor-panel-context";
import { useEditorRuntime } from "../../app/providers/editor-runtime-context";
import { useWorkspaceSession } from "../../app/providers/workspace-session-context";
import { createCardPackageService, type AvailableBaseCardType } from "../../domains/card-package/card-package-service";
import {
  closeWindow,
  createInitialLegacyWindowShellState,
  ensureToolWindows,
  focusWindow,
  getActiveDocumentWindow,
  getDockWindows,
  getDocumentStructureLength,
  getDocumentWindow,
  getDocumentWindows,
  getToolWindow,
  getVisibleCanvasWindows,
  moveWindow,
  panCanvas,
  resetCanvas,
  resizeWindow,
  setDocumentEditing,
  setLayoutMode as setLegacyLayoutMode,
  setWindowState,
  syncDocumentWindows,
  zoomCanvas,
  type EditingDocumentWindowConfig,
  type EditingEngineWindowConfig,
  type EditingToolWindowConfig,
  type LegacyToolComponent,
  type LegacyToolWindowTitles,
  type LegacyViewport,
} from "../../domains/legacy-shell/legacy-window-state";
import type { BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot } from "../../domains/editor/types";
import type { WorkspaceDocument } from "../../domains/workspace/types";
import { detectWorkspaceDocumentKind } from "../../domains/workspace/workspace-service";
import { getEditorPanelWidthPx } from "../../domains/editor-panel/editor-panel-state-service";
import { BaseCardWorkbench } from "../editor/BaseCardWorkbench";
import { EditorSettingsDialog } from "../settings/EditorSettingsDialog";
import { WorkspaceRepositoryTree } from "./WorkspaceRepositoryTree";
import { createTranslator } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-i18n";
import { getLaunchTargetPath, getVisibleThemes } from "../../shared/runtime/editor-runtime-service";
import "./editor-shell.css";
import "./legacy-shell.css";

const CARD_LIBRARY_MIME = "application/x-chips-base-card";

interface FloatingWindowProps {
  windowConfig: EditingEngineWindowConfig;
  active: boolean;
  children: ReactNode;
  badge?: string;
  onFocus(): void;
  onMove(position: { x: number; y: number }): void;
  onResize(size: { width: number; height: number }): void;
  onMinimize?(): void;
  onClose?(): void;
}

function FloatingWindow(props: FloatingWindowProps) {
  const elementRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
  const dragStateRef = useRef<{ pointerId: number; originX: number; originY: number; startX: number; startY: number } | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const element = elementRef.current;
    if (!element || typeof ResizeObserver === "undefined") {
      return undefined;
    }

    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
      const entry = entries[0];
      if (!entry) {
        return;
      }
      const width = Math.round(entry.contentRect.width);
      const height = Math.round(entry.contentRect.height);
      if (
        width !== props.windowConfig.size.width ||
        height !== props.windowConfig.size.height
      ) {
        props.onResize({ width, height });
      }
    });

    observer.observe(element);
    return () => {
      observer.disconnect();
    };
  }, [props, props.windowConfig.size.height, props.windowConfig.size.width]);

  const handlePointerMove = useCallback(
    (event: PointerEvent) => {
      const dragState = dragStateRef.current;
      if (!dragState || dragState.pointerId !== event.pointerId) {
        return;
      }
      props.onMove({
        x: Math.round(dragState.startX + event.clientX - dragState.originX),
        y: Math.round(dragState.startY + event.clientY - dragState.originY),
      });
    },
    [props],
  );

  const stopDragging = useCallback(() => {
    if (!dragStateRef.current) {
      return;
    }
    window.removeEventListener("pointermove", handlePointerMove);
    window.removeEventListener("pointerup", stopDragging);
    dragStateRef.current = null;
  }, [handlePointerMove]);

  const handlePointerDown = useCallback(
    (event: React.PointerEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
      if (!(props.windowConfig.draggable ?? false)) {
        return;
      }
      if ((event.target as HTMLElement).closest("button")) {
        return;
      }
      props.onFocus();
      dragStateRef.current = {
        pointerId: event.pointerId,
        originX: event.clientX,
        originY: event.clientY,
        startX: props.windowConfig.position.x,
        startY: props.windowConfig.position.y,
      };
      window.addEventListener("pointermove", handlePointerMove);
      window.addEventListener("pointerup", stopDragging);
    },
    [handlePointerMove, props, stopDragging],
  );

  useEffect(() => stopDragging, [stopDragging]);

  const style = useMemo(
    () =>
      ({
        left: props.windowConfig.position.x,
        top: props.windowConfig.position.y,
        width: props.windowConfig.size.width,
        height: props.windowConfig.state === "minimized" ? 52 : props.windowConfig.size.height,
        zIndex: props.windowConfig.zIndex,
      }) satisfies CSSProperties,
    [props.windowConfig],
  );

  return (
    <section
      ref={elementRef}
      className={`legacy-shell__floating-window ${props.active ? "legacy-shell__floating-window--active" : ""}`}
      style={style}
      onMouseDown={props.onFocus}
    >
      <header className="legacy-shell__floating-header" onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}>
        <div className="legacy-shell__floating-title">
          <strong>{props.windowConfig.title}</strong>
          {props.badge ? <span>{props.badge}</span> : null}
        </div>
        <div className="legacy-shell__floating-actions">
          {props.windowConfig.minimizable !== false && props.onMinimize ? (
            <button type="button" aria-label="minimize" onClick={props.onMinimize}>
              -
            </button>
          ) : null}
          {props.windowConfig.closable !== false && props.onClose ? (
            <button type="button" aria-label="close" onClick={props.onClose}>
              x
            </button>
          ) : null}
        </div>
      </header>
      {props.windowConfig.state === "minimized" ? null : <div className="legacy-shell__floating-content">{props.children}</div>}
    </section>
  );
}

function BoxDocumentStage(props: { document: WorkspaceDocument; translate(key: string): string; onRefresh(): Promise<void>; onClose(): void }) {
  return (
    <div className="editor-shell__document-stage">
      <div className="editor-shell__preview-actions">
        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => void props.onRefresh()}>
          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshDocument")}
        </ChipsButton>
        <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={props.onClose}>
          {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.closeDocument")}
        </ChipsButton>
      </div>
      <div className="legacy-shell__box-panel">
        <strong>{props.translate("editingEngine.documents.box")}</strong>
        <span>{props.document.path}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function QuickCardLibrary(props: {
  activeDocument: WorkspaceDocument | null;
  cardTypes: AvailableBaseCardType[];
  structureBusy: boolean;
  translate(key: string): string;
  onAdd(cardType: string, targetDocument?: WorkspaceDocument | null): Promise<void>;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="legacy-shell__panel-stack">
      <div className="legacy-shell__panel-header legacy-shell__panel-header--tight">
        <div>
          <h3>{props.translate("editingEngine.legacy.cardLibraryTitle")}</h3>
          <p>{props.translate("editingEngine.legacy.cardLibraryDescription")}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      {props.cardTypes.length === 0 ? (
        <div className="legacy-shell__muted-card">{props.translate("editingEngine.legacy.cardLibraryEmpty")}</div>
      ) : (
        <div className="legacy-shell__library-grid">
          {props.cardTypes.map((item) => (
            <button
              key={`${item.pluginId}:${item.cardType}`}
              type="button"
              className="legacy-shell__library-item"
              draggable={Boolean(props.activeDocument && props.activeDocument.kind === "card")}
              onDragStart={(event) => {
                event.dataTransfer.setData(CARD_LIBRARY_MIME, item.cardType);
                event.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = "copy";
              }}
              onClick={() => {
                void props.onAdd(item.cardType, props.activeDocument);
              }}
              disabled={props.structureBusy || props.activeDocument?.kind !== "card"}
            >
              <strong>{item.pluginName}</strong>
              <span>{item.cardType}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function InspectorPanel(props: {
  snapshot: ReturnType<typeof useEditorRuntime>["snapshot"];
  activeDocument: WorkspaceDocument | null;
  editorSessionSnapshot: BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot | null;
  translate(key: string): string;
  onOpenSettings(): void;
  onRefreshDocument(): Promise<void>;
}) {
  const editorPanel = useEditorPanel();
  const panelWidth = getEditorPanelWidthPx(editorPanel.state.widthPreset);
  return (
    <div className="legacy-shell__panel-stack">
      <div className="legacy-shell__panel-header legacy-shell__panel-header--tight">
        <div>
          <h3>{props.translate("editingEngine.legacy.editPanelTitle")}</h3>
          <p>{props.translate("editingEngine.legacy.editPanelDescription")}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="legacy-shell__inline-actions">
          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => void props.onRefreshDocument()}>
            {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshDocument")}
          </ChipsButton>
          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={props.onOpenSettings}>
            {props.translate("editingEngine.actions.openSettings")}
          </ChipsButton>
        </div>
      </div>
      <dl className="editor-shell__detail-list editor-shell__detail-list--compact">
        <div>
          <span>{props.translate("editingEngine.fields.documentName")}</span>
          <strong>{props.activeDocument?.title ?? props.translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}</strong>
        </div>
        <div>
          <span>{props.translate("editingEngine.fields.documentPath")}</span>
          <strong>{props.activeDocument?.path ?? props.translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}</strong>
        </div>
        <div>
          <span>{props.translate("editingEngine.fields.selectedBaseCard")}</span>
          <strong>
            {props.editorSessionSnapshot?.selectedNode?.title ??
              props.editorSessionSnapshot?.selectedNode?.nodeId ??
              props.translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}
          </strong>
        </div>
        <div>
          <span>{props.translate("editingEngine.fields.editorSaveState")}</span>
          <strong>{props.translate(`editingEngine.editorState.${props.editorSessionSnapshot?.saveState ?? "idle"}`)}</strong>
        </div>
        <div>
          <span>{props.translate("editingEngine.fields.editorDirtyState")}</span>
          <strong>
            {props.editorSessionSnapshot?.dirty
              ? props.translate("editingEngine.editor.dirty")
              : props.translate("editingEngine.editor.clean")}
          </strong>
        </div>
        <div>
          <span>{props.translate("editingEngine.legacy.editorPanelWidth")}</span>
          <strong>{`${panelWidth}px`}</strong>
        </div>
        <div>
          <span>{props.translate("editingEngine.fields.locale")}</span>
          <strong>{props.snapshot?.locale ?? props.translate("editingEngine.values.notAvailable")}</strong>
        </div>
      </dl>
    </div>
  );
}

function DocumentSurface(props: {
  client: Client;
  document: WorkspaceDocument;
  translate(key: string): string;
  onRefresh(): Promise<void>;
  onClose(): void;
  onSessionStateChange(snapshot: BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot): void;
  onDropBaseCard(cardType: string, target: WorkspaceDocument): Promise<void>;
}) {
  const droppable = props.document.kind === "card";
  return (
    <div
      className={`legacy-shell__document-surface ${droppable ? "legacy-shell__document-surface--droppable" : ""}`}
      onDragOver={(event) => {
        if (!droppable) {
          return;
        }
        if (event.dataTransfer.types.includes(CARD_LIBRARY_MIME)) {
          event.preventDefault();
          event.dataTransfer.dropEffect = "copy";
        }
      }}
      onDrop={(event) => {
        if (!droppable) {
          return;
        }
        const cardType = event.dataTransfer.getData(CARD_LIBRARY_MIME);
        if (!cardType) {
          return;
        }
        event.preventDefault();
        void props.onDropBaseCard(cardType, props.document);
      }}
    >
      {props.document.kind === "card" ? (
        <BaseCardWorkbench
          client={props.client}
          document={props.document}
          translate={props.translate}
          onRefresh={props.onRefresh}
          onClose={props.onClose}
          onSessionStateChange={props.onSessionStateChange}
        />
      ) : (
        <BoxDocumentStage
          document={props.document}
          translate={props.translate}
          onRefresh={props.onRefresh}
          onClose={props.onClose}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export function EditorShell() {
  const { snapshot, loading, busyAction, error, refresh, setTheme, setLocale, setLayoutMode } = useEditorRuntime();
  const {
    activeDocument,
    activeDocumentId,
    documents,
    recentTargets,
    repositoryRoots,
    busy: workspaceBusy,
    error: workspaceError,
    repositoryLoading,
    repositoryError,
    openDocument,
    openDocumentFromDialog,
    activateDocument,
    closeDocument,
    refreshActiveDocument,
    refreshRepository,
    clearRecentTargets,
  } = useWorkspaceSession();
  const [settingsOpen, setSettingsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editorSessionSnapshot, setEditorSessionSnapshot] = useState<BaseCardEditorSessionSnapshot | null>(null);
  const [cardTypes, setCardTypes] = useState<AvailableBaseCardType[]>([]);
  const [structureBusy, setStructureBusy] = useState(false);
  const [viewport, setViewport] = useState<LegacyViewport>(() => ({
    width: typeof window === "undefined" ? 1440 : window.innerWidth,
    height: typeof window === "undefined" ? 900 : window.innerHeight,
  }));
  const translate = useMemo(() => createTranslator(snapshot?.locale ?? "zh-CN"), [snapshot?.locale]);
  const [windowState, setWindowStateValue] = useState(() => createInitialLegacyWindowShellState("workbench"));
  const canvasPanRef = useRef<{ originX: number; originY: number; panX: number; panY: number } | null>(null);

  const toolTitles = useMemo<LegacyToolWindowTitles>(
    () => ({
      fileManager: translate("editingEngine.legacy.fileManagerTitle"),
      editPanel: translate("editingEngine.legacy.editPanelTitle"),
      cardLibrary: translate("editingEngine.legacy.cardLibraryTitle"),
    }),
    [translate],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleResize = () => {
      setViewport({ width: window.innerWidth, height: window.innerHeight });
    };
    window.addEventListener("resize", handleResize);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("resize", handleResize);
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!snapshot) {
      return;
    }

    setWindowStateValue((current) => {
      let next = setLegacyLayoutMode(current, snapshot.preferredLayout);
      next = ensureToolWindows(next, viewport, toolTitles);
      next = syncDocumentWindows(next, documents);
      if (activeDocumentId) {
        const windowConfig = getDocumentWindow(next.windowList, activeDocumentId);
        if (windowConfig) {
          next = focusWindow(next, windowConfig.id);
        }
      }
      return next;
    });
  }, [activeDocumentId, documents, snapshot, toolTitles, viewport]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!snapshot) {
      return;
    }
    const service = createCardPackageService(snapshot.client);
    let cancelled = false;
    const load = async () => {
      const nextCardTypes = await service.listAvailableBaseCardTypes();
      if (!cancelled) {
        setCardTypes(nextCardTypes);
      }
    };
    void load();
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, [snapshot]);

  const visibleThemes = useMemo(() => getVisibleThemes(snapshot?.availableThemes ?? []), [snapshot?.availableThemes]);
  const launchTargetPath = useMemo(() => (snapshot ? getLaunchTargetPath(snapshot) : null), [snapshot]);
  const documentMap = useMemo(() => new Map(documents.map((document) => [document.id, document])), [documents]);
  const documentWindows = useMemo(() => getDocumentWindows(windowState.windowList), [windowState.windowList]);
  const activeWindow = useMemo(
    () => getActiveDocumentWindow(windowState.windowList, windowState.focusedWindowId, activeDocumentId),
    [activeDocumentId, windowState.focusedWindowId, windowState.windowList],
  );
  const activeWindowDocument = activeWindow ? documentMap.get(activeWindow.documentId) ?? null : activeDocument;
  const fileManagerWindow = useMemo(() => getToolWindow(windowState.windowList, "FileManager"), [windowState.windowList]);
  const editPanelWindow = useMemo(() => getToolWindow(windowState.windowList, "EditPanel"), [windowState.windowList]);
  const cardLibraryWindow = useMemo(() => getToolWindow(windowState.windowList, "CardBoxLibrary"), [windowState.windowList]);
  const dockWindows = useMemo(() => getDockWindows(windowState.windowList), [windowState.windowList]);
  const visibleCanvasWindows = useMemo(() => getVisibleCanvasWindows(windowState.windowList), [windowState.windowList]);

  const focusDocument = useCallback(
    (documentId: string) => {
      const windowConfig = getDocumentWindow(windowState.windowList, documentId);
      activateDocument(documentId);
      if (windowConfig) {
        setWindowStateValue((current) => focusWindow(current, windowConfig.id));
      }
    },
    [activateDocument, windowState.windowList],
  );

  const handleSetLayoutMode = useCallback(
    async (layoutMode: "infinite-canvas" | "workbench") => {
      await setLayoutMode(layoutMode);
      setWindowStateValue((current) => setLegacyLayoutMode(current, layoutMode));
    },
    [setLayoutMode],
  );

  const handleAddBaseCard = useCallback(
    async (cardType: string, targetDocument = activeWindowDocument) => {
      if (!snapshot || !targetDocument || targetDocument.kind !== "card") {
        return;
      }
      setStructureBusy(true);
      try {
        const service = createCardPackageService(snapshot.client);
        await service.addBaseCard({
          cardFile: targetDocument.path,
          cardType,
          insertIndex: getDocumentStructureLength(targetDocument),
        });
        await openDocument(targetDocument.path);
      } finally {
        setStructureBusy(false);
      }
    },
    [activeWindowDocument, openDocument, snapshot],
  );

  const handleWindowFocus = useCallback(
    (windowId: string) => {
      const windowConfig = windowState.windowList.find((item) => item.id === windowId);
      if (!windowConfig) {
        return;
      }
      setWindowStateValue((current) => focusWindow(current, windowId));
      if (windowConfig.type === "card") {
        activateDocument(windowConfig.documentId);
      }
    },
    [activateDocument, windowState.windowList],
  );

  const handleDocumentRefresh = useCallback(
    async (document: WorkspaceDocument) => {
      await openDocument(document.path);
    },
    [openDocument],
  );

  const handleCloseWindow = useCallback(
    async (windowConfig: EditingEngineWindowConfig) => {
      if (windowConfig.type === "card") {
        closeDocument(windowConfig.documentId);
      }
      setWindowStateValue((current) => closeWindow(current, windowConfig.id));
    },
    [closeDocument],
  );

  const handleToggleWindowMinimized = useCallback((windowConfig: EditingEngineWindowConfig) => {
    setWindowStateValue((current) =>
      setWindowState(current, windowConfig.id, windowConfig.state === "minimized" ? "normal" : "minimized"),
    );
  }, []);

  const handleCanvasWheel = useCallback((event: React.WheelEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
    if (windowState.layoutMode !== "infinite-canvas") {
      return;
    }
    event.preventDefault();
    if (event.ctrlKey || event.metaKey) {
      setWindowStateValue((current) => zoomCanvas(current, event.deltaY > 0 ? -0.08 : 0.08));
      return;
    }
    setWindowStateValue((current) => panCanvas(current, -event.deltaX, -event.deltaY));
  }, [windowState.layoutMode]);

  const handleCanvasPointerDown = useCallback((event: React.PointerEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
    if (event.target !== event.currentTarget) {
      return;
    }
    canvasPanRef.current = {
      originX: event.clientX,
      originY: event.clientY,
      panX: windowState.canvas.panX,
      panY: windowState.canvas.panY,
    };
  }, [windowState.canvas.panX, windowState.canvas.panY]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handlePointerMove = (event: PointerEvent) => {
      const panState = canvasPanRef.current;
      if (!panState) {
        return;
      }
      setWindowStateValue((current) => ({
        ...current,
        canvas: {
          ...current.canvas,
          panX: Math.round(panState.panX + event.clientX - panState.originX),
          panY: Math.round(panState.panY + event.clientY - panState.originY),
        },
      }));
    };
    const stop = () => {
      canvasPanRef.current = null;
    };
    window.addEventListener("pointermove", handlePointerMove);
    window.addEventListener("pointerup", stop);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("pointermove", handlePointerMove);
      window.removeEventListener("pointerup", stop);
    };
  }, []);

  const renderToolWindowContent = useCallback(
    (component: LegacyToolComponent) => {
      if (component === "FileManager") {
        return (
          <div className="legacy-shell__tool-body">
            <WorkspaceRepositoryTree
              roots={repositoryRoots}
              loading={repositoryLoading}
              error={repositoryError}
              activeDocumentPath={activeWindowDocument?.path ?? null}
              emptyTitle={translate("editingEngine.workspace.emptyTitle")}
              emptyDescription={translate("editingEngine.workspace.emptyDescription")}
              retryLabel={translate("editingEngine.actions.refreshWorkspace")}
              openFolderLabel={translate("editingEngine.actions.openDocument")}
              onOpenDocument={openDocument}
              onOpenDocumentFromDialog={openDocumentFromDialog}
              onRefresh={refreshRepository}
            />
            {recentTargets.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="legacy-shell__recent-card">
                <div className="legacy-shell__panel-header legacy-shell__panel-header--tight">
                  <div>
                    <h3>{translate("editingEngine.workspace.recent")}</h3>
                    <p>{translate("editingEngine.legacy.recentDescription")}</p>
                  </div>
                  <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => void clearRecentTargets()}>
                    {translate("editingEngine.actions.clearRecentTargets")}
                  </ChipsButton>
                </div>
                <div className="editor-shell__recent-list">
                  {recentTargets.map((item) => (
                    <button
                      key={`${item.path}:${item.openedAt}`}
                      type="button"
                      className="editor-shell__recent-item"
                      onClick={() => {
                        void openDocument(item.path);
                      }}
                    >
                      <strong>{item.title}</strong>
                      <span>{item.path}</span>
                      <em>{item.kind}</em>
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : null}
          </div>
        );
      }
      if (component === "CardBoxLibrary") {
        return (
          <QuickCardLibrary
            activeDocument={activeWindowDocument}
            cardTypes={cardTypes}
            structureBusy={structureBusy}
            translate={translate}
            onAdd={handleAddBaseCard}
          />
        );
      }
      return (
        <InspectorPanel
          snapshot={snapshot}
          activeDocument={activeWindowDocument}
          editorSessionSnapshot={editorSessionSnapshot}
          translate={translate}
          onOpenSettings={() => setSettingsOpen(true)}
          onRefreshDocument={refreshActiveDocument}
        />
      );
    },
    [
      activeWindowDocument,
      cardTypes,
      clearRecentTargets,
      editorSessionSnapshot,
      handleAddBaseCard,
      openDocument,
      openDocumentFromDialog,
      recentTargets,
      refreshActiveDocument,
      refreshRepository,
      repositoryError,
      repositoryLoading,
      repositoryRoots,
      snapshot,
      structureBusy,
      translate,
    ],
  );

  if (loading || !snapshot) {
    return (
      <div className="editor-shell editor-shell--centered">
        <div className="editor-shell__loading-card">
          <h1>{translate("editingEngine.shell.loadingTitle")}</h1>
          <p>{translate("editingEngine.shell.loadingDescription")}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const canvasStyle = {
    transform: `translate(${windowState.canvas.panX}px, ${windowState.canvas.panY}px) scale(${windowState.canvas.zoom})`,
  } satisfies CSSProperties;

  return (
    <div className="legacy-shell">
      <EditorSettingsDialog
        open={settingsOpen}
        onOpenChange={setSettingsOpen}
        translate={translate}
        snapshot={snapshot}
        visibleThemes={visibleThemes}
        busyAction={busyAction}
        activeDocument={activeWindowDocument}
        recentTargetsCount={recentTargets.length}
        panelState={useEditorPanel().state}
        panelBusy={useEditorPanel().busy}
        onSetTheme={setTheme}
        onSetLocale={setLocale}
        onSetLayoutMode={handleSetLayoutMode}
        onClearRecentTargets={clearRecentTargets}
        onSetPanelCollapsed={useEditorPanel().setCollapsed}
        onSetPanelWidthPreset={useEditorPanel().setWidthPreset}
        onSetPanelAutoOpen={useEditorPanel().setAutoOpenOnSelection}
      />

      <header className="legacy-shell__topbar">
        <div className="legacy-shell__brand">
          <span className="legacy-shell__eyebrow">{translate("editingEngine.shell.eyebrow")}</span>
          <div>
            <h1>{snapshot.plugin.name}</h1>
            <p>{translate("editingEngine.legacy.subtitle")}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="legacy-shell__actions">
          <ChipsButton variant="primary" disabled={workspaceBusy} onPress={() => void openDocumentFromDialog()}>
            {translate("editingEngine.actions.openDocument")}
          </ChipsButton>
          <ChipsButton
            variant={windowState.layoutMode === "workbench" ? "primary" : "secondary"}
            onPress={() => {
              void handleSetLayoutMode("workbench");
            }}
          >
            {translate("editingEngine.layout.workbench")}
          </ChipsButton>
          <ChipsButton
            variant={windowState.layoutMode === "infinite-canvas" ? "primary" : "secondary"}
            onPress={() => {
              void handleSetLayoutMode("infinite-canvas");
            }}
          >
            {translate("editingEngine.layout.infiniteCanvas")}
          </ChipsButton>
          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" disabled={busyAction === "refresh"} onPress={() => void refresh()}>
            {translate("editingEngine.actions.refresh")}
          </ChipsButton>
          <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => setSettingsOpen(true)}>
            {translate("editingEngine.actions.openSettings")}
          </ChipsButton>
        </div>
      </header>

      {error ? <p className="editor-shell__error-banner">{error}</p> : null}
      {workspaceError ? <p className="editor-shell__error-banner">{workspaceError}</p> : null}
      {launchTargetPath ? <p className="legacy-shell__launch-banner">{launchTargetPath}</p> : null}

      {windowState.layoutMode === "workbench" ? (
        <main className="legacy-shell__workbench">
          <aside className="legacy-shell__workbench-side legacy-shell__workbench-side--left">
            {fileManagerWindow ? renderToolWindowContent(fileManagerWindow.component) : null}
            {cardLibraryWindow ? renderToolWindowContent(cardLibraryWindow.component) : null}
          </aside>
          <section className="legacy-shell__workbench-main">
            <div className="legacy-shell__tabs">
              {documentWindows.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="legacy-shell__empty-tab">{translate("editingEngine.workspace.emptyTitle")}</div>
              ) : (
                documentWindows.map((windowConfig) => {
                  const document = documentMap.get(windowConfig.documentId);
                  if (!document) {
                    return null;
                  }
                  return (
                    <div
                      key={windowConfig.id}
                      className={`legacy-shell__tab ${activeWindow?.id === windowConfig.id ? "legacy-shell__tab--active" : ""}`}
                    >
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        className="legacy-shell__tab-main"
                        onClick={() => focusDocument(windowConfig.documentId)}
                      >
                        <strong>{windowConfig.title}</strong>
                        <span>{detectWorkspaceDocumentKind(document.path) ?? document.kind}</span>
                      </button>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        className="legacy-shell__tab-close"
                        onClick={() => {
                          void handleCloseWindow(windowConfig);
                        }}
                      >
                        x
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  );
                })
              )}
            </div>
            <div className="legacy-shell__workbench-stage">
              {activeWindowDocument ? (
                <DocumentSurface
                  client={snapshot.client}
                  document={activeWindowDocument}
                  translate={translate}
                  onRefresh={() => handleDocumentRefresh(activeWindowDocument)}
                  onClose={() => {
                    const windowConfig = getDocumentWindow(windowState.windowList, activeWindowDocument.id);
                    if (windowConfig) {
                      void handleCloseWindow(windowConfig);
                    }
                  }}
                  onSessionStateChange={(sessionSnapshot) => {
                    setEditorSessionSnapshot(sessionSnapshot);
                    setWindowStateValue((current) =>
                      setDocumentEditing(current, activeWindowDocument.id, activeWindowDocument.kind === "card"),
                    );
                  }}
                  onDropBaseCard={handleAddBaseCard}
                />
              ) : (
                <div className="legacy-shell__empty-stage">
                  <ChipsEmptyState
                    ariaLabel={translate("editingEngine.workspace.emptyTitle")}
                    title={translate("editingEngine.workspace.emptyTitle")}
                    description={translate("editingEngine.workspace.emptyDescription")}
                    actionLabel={translate("editingEngine.actions.openDocument")}
                    onAction={() => {
                      void openDocumentFromDialog();
                    }}
                  />
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </section>
          <aside className="legacy-shell__workbench-side legacy-shell__workbench-side--right">
            {editPanelWindow ? renderToolWindowContent(editPanelWindow.component) : null}
          </aside>
        </main>
      ) : (
        <main className="legacy-shell__canvas-shell">
          <div
            className="legacy-shell__canvas-board"
            onWheel={handleCanvasWheel}
            onPointerDown={handleCanvasPointerDown}
          >
            <div className="legacy-shell__canvas-grid" />
            <div className="legacy-shell__canvas-stage" style={canvasStyle}>
              {visibleCanvasWindows.map((windowConfig) => {
                const badge = windowConfig.type === "tool" ? translate(`editingEngine.legacy.toolBadge.${windowConfig.component}`) : undefined;
                const content =
                  windowConfig.type === "tool" ? (
                    renderToolWindowContent(windowConfig.component)
                  ) : (
                    documentMap.get(windowConfig.documentId) ? (
                      <DocumentSurface
                        client={snapshot.client}
                        document={documentMap.get(windowConfig.documentId)!}
                        translate={translate}
                        onRefresh={() => handleDocumentRefresh(documentMap.get(windowConfig.documentId)!)}
                        onClose={() => {
                          void handleCloseWindow(windowConfig);
                        }}
                        onSessionStateChange={(sessionSnapshot) => {
                          setEditorSessionSnapshot(sessionSnapshot);
                          activateDocument(windowConfig.documentId);
                        }}
                        onDropBaseCard={handleAddBaseCard}
                      />
                    ) : null
                  );
                return (
                  <FloatingWindow
                    key={windowConfig.id}
                    windowConfig={windowConfig}
                    active={windowState.focusedWindowId === windowConfig.id}
                    badge={badge}
                    onFocus={() => handleWindowFocus(windowConfig.id)}
                    onMove={(position) => {
                      setWindowStateValue((current) => moveWindow(current, windowConfig.id, position));
                    }}
                    onResize={(size) => {
                      setWindowStateValue((current) => resizeWindow(current, windowConfig.id, size));
                    }}
                    onMinimize={() => handleToggleWindowMinimized(windowConfig)}
                    onClose={windowConfig.type === "card" ? () => void handleCloseWindow(windowConfig) : undefined}
                  >
                    {content}
                  </FloatingWindow>
                );
              })}
            </div>
            <div className="legacy-shell__canvas-controls">
              <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => setWindowStateValue((current) => zoomCanvas(current, 0.1))}>
                +
              </ChipsButton>
              <span>{Math.round(windowState.canvas.zoom * 100)}%</span>
              <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => setWindowStateValue((current) => zoomCanvas(current, -0.1))}>
                -
              </ChipsButton>
              <ChipsButton variant="secondary" onPress={() => setWindowStateValue((current) => resetCanvas(current))}>
                {translate("editingEngine.legacy.resetCanvas")}
              </ChipsButton>
            </div>
            {dockWindows.length > 0 ? (
              <div className="legacy-shell__dock">
                {dockWindows.map((windowConfig) => (
                  <button
                    key={windowConfig.id}
                    type="button"
                    className="legacy-shell__dock-item"
                    onClick={() => {
                      handleToggleWindowMinimized(windowConfig);
                      handleWindowFocus(windowConfig.id);
                    }}
                  >
                    <strong>{windowConfig.title}</strong>
                    <span>{windowConfig.type === "tool" ? windowConfig.component : translate("editingEngine.documents.card")}</span>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : null}
          </div>
        </main>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
EOF]
```

```
[bash -lc cat > Chips-EditingEngine/src/features/shell/legacy-shell.css <<'EOF'
.legacy-shell {
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding: 18px 22px 22px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
}

.legacy-shell__topbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  padding: 6px 4px 10px;
  -webkit-app-region: drag;
}

.legacy-shell__topbar button,
.legacy-shell__topbar input,
.legacy-shell__topbar select,
.legacy-shell__topbar textarea,
.legacy-shell__topbar [role="button"] {
  -webkit-app-region: no-drag;
}

.legacy-shell__brand {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
}

.legacy-shell__brand h1 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 26px;
}

.legacy-shell__brand p {
  margin: 4px 0 0;
  color: rgba(27, 27, 24, 0.72);
}

.legacy-shell__eyebrow {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-width: 88px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.06);
  font-size: 12px;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.legacy-shell__actions,
.legacy-shell__inline-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.legacy-shell__launch-banner {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: rgba(34, 76, 118, 0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(34, 76, 118, 0.18);
  color: rgba(22, 57, 92, 0.9);
  font-size: 13px;
}

.legacy-shell__workbench {
  min-height: 0;
  flex: 1;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 320px minmax(0, 1fr) 360px;
  gap: 14px;
}

.legacy-shell__workbench-side,
.legacy-shell__workbench-main,
.legacy-shell__floating-window,
.legacy-shell__recent-card,
.legacy-shell__box-panel,
.legacy-shell__muted-card,
.legacy-shell__empty-tab,
.legacy-shell__canvas-controls,
.legacy-shell__dock-item {
  border-radius: 18px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 90%, transparent);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}

.legacy-shell__workbench-side {
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
}

.legacy-shell__workbench-main {
  min-height: 0;
  padding: 12px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
}

.legacy-shell__tabs {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  padding-bottom: 4px;
}

.legacy-shell__tab,
.legacy-shell__empty-tab {
  min-height: 52px;
  padding: 6px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
  gap: 8px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
}

.legacy-shell__tab--active {
  border-color: rgba(34, 76, 118, 0.28);
  background: rgba(34, 76, 118, 0.09);
}

.legacy-shell__tab-main,
.legacy-shell__tab-close,
.legacy-shell__library-item,
.legacy-shell__dock-item {
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: inherit;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.legacy-shell__tab-main {
  min-width: 180px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 2px;
  text-align: left;
}

.legacy-shell__tab-main span,
.legacy-shell__dock-item span,
.legacy-shell__floating-title span,
.legacy-shell__library-item span,
.legacy-shell__box-panel span {
  font-size: 12px;
  opacity: 0.7;
}

.legacy-shell__tab-close {
  width: 30px;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.legacy-shell__workbench-stage,
.legacy-shell__empty-stage {
  min-height: 0;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.legacy-shell__document-surface {
  min-height: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  padding: 6px;
  border-radius: 18px;
}

.legacy-shell__document-surface--droppable {
  outline: 1px dashed rgba(34, 76, 118, 0.18);
  outline-offset: -10px;
}

.legacy-shell__panel-stack,
.legacy-shell__tool-body {
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 16px;
}

.legacy-shell__tool-body {
  height: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.legacy-shell__panel-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: flex-start;
}

.legacy-shell__panel-header--tight h3,
.legacy-shell__panel-header--tight p {
  margin: 0;
}

.legacy-shell__panel-header--tight p {
  margin-top: 4px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: rgba(27, 27, 24, 0.72);
}

.legacy-shell__recent-card,
.legacy-shell__box-panel,
.legacy-shell__muted-card {
  padding: 14px;
}

.legacy-shell__box-panel,
.legacy-shell__muted-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}

.legacy-shell__library-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(128px, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
}

.legacy-shell__library-item {
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 6px;
}

.legacy-shell__library-item:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.48;
}

.legacy-shell__canvas-shell {
  min-height: 0;
  flex: 1;
}

.legacy-shell__canvas-board {
  position: relative;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 176px);
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 22px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.62), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.36)),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: auto, 24px 24px, 24px 24px;
  background-position: 0 0, -1px -1px, -1px -1px;
}

.legacy-shell__canvas-grid {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22), transparent 30%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.legacy-shell__canvas-stage {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  transform-origin: 0 0;
}

.legacy-shell__floating-window {
  position: absolute;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.legacy-shell__floating-window--active {
  box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(13, 26, 38, 0.16);
  border-color: rgba(34, 76, 118, 0.26);
}

.legacy-shell__floating-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.06);
  cursor: move;
  user-select: none;
}

.legacy-shell__floating-title {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 2px;
}

.legacy-shell__floating-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 6px;
}

.legacy-shell__floating-actions button {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.06);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.legacy-shell__floating-content {
  min-height: 0;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: auto;
}

.legacy-shell__canvas-controls {
  position: absolute;
  right: 18px;
  bottom: 18px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.legacy-shell__dock {
  position: absolute;
  left: 18px;
  right: 18px;
  bottom: 18px;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  padding-right: 220px;
}

.legacy-shell__dock-item {
  min-width: 180px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  text-align: left;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
}

@media (max-width: 1280px) {
  .legacy-shell__workbench {
    grid-template-columns: 280px minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .legacy-shell__workbench-side--right {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .legacy-shell {
    padding: 14px;
  }

  .legacy-shell__topbar,
  .legacy-shell__panel-header,
  .legacy-shell__brand {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: stretch;
  }

  .legacy-shell__workbench {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .legacy-shell__canvas-board {
    min-height: 72vh;
  }
}
EOF]
```

```
from pathlib import Path
updates = {

            'fileManagerTitle': '文件管理器',
            'editPanelTitle': '编辑面板',

            'cardLibraryTitle': '卡箱库',
            'cardLibraryDescription': '从这里添加基础卡片，或拖入当前卡片窗口。',
            'cardLibraryEmpty': '当前没有可用的基础卡片模板。',
            'recentDescription': '保留旧编辑器最近目标语义，便于快速回到最近处理过的文件。',
            'editorPanelWidth': '编辑面板宽度',
            'resetCanvas': '重置画布',
            'toolBadge': {
                'FileManager': '工具窗口',
                'EditPanel': '工具窗口',
                'CardBoxLibrary': '工具窗口',
            },
        },
    },
    'Chips-EditingEngine/i18n/en-US.json': {
        'actions': {
            'clearRecentTargets': 'Clear recents',
        },
        'workspace': {
            'emptyTitle': 'No document open yet',
            'emptyDescription': 'Open a card or box file to restore the legacy editing experience inside the new Chips runtime.',
            'recent': 'Recent targets',
        },
        'legacy': {
            'subtitle': 'Preserve the legacy editor interaction model on top of the new Chips ecosystem runtime.',
            'fileManagerTitle': 'File manager',
            'editPanelTitle': 'Edit panel',
            'editPanelDescription': 'Shows the active document, the selected base card, and the current editing session state.',
            'cardLibraryTitle': 'Card library',
            'cardLibraryDescription': 'Add base cards here or drag them into the active card window.',
            'cardLibraryEmpty': 'No base card template is currently available.',
            'recentDescription': 'Recent targets preserve the legacy quick-return workflow.',
            'editorPanelWidth': 'Editor panel width',
            'resetCanvas': 'Reset canvas',
            'toolBadge': {
                'FileManager': 'Tool window',
                'EditPanel': 'Tool window',
                'CardBoxLibrary': 'Tool window',
            },
        },
    },
}
for path_str, payload in updates.items():
    path = Path(path_str)
    data = json.loads(path.read_text())
    root = data['editingEngine']
    for section, values in payload.items():
        target = root.setdefault(section, {})
        target.update(values)
    path.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n')
PY]
```

```
[bash -lc cat > Chips-EditingEngine/tests/unit/legacy-window-state.test.ts <<'EOF'
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import {
  createInitialLegacyWindowShellState,
  ensureToolWindows,
  focusWindow,
  getDockWindows,
  getDocumentWindow,
  setWindowState,
  syncDocumentWindows,
} from "../../src/domains/legacy-shell/legacy-window-state";
import { createCardWorkspaceDocument } from "../../src/domains/workspace/workspace-service";

function createCardDocument(path: string, title: string) {
  return createCardWorkspaceDocument({
    path,
    ast: {
      metadata: { name: title },
      structure: {
        structure: [{ id: "node-1", type: "richtext-BCP" }],
      },
      contentFiles: [],
    },
    validation: {
      valid: true,
      errors: [],
    },
    preview: {
      title,
      body: "<html></html>",
      contentFiles: [],
      target: "card-iframe",
      semanticHash: `hash:${title}`,
    },
  });
}

describe("legacy-window-state", () => {
  it("应初始化并注册旧编辑器工具窗口", () => {
    const initial = createInitialLegacyWindowShellState("workbench");
    const next = ensureToolWindows(
      initial,
      { width: 1440, height: 900 },
      {
        fileManager: "文件管理器",
        editPanel: "编辑面板",
        cardLibrary: "卡箱库",
      },
    );

    expect(next.windowList).toHaveLength(3);
    expect(next.windowList.map((item) => item.id)).toEqual([
      "tool-window:FileManager",
      "tool-window:EditPanel",
      "tool-window:CardBoxLibrary",
    ]);
  });

  it("应根据打开文档同步卡片窗口并维护焦点", () => {
    const document = createCardDocument("/workspace/demo.card", "Demo");
    const withTools = ensureToolWindows(
      createInitialLegacyWindowShellState("workbench"),
      { width: 1440, height: 900 },
      {
        fileManager: "文件管理器",
        editPanel: "编辑面板",
        cardLibrary: "卡箱库",
      },
    );
    const synced = syncDocumentWindows(withTools, [document]);
    const cardWindow = getDocumentWindow(synced.windowList, document.id);

    expect(cardWindow?.title).toBe("Demo");

    const focused = focusWindow(synced, cardWindow!.id);
    expect(focused.focusedWindowId).toBe(cardWindow?.id);
    expect(focused.maxZIndex).toBeGreaterThan(synced.maxZIndex);
  });

  it("应识别最小化窗口并返回 dock 列表", () => {
    const document = createCardDocument("/workspace/demo.card", "Dock Demo");
    const synced = syncDocumentWindows(createInitialLegacyWindowShellState("infinite-canvas"), [document]);
    const cardWindow = getDocumentWindow(synced.windowList, document.id);
    const minimized = setWindowState(synced, cardWindow!.id, "minimized");

    expect(getDockWindows(minimized.windowList)).toHaveLength(1);
    expect(getDockWindows(minimized.windowList)[0]?.id).toBe(cardWindow?.id);
  });
});
EOF]
```

```
[bash -lc cat > Chips-EditingEngine/技术文档/06-旧编辑器上层迁移映射.md <<'EOF'
# 旧编辑器上层迁移映射

> 文档状态：开发中持续维护
> 更新时间：2026-03-12

---

## 1. 文档目的

本文件记录 `归档/Chips-Editor` 的旧上层壳层，如何迁入 `Chips-EditingEngine` 的新生态运行时。

迁移原则：

- 旧项目上层交互语义优先保留；
- 新项目仅替换底层运行机制与正式工程结构；
- 已完成的新 React 运行时、主题、多语言、Host / SDK 适配层必须作为正式底座继续复用。

## 2. 旧上层到新实现映射

| 旧实现位置 | 职责 | 新实现位置 | 迁移策略 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `归档/Chips-Editor/src/types/window.ts` | 窗口语义模型 | `src/legacy/types/window.ts` | 直接迁移类型定义，作为新窗口域基线 |
| `归档/Chips-Editor/src/utils/id.ts` | 旧 ID 生成语义 | `src/legacy/utils/id.ts` | 直接迁移纯工具逻辑 |
| `归档/Chips-Editor/src/core/state/stores/ui.ts` | 窗口、画布、Dock、聚焦状态 | `src/domains/legacy-shell/legacy-window-state.ts` | 抽取为 React 可复用的纯状态转换函数 |
| `归档/Chips-Editor/src/core/window-manager.ts` | 创建/聚焦/移动/最小化窗口 | `src/domains/legacy-shell/legacy-window-state.ts` + `src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx` | 保留语义，改为 React 状态驱动 |
| `归档/Chips-Editor/src/layouts/workbench/Workbench.vue` | 工作台三栏壳层 | `src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx` | 使用新 Provider + 旧布局语义重建 |
| `归档/Chips-Editor/src/layouts/infinite-canvas/InfiniteCanvas.vue` | 无限画布窗口系统 | `src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx` | 使用新窗口域状态与 React 壳层重建 |
| `归档/Chips-Editor/src/components/card-box-library/**` | 卡箱库与拖拽入口 | `src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx` | 保留“从库中添加 / 拖入卡片窗口”的交互语义 |
| `归档/Chips-Editor/src/components/edit-panel/**` | 编辑面板壳层 | `src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx` + `src/features/editor/BaseCardWorkbench.tsx` | 新编辑域作为内容核心，旧面板语义作为外壳 |
| `归档/Chips-Editor/src/components/file-manager/**` | 文件管理器 | `src/features/shell/WorkspaceRepositoryTree.tsx` + `src/features/shell/EditorShell.tsx` | 先由新工作区树承接正式打开链路，再逐步补齐旧文件工作流 |

## 3. 当前正式落地范围

### 3.1 已完成

- 旧窗口类型、窗口状态、窗口定位语义已迁入新仓库；
- 工作台 / 无限画布双布局已切换为新的顶层壳层分支；
- 工具窗口职责已重新分配为：文件管理器、编辑面板、卡箱库；
- 旧“文档标签 + 工具窗口 + 画布窗口 + Dock”的基本关系已由 `legacy-window-state` 承接；
- 卡片内容编辑继续复用新编辑域：`BaseCardWorkbench`、`useBaseCardEditingSession`、`card-package-domain`。

### 3.2 当前仍待补齐

- 旧文件管理器中的创建、重命名、删除、右键菜单等完整工作流；
- 更精细的无限画布拖拽命中与插入指示器；
- 旧程序坞的完整视觉和恢复策略；
- 旧设置面板分组与更完整的窗口菜单交互；
- 旧上层更多纯逻辑模块的进一步归档式迁移。

## 4. 为什么不直接迁移 Vue SFC

以下部分不适合整文件拷贝：

- `.vue` 单文件组件；
- Pinia `defineStore`；
- 旧 Electron / connector / workspace 直连服务；
- 依赖旧插件加载模型的边界层。

原因：

- 新生态正式应用壳层已统一到 React app 插件脚手架；
- 组件库、主题系统、多语言系统和 Host 运行时都以现行 React 方案为基线；
- 继续保留 Vue 壳层会导致双运行时并存，破坏生态主线和后续长期维护。

## 5. 验证要求

本映射落地后，至少满足：

- `npm test`
- `npm run build`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run validate`

并且要求：
```

```
  "Chips-SDK/src/contracts/route-manifest.json"
  "Chips-SDK/tests/client.test.ts"
  "Chips-SDK/tests/route-manifest.test.ts"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/scripts/check-templates.mjs"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/scripts/run-generated-e2e.mjs"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/src/core/template-engine.ts"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/templates/app-standard"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/tests/template-engine.test.ts"
  "生态共用技术文档/协议与接口标准/02-Bridge-API规范.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/协议与接口标准/03-基础卡片编辑器消息协议.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/架构设计/14-Host服务域设计.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/架构设计/薯片生态-架构设计手册.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/插件开发/08-SDK使用指南.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/文件格式规范/01-卡片文件格式规范.md"
  "项目日志与笔记/问题工单.md"
  "项目日志与笔记/工单028-APP-SCAFFOLD-GENERATED-PROJECT-CONTRACT-DRIFT"
  "项目日志与笔记/工单029-EDITING-ENGINE-BASECARD-EDITOR-CONTRACT-GAP"
  "项目日志与笔记/工单030-EDITING-ENGINE-COMPOSITE-STRUCTURE-MUTATION-CONTRACT-GAP"
)

selected_paths=()
for path in "${candidate_paths[@]}"; do
  if git ls-files --error-unmatch -- "$path" >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -e "$path" ]; then
    selected_paths+=("$path")
  fi
done

if [ ${#selected_paths[@]} -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "No migration-related paths found"
  exit 1
fi

if git rev-parse --verify --quiet "$archive_branch" >/dev/null; then
  echo "Archive branch already exists: $archive_branch"
  exit 1
fi

tmp_index="$(mktemp)"
cleanup() {
  rm -f "$tmp_index"
}
trap cleanup EXIT

GIT_INDEX_FILE="$tmp_index" git read-tree HEAD
GIT_INDEX_FILE="$tmp_index" git add -A -- "${selected_paths[@]}"

if [ -z "$(GIT_INDEX_FILE="$tmp_index" git diff --cached --name-only)" ]; then
  echo "No staged migration-related diff found"
  exit 1
fi

tree_id="$(GIT_INDEX_FILE="$tmp_index" git write-tree)"
parent_id="$(git rev-parse HEAD)"
commit_id="$(printf '%s\n\nArchived abandoned editing-engine migration snapshot on 2026-03-12.\n' "$commit_message" | git commit-tree "$tree_id" -p "$parent_id")"

git update-ref "refs/heads/$archive_branch" "$commit_id"

tracked_restore=()
untracked_remove=()
for path in "${selected_paths[@]}"; do
  if git ls-files --error-unmatch -- "$path" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    tracked_restore+=("$path")
  else
    untracked_remove+=("$path")
  fi
done

if [ ${#tracked_restore[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
  git restore --source=HEAD --worktree -- "${tracked_restore[@]}"
fi

for path in "${untracked_remove[@]}"; do
  if [ -e "$path" ]; then
    rm -rf -- "$path"
  fi
done

echo "ARCHIVE_BRANCH=$archive_branch"
echo "ARCHIVE_COMMIT=$commit_id"
echo "ARCHIVED_PATHS=${#selected_paths[@]}"]
```

```
[bash -lc set -euo pipefail

base_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD)"
keep_branch="codex/cardviewer-shortcut-governance-20260312"
archive_branch="archive/codex/discarded-unmerged-leftovers-20260312"

for ref in "$keep_branch" "$archive_branch"; do
  if git rev-parse --verify --quiet "$ref" >/dev/null; then
    echo "Branch already exists: $ref" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
done

keep_paths=(
  ".gitignore"
  "Chips-CardViewer/README.md"
  "Chips-CardViewer/i18n/en-US.json"
  "Chips-CardViewer/i18n/zh-CN.json"
  "Chips-CardViewer/src/App.tsx"
  "Chips-CardViewer/src/components/CardWindow.tsx"
  "Chips-CardViewer/src/components/DropZone.tsx"
  "Chips-CardViewer/src/hooks/useChipsBridge.ts"
  "Chips-CardViewer/src/i18n/messages.ts"
  "Chips-CardViewer/tests/unit/app.test.tsx"
  "Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/tests/e2e/basic-flow.test.ts"
  "Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/技术文档/02-信息架构与交互流程设计.md"
  "Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/技术文档/03-运行时数据流与接口映射设计.md"
  "Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/技术文档/05-交付前检查与人工验收清单.md"
  "Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/需求文档/01-生态设置面板需求总览.md"
  "Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/需求文档/02-生态设置面板功能需求规格.md"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/技术文档/01-应用插件脚手架总体架构设计.md"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/技术文档/02-模板目录与文件组织设计.md"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/技术文档/03-模板参数化与渲染引擎设计.md"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/需求文档/02-应用插件脚手架功能需求规格.md"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-app/需求文档/03-应用插件脚手架非功能与质量验收需求.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/协议与接口标准/06-Chips-Host对外接口基线.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/协议与接口标准/07-运行时设置治理接口标准.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/命令行工具/01-Chips-Host命令行使用手册.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/插件开发/02-应用插件开发.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/插件开发/06-Manifest配置规范.md"
)

while IFS= read -r file; do
  keep_paths+=("$file")
done < <(find design-assets/Appicon -maxdepth 1 -type f ! -name '.DS_Store' | sort)

archive_paths=(
  "Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/docs/technical/01-架构设计.md"
  "Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/src/index.ts"
  "Chips-Host/tests/integration/host-services.test.ts"
  "Chips-Host/tests/unit/card-service-rendering.test.ts"
  "Chips-Host/tests/unit/service-activation.test.ts"
  "Chips-SDK/src/api/card.ts"
  "Chips-SDK/src/api/module.ts"
  "Chips-SDK/tests/card.test.ts"
  "Chips-SDK/技术文档/04-文件与资源能力封装设计.md"
  "Chips-SDK/技术文档/06-主题与插件能力封装设计.md"
  "Chips-SDK/需求文档/02-薯片 SDK 功能需求规格.md"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-basecard/templates/card-standard/src/index.ts.tpl"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-basecard/templates/card-text-basic/src/index.ts.tpl"
  "Chips-Scaffold/chips-scaffold-basecard/需求文档/02-基础卡片插件脚手架功能需求规格.md"
  "package-lock.json"
  "归档/.DS_Store"
  "生态共用技术文档/插件开发/03-卡片插件开发.md"
  "生态共用技术文档/组件库/07-复合卡片窗口与SDK显示链路标准.md"
  "design-assets/Appicon/.DS_Store"
)

make_commit () {
  local branch_name="$1"
  local commit_message="$2"
  shift 2
  local tmp_index
  tmp_index="$(mktemp)"
  GIT_INDEX_FILE="$tmp_index" git read-tree "$base_commit"
  GIT_INDEX_FILE="$tmp_index" git add -A -- "$@"
  local tree_id
  tree_id="$(GIT_INDEX_FILE="$tmp_index" git write-tree)"
  local commit_id
  commit_id="$(printf '%s\n' "$commit_message" | git commit-tree "$tree_id" -p "$base_commit")"
  git update-ref "refs/heads/$branch_name" "$commit_id"
  rm -f "$tmp_index"
  echo "$commit_id"
}

keep_commit="$(make_commit "$keep_branch" 'feat(apps): keep card viewer i18n and shortcut governance' "${keep_paths[@]}")"
archive_commit="$(make_commit "$archive_branch" 'archive(misc): preserve discarded leftover changes' "${archive_paths[@]}")"

tracked_restore=(
  "${keep_paths[@]}"
  "${archive_paths[@]}"
)

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import shutil
for target in [
    Path('Chips-CardViewer/src/i18n/messages.ts'),
    Path('design-assets/Appicon/.DS_Store'),
]:
    if target.is_dir():
        shutil.rmtree(target)
    elif target.exists():
        target.unlink()
PY

git restore --source="$base_commit" --worktree -- "${tracked_restore[@]}"

git checkout develop >/dev/null 2>&1

git merge --ff-only "$keep_branch" >/dev/null 2>&1

echo "KEEP_BRANCH=$keep_branch"
echo "KEEP_COMMIT=$keep_commit"
echo "ARCHIVE_BRANCH=$archive_branch"
echo "ARCHIVE_COMMIT=$archive_commit"
echo "DEVELOP_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD)"]
```
